input: rating 5.0. Great moisturizer I love this moisturizer! Even though I have not used it very long (about one week) the consistency and the fragrance are both great. It moisturizes my skin beautifully without feeling heavy or greasy. I have previously been afraid to use moisturizers because I thought they would break me out. However, as I am getting to an age where moisturizers are important I decided to try this one. Yay! No breakouts. My skin just feels very very smooth and comfortable after using this product. I have a lot of faith in Instanatural products. I feel their ingredients are natural and I know how to pronounce them which is always a good thing. Keep up the good work.

rating 4.0. Already started recommending to friends I have been using this moisturizer for about two weeks and really like it!  After only one week I was able to see an improvement in my forehead lines and creases.  I notice a difference in overall texture too. I did have to reduce my use to once a day as twice was causing some irritation bumps, but my skin tends to be mildly sensitive to alpha hydroxy products. I already recommended this to a friend and plan on ordering the eye cream as well.
rating 5.0. Love it! I have very dry, sensitive skin.  This moisturizer offers the moisture I need without irritating my skin and it isn't heavy. Love it!

rating 5.0. Try This Cream! I purchased cream this along with several other anti-aging moisturizers to find one that suited me. And this one is by far the best! This moisturizer feels amazing on my skin! I absolutely love how it makes my skin look. The seller is excellent. I am very pleased with this purchase. I encourage anyone considering this moisturizer to give it a try!

rating 5.0. Fantastic product! I was looking for a good product, mainly as a moisturizer and ordered this product.  I am in a remote overseas location and the environment is quite harsh so I needed a product to protect my skin.  First off, the product arrived on time, which pleased me.  This product is fragrance free but don't let that put you off; it is because of all the natural ingredients in the formula.  After 2 weeks of using this moisturizer my skin feels soft and supple.  I am almost 60 but last week when three younger ladies in one of our sister offices thought I was 40, I knew I had it going on (smile)! The best part is that AJ contacted me twice to make sure I was happy with the product and I thought that was superb customer service.  Thank you AJ!

rating 5.0. Great product!!! I'm a 50 year old women that has tried a zillion face creams without much success.  I have VERY sensitive skin and have had breakouts all my life. Cream last all day and feels great.  Highly recommend!!!

rating 5.0. Solid! This facial cream is very rich with ingredients that nourish and rejuvenate my exhausted skin. The smell is fragrance free and organic just as what's described - it's all natural. rating 2.0. Unfortunately it's a PORE CLOGGER I can only give this 2 stars. I've been applying it for about 3 1/2 months now. Let me give the pros of this product are:

Cons:

rating 3.0. Good enough, but not anti-aging. I like this product because of the natural ingredient list. I have not noticed any improvements in my skin.  I will continue to use it until it is done, but will not re-purchase.

rating 5.0. Great night and day moisturizers that minimizes fine line and appears to improve the texture of skin almost immediately. Received this product yesterday and used it as my night cream.  When I got up this morning I could see a definite different In the appearance of my facial skin.  I looked less tired, and my skin just looked better.  I've decided to us this moisturizer as my day and night time moisturizer because it works that well! Highly recommended. I will definitely be buying again.

rating 5.0. This is my second bottle ( which my husband added to a gift packcage for me knowing how much i loved it) My skin is very dry I have used several high end moiturizers over the years, and by doing some research just found Insta Natural.
This is my second bottle ( which my husband added to a gift packcage for me knowing how much
i loved it)
My skin is very dry, and this moisturizer makes my skin feel supple and moisturized.
As far as the effect on my skin this moisturizer works even better than some very expensive ones.
My skin feels hydrated for a long time!
The only difference is that the high end moiturizers have a nice and soft fragrance,
This moisturizer has a very grassy or herbal fragrance, which can bother some people.
I got used to it.
As I understand, to withdraw the natural fragrance of a product you have to add some ingredients that are not
so natural or good for you. I will try to learn more about it.
Congratulations to a company that kept it simple.
by the way:
This Company has the best customer service ever!
I could not believe it that following my purchase I got a personal Email, explaining the company mission, thanking me for purchasing
their product, with another Email asking if I was pleased with the purchase.
I was not only buying a great product, but also felt that it matter to them whether the product was working or not for me.
For sure I will buy it again and again from them. I can't wait to try other products from this Company! Love the prices and product so far.
from a ex cosmetics sales manager from a great high end cosmectic company.

rating 4.0. A very effective product! I really like this product. I have been using it about eight weeks. My face feels softer, and it plumps up the wrinkles around my eyes so foundation goes on smoother.  I use it every morning after I apply vitamin C serum to my cleansed face.  The two products have worked well together to reduce dark spots and rough patches on my forehead.  I also like the pump bottle which helps me control the amount of product I use.  It lasts much longer that way.  The fresh herbal scent is nice too!

rating 5.0. Just right! Love the consistency and the bottle style- you get just the amount you need. This moisturizer is creamy and thick, but not too thick. Absorbs so well after using the Facial Cleansing Oil.  The company sent me a personal email to ask about my satisfaction, and then responded to a question!  Great service.

rating 3.0. PUMP BROKEN, had to pry open and transfer to another jar. Yep...these pumps are really crappy make, as I have seen with other reviews...so bad, because I would have give 5 star for the moisturizer...but now, that it has been adulterated and had to be scooped into another old container, I feel weird...

Anyway, overall, it feels greasy, thick and heavy at first, BUT do not despair, in about 2 minutes it absorbes perfectly into your skin and feels clean, moisturized and never greasy, perfect base for make up.
Somehow did make my skin look healthier, plumper, and cause absolutely no breakouts...I did noticed some blackheads and pores on my nose filling up so it is possible that the oils kind of accumulate, but right after using exfoliator, I was fine again...

would buy again, but PLEASE, fix those damn pumps...I cannot run back to the post office every time...and I will not like keeping defective product again!

UPDATE 12/21/14
Very sad to report that now I have stopped using the cream alltogether. I will post update if anything changes.
Reasons: As I have mentioned in my first review, I noticed this cream is very heavy, but absorbs very well. However over past weeks of using it, it seems it has completely blocked my pores, in a very sneaky, slow, invisible manner. The problems started when l found painful bumps between my eyebrows and on my temples and huge hard pores on my chin. I do not use hair products, so it is not from that. I am a picker, so tried to relieve these pores by extracting the blackheads, and exfoliating, in hopes it would relieve them, as well as aid in removing the deposits this moisturizer might leave during the day. I tried this for a while only to find more sneaky blackheads and whiteheads forming in places I would have never had this problem before. See, I have a skin that sometimes has outbreaks but not in the typical oily/teenager spots, but since I have started using this cream, the areas of no problems before have become breeding grounds for families of nasty, hardened pores. Unfortunately they are very hard, painful and almost impossible to remove without damage...I have stopped using the moisturizer and now will wait it out. I guess I might do better with a gel based moisturizer.

rating 2.0. Disappointing. Didn't hydrate me. Disappointed. I tried this with combination of the Vitamin C Serum and it never hydrated me.
It actually gave me 3 pimples in one week! when the last time I had pimples was probably 10+ years ago.
My skin is very dry and I had high hopes it would hydrate it, but I would wake up with my skin very dry.

rating 5.0. Highly Recommended! I'm a Caucasian woman in my late fifties and I bought this product several weeks ago because I liked the natural ingredients and hoped they would nourish my skin. I neglected my skin until after menopause when I became distressingly aware of how rapidly I had aged.
In the course of the past 2 yrs. I have tried numerous products and been moderately satisfied.
I LOVE this cream!
In the past several weeks fine lines and wrinkles have gradually but distinctly diminished. But even more important and incredible is that the red, blotchy areas on my cheeks and forehead have faded until they are barely noticeable! I no longer use cover up or foundation at all!
Friends and family have commented on how great I look. At the pharmacy, I was talking to another woman in line about hot flashes and she thought I was too young for menopause! OMG!!!
I highly recommend this cream.

rating 1.0. Not Good... I really wanted to like this moisturizer, but I just can't.  First of all, it smells funky - like I'm putting salad dressing on my face.  I like a lot of InstaNatural products, so I didn't want to give such a bad review, but this heavy, smelly cream just doesn't work!  Secondly, it contains beeswax, a known comedogenic ingredient that doesn't belong in a facial moisturizer. Being a skin care junkie, I would've tolerated the smell, and greasy feel if it was beneficial for my skin. However, after using it for a week with no results, and even a few minor breakouts, I tossed it in the trash.

rating 5.0. I'm very satisfied. After about 4 weeks I'm really impressed. I took a risk here. I've been using Loreal Revitalift for about 6 years. I was unsatisfied with the price of Loreal at the store and I was all out. So I bought this product. I spent slightly less overall (ounce per ounce) and the product is use for BOTH day and night.
I'm very satisfied. After about 4 weeks, I walked passed a mirror yesterday and thought "Huh, I think my skin looks firmer" I was really surprised. I would have been happy with status quo!
Admittedly the first 1-2 weeks I had a few minor break outs. (a zit here, a zit there) but that is always to be expected whenever you change product.
Also, the smell did surprise me at first. That is, I prefer NO smell, but this has a smell. At first I thought "I'll never get used to this" but I absolutely did after about 2 weeks...and now I sort of like it.
I'm really satisfied with the product and will probably get it again.

rating 5.0. Cute and practical way to get hair out of your way. These work great for getting your hair out of the way, for whatever reason you have to want it out of the way.

In my case, I have sensitive skin that can get itchy if my hair touches my neck or back, so I use these at home to keep my hair off those areas, especially in the summer when I'm wearing skimpier tops. It's also great for keeping my hair out of the way when I have to do cooking or housework. It's a lot faster to glob my hair on my head and clamp it down with a couple of these than it is to monkey with a pony tail holder or barrettes or whatever.

Bonus: The colors in this set (blue, light blue, purple) are some of my favorites, so they're not only useful, but also cute to look at.

input: rating 5.0. AMAZING! What a great idea! I don't have a ton of makeup brushes and used to wipe each on a towel as I did my makeup, but this has changed my makeup life forever! Do yourself a favor and get it!
rating 5.0. Loved it! Awesome product. It does what it says. It cleans your brushes so you won't have to mess your make up anymore!

rating 2.0. Not as life altering as I wanted it to be I thought with all the great YouTube reviews out there, that this was gonna be awesome. I had high hopes! rating 5.0. Quick brush cleaning This is a great product for a quick brush cleaning.  It removes eyeshadow color from the bristles so you can use the same brush to switch to a different color; without having to wet the bristles and waiting for it to dry.  Quick and easy.  You still would have to deep clean your brushes weekly with a conventional method.

rating 5.0. Love, love, LOVE Such a wonderful tool to have when doing make up. I no longer need to rub the shadow from the brush so vigorously, just a simple swirl and I can switch colors. A must have!

rating 5.0. The Vera Mono Color Switch is easy to use I'm not a makeup artist, just someone new to experiments with makeup. Now I don't feel the need to have 2 or 3 of the same brush just to avoid residual color from the last thing I tried.

The Vera Mono Color Switch is easy to use, and not messy. I don't have to do anything special to it before or after I use it, either.

I also love that refills are available, too.

rating 4.0. Impressive eye brush cleaner for in between colors I bought this after watching some youtube reviews and decided I would try it out.  I don't have very many brushes and it is a pain to wash them and then wait for them to dry before I could use them again.  I thought trying this would help me switch colors without having to dirty another brush.  I was a little skeptical that this thing would actually work, but I tried it as soon as I got it and I was pretty impressed that it took the shadow right off a brush with fresh product on it.  The only thing I found with this that is not great is that if you use a sparkly pigment or shadow, it doesn't get all the sparkly particles off the brush and some of that can transfer to your next shadow.  But otherwise, the Colour Switch is impressive and I was surprised at how well it worked with regular shadows.  The tin is also nice since it catches any shadow that trickles through the sponge, it also seems like it will be great to travel with since it won't get make up everywhere if you toss it in a makeup bag.  They do sell refills for the tin, but I think I will just wash the one it came with and see how that works out.  Overall, I am pretty impressed with this brush cleaner and would recommend it to people looking for an easy way to clean your eye brushes between colors.

rating 5.0. Provides extra strength to nails I switched back from power/dip nails to gel.  I wanted something that added a little more strength to my natural nail, but without using nail extensions.  Following the basic Gelish instructions, I used this between the base layer and the color layer.  The manicure lasted about two weeks.  Some comments for this product say that this is difficult to take off.  I just refreshed my manicure and found it was no more difficult than normal gel removal.  I gently roughed the outer layer, applied nail polish remover until the gel was soft, (the same way it would be done in a salon) and then wiped the old gel off as normal. It applies like nail polish.  It isn't hard like acrylic, powder or a nail extension, so I don't think alone it would suffice for nail extensions (you'd need something underneath it).  The color of this product is a soft transparent pink. I used it first with color, and now I have it with two coats without additional Gelish color.  With two coats, you can still see the nail bed beneath, but it came out very soft and natural.  The product arrived quickly and was well-packaged.  Overall, I'm very satisfied.

rating 5.0. keep your teeth  and gums ion tip top shape recommended by a dental hygienist, this really works on the gum area and especially those nasty -pockets along the gum line where debris gets trapped.  go for iti; set the hydroflosser at 5 and you also can use the pocket pal as your regular cleaning tip.

rating 3.0. Not as versatile as the regular tips I've had the regular jet tips for two years now but thought i'd try the pocket pal tips because they're cheaper.  The pocket pal tips have a smaller opening and are more rubbery.  The rubber tip feels soft on your gums, and as advertised, they get into pockets better.  But I feel they are not as versatile as the regular tips: the narrower spray of the these tips may remove less plaque and may clean less of the surfaces between teeth.  Also, the pocket pal tips are about one-half inch shorter and have a shallower curve at the end; the resulting angle makes it harder to reach the gum line behind the molars.  Overall, these tips seem to remove less material than the regular tips.

rating 5.0. Great product! Love this product.  It certainly works for exfoliating dry skin on the lips.  I would definitely recommend this product.

rating 5.0. A wonderful product To start things off, I am not someone that is obsessed with makeup. You can normally find me out and about without a single trace of makeup on my face. I bought this product because I suffer from dry skin; specifically in the winter. This is an issue that also leads me to have rather dry lips. Though, kissing my boyfriend doesn’t really help with that issue either.

What I expected:
-A lipstick-like product that exfoliates.
-No real scent or flavor.

What I got:
-A very creamy exfoliating system that comes in lipstick form.
-A very pleasant mint scent/flavor.

This thing works! And it’s not at all harsh or rough while exfoliating. I just rub it in small circles along my lips to buff off the dead skin, and then use a wet washcloth to remove said skin and exfoliator. I have yet to buy the vitamin E stick, but I just use my favorite hydrating lip balm, or my jojoba oil that I use on my face to rehydrate my lips. I swear, this thing takes years off of your look.

If you’re someone like me that has dry skin, I highly recommend this product. If you’re someone who uses matte lipsticks, this thing will be your new best friend. Either way, you will not regret this purchase. If anything, you’ll wish they sold these in bulk!

rating 5.0. Moisturizes and exfoliates at the same time - lived up to it's promises! How nice to have a lip balm and exfoliater all in one. My lips get chapped easily, so I've been using this product instead of my go-to lip balm for the exfoliating benefits, and I've noticed a difference. My lips feel very soft. When I apply it, I use my finger to gently rub in the pumice to get rid of dead skin. My lips feel very moisturized. I wear some form of lipstick of lip gloss every day, so I certainly don't want my lips looking dry. I've seen other exfoliating lip scrubs, but I think that this is way more convenient as it comes in a lipstick form.

I don't know a lot about the company, but I love that they're cruelty-free, paraben-free, and make their products in the USA (although, I admit, I am a Korean skincare junkie). The price was reasonable, and this product lived up to it's promises. I will definitely look into this company's other products to see if I can find any other gems.

rating 5.0. Great product!!!! Works great!!!! They glow in the even when you walk outside and the sun is out. Have used 3 different colors so far, they last 1-2 weeks depending on what you do, like dishes. Used clear base coat first then black then polish and magnet.  Base coat and black are all UV soak off.  You do 1 coat base, cure, 1 coat black, cure, then whatever color you choose magnet then cure. Once you get to the magnet part you can do all 5 nails and cure together. Faster process than having to do 1 nail at a time.  I will be buying more and getting different colors.

rating 3.0. Eh... So first and foremost: I am a State Board Licensed nail tech and I have been doing nails for 15 years.

I was a little leery of ordering product from Amazon but overall the quality of this wasn't bad. The only reason I gave it 3 stars is because the photos are a little deceptive: they are not black with glitter. They are colors with chunky glitter. Which might work for some but didn't create the look I wanted for my Halloween costume.

Overall not a bad product. I wasn't impressed with the magnet cat eye effect - it's very minimal and barely noticeable. The glow in the dark feature is pretty cool and works well.

Pro Tip- after looking through the photo reviews: keep your layers thinner. This formula, by nature of the chunky glitter, is on the thicker side, so keeping your layers thinner will prevent the lumpy mess I see in several of these photos.

rating 5.0. What a value! My shiseido curler's pad was split down the center! I didn't even think of looking here! For 6 pads it's a steal. I was so glad I found these. They are genuine; a perfect fit for my shiseido curler. What a difference! They're SO firm! My lashes looked fake almost - straight up to the sky visually opening the eye - and they're puny blonde and straight. In case you don't know this, as soon as you're done curling, use a *waterproof* mascara. Any old drugstore one. I don't know why, but waterproof sets the curl. I learned that online somewhere years ago and would never think of not doing it now - it works that well. I currently use cover girl in bloom or whatever in the pink tube. But any one will do. Then, go in with the good mascara, in my case too faced better than s*x. Wow. What a difference! With that system though, you better have some good eye makeup remover lol. Actually I've used yves st Laurent waterproof faux cils and didn't have to use a top coat. The too faced one is slightly better though so I go with that.

rating 5.0. What contouring is and isn't, and why this is a great brush to use for it In my younger days, I used to model, so I became an old hand at contouring, which seems to have been revived a la Kim Kardashian. One of my favorite brushes from then was a flat contouring brush that was angled. I absolutely adored it for adding the right shadow under my cheekbones to make them stand out.

Since the contouring revival, I decided to give this a go again, but I couldn't find a reasonably priced brush that did what I wanted it to do (I refuse to spend a fortune on a brush for this, mostly because I do not see contouring lasting very long, but that's another review.) The HDSL brush came closest to what I was looking for: dense, flat and with a good handle.

It kind of looks like a paint brush, but the hair is VERY nice. Very soft and dense, and a miracle for something that's less than six bucks. My contouring skills are such that I know not to buy an entire palette of colors that are way too orangey or warm. I use Kevyn Aucoin's contour powder which is way pricey (you can find something similar in color in Makeup Forever's eyeshadow line), but the Aucoin contour powder color was absolutely perfect.

As I'm sure you know, contour is meant to mimic a shadow. It is NOT a bronzer (you cannot contour with anything with the slightest bit of shine); too orange and you look ridiculous. The color is a light matte taupe with zero hint of red in it. It should NOT be too dark, unless you are dark complected. Think of it as being two shades darker than your skin color, the way a shadow is cast on the hollows or low areas of your face.

This brush picked up the powder like a champ and deposited it nicely. Does a great job fading the contour color out so it looks like a shadow and not like I have a swath of dirt on my face. My only hesitation with this so far is that I wish it was angled, but no matter. It's not that hard to use in such a way (well, what do you want for less than six bucks?)

I'd definitely recommend this. You won't get anything better at anywhere near the price.

rating 5.0. I Wish I Had Owned This Sooner! I finally picked up honest size yeah Beverly Hills powder contour kit about a month ago. I have a large collection of brushes, so I decided to use the pallette with a Real Techniques sculpting brush. While that worked, I wasted a lot of product and a lot of time.
This brush was amazing! I quickly sketched out the areas in my face that needed contouring. I never had to dip my brush in or use MAC Fix Plus to get the color to show up. Then, I took a dense, soft brush to buff out the color. When I used a sculpting brush, the color was already so diffused that I was probably wasting a lot of expensive product on the brush.
I was inspired to buy this because it looks like so many high end brushes meant for contouring, but Real Teachniques Sculpting brush didn't, plus it was the same density as a brush that I sometimes use to apply foundation.

rating 5.0. Thus brush  TRULY ROCKS!!! This brush is absolutely FANTASTIC!!! No product falling on to your face so GREAT I ordered 2 more for my different colors of contour I use

rating 5.0. Good brush for the price! I like this brush a lot. Great for contouring! Bristles are just stiff enough to do the job of holding product on the brush and placing it precisely. Very soft on the face and great quality for the price. I've used nearly every grade of brush from drugstore brands to professional quality and this is a high contender with higher grade brushes. I would definitely recommend this brush, you won't be disappointed. Also very fast shipping, no shedding of the brush yet, sturdy build, no weak points in the assembly of the product, and packaging was good.

rating 5.0. This one doesn't disappoint! It's a little thicker than I had imagined I was hesitant to purchase this for the price, but went for it because of all the positive reviews. This one doesn't disappoint! It's a little thicker than I had imagined, but as it turns out, as I'm learning contouring, it's the perfect size! It seems SUPER high quality. Much more so than I would have imagined for the price. I own some E.L.F brushes and while some of them are great, some are so cheap and they fall apart, bristles come out, they don't hold their shape, etc. This are NOT like those brushes. So far, I've been using it three or four weeks and not a bristle has fallen out! The coverage is great, it blends smooth and I'm loving contouring so much more.

rating 5.0. Love! This is my absolute favorite makeup brush I own! I can get some amazing contour with it. I'm a licensed cosmetologist so I was skeptical with the price being so low, but it's really a great deal. And none of the brush hairs have fallen out! Highly recommend this!

rating 2.0. Mine came defective The bristles of this brush are not cut evenly. The center has a small area where it is raised higher than the rest. Maybe I just got unlucky with a defective one, but I'm not very happy about the quality.

rating 5.0. Great brush, works well, substantial size, loaded with bristles I purchased for my daughter,24, who loves to contour and have fun with her make-up. She also enjoys trying low end and high end products and tools looking for a good price but more important to her is that they work. When I saw this online and read the reviews I bought as a gift. Last year I gave her an expensive contour kit , which she uses daily, so she tried this flat contour brush with that palette. She said it works great for contouring cheeks, forehead and neck area and the brush holds the product well. After feeling the brush for myself- it is extremely soft and filled with short bristles- and seeing the results on her skin I ordered 3 more. One for my daughter in law, myself and an extra in case I need to give a gift!
While looking on Amazon and comparing products, prices and reviews, I noticed many of the same brushes, this one, with different prices- some were 5.99, some were 1.99 + 3.98 shipping... so be aware for higher prices for same product.

rating 4.0. I had to give it 4 stars because the smell ... I had to give it 4 stars because the smell of the brush when I first received it was awful.  I went ahead and washed it and let it air dry and smell went away.  I use it to put on my foundation and goes on smooth.  In addition, i have used it to with my pressed powder foundation.

input: rating 5.0. Works great on my semi-wavy hair much easier than a flat iron! Heats up fast, has the controls on the side of the iron- it can get really hot so be sure to use heat sheild spray on your hair and start off with a lower heat setting- Brushing your hair to straighten it is so much easier than using a flat iron, especially for quick styling.  Very happy with this product.
rating 5.0. Heats up quickly and works great. Bought this to use on my beard and it works great! Heats up fast and straightens with ease.

rating 4.0. Tames wild morning hair I bought this with my young daughter in mind. She has semi curly hair but it mostly just looks like a mess. Every morning her hair is a complete disaster!!! This brush has really come in handy for her. If she just uses it to brush her hair out it seems to smooth it out, not perfectly but it takes her hair and makes it more manageable for me to do what she wants me to do with it. I love how you can see the temperature so she can make sure it’s not too hot. It’s simple to use, not too big. Great product.
rating 5.0. Works great on long hair So I definitely think that this is a good product, I did find that it straightened the back of my hair really well without leaving any weird spots or flat spots.

rating 4.0. Does the job I always had curly hair  so I needed to straighten my hair or blow dry it frequently to keep it straight. I used to just blow dry my hair for most of the time, and I was annoyed about doing it everyday so I tried it find something convenient to use and I came across this online. I just received this a couple of days ago and tried it on yesterday for the first time. It completely straightened my hair and kept it that way for the first 2 hours, but after a while it kind of started slowly going back to its natural stage. My hair didn't completely go back to its natural stage but it stayed in between straight and curly for most of the day yesterday.
rating 3.0. Doesn’t get as hot as expected The heat transformation isn’t hot as expected.
rating 1.0. DOES NOT WORK! My hair straightener brush doesn’t turn on at all, have tried it multiple times and it doesn’t turn on. :( not worth it, will return it

rating 4.0. Daughter likes it, yet only displays in Celsius My daughter says that she uses this on the highest setting which is 230 degrees Celsius . We are a Fahrenheit Family so I told her that that is 446 degrees Fahrenheit (our language and understanding). As far as my understanding, there is no way to adjust to Fahrenheit on the display.

She had long semi thick hair that tangles. She thinks that it is a time saver for everyday use. As it heats up in a minute of so and because it detangles and straightens at the same time. She sometimes follows it up with a hot iron when she is looking for that extra flat and straight look.

I like how there is an auto-shut off, yet I tell her to turn off after every use just to play it safe.

rating 3.0. Not bad I got this as a gift for my wife to use in place of her flat iron hair straightener.  She has used it a couple of times so far and says that it works well.  The brush does add volume to the hair as opposed to the volume that is lost when using a flat iron to straighten the hair.  It seems to take a little bit longer than the flat iron and might just not get as hot as the flat iron does.  She has also liked the natural feeling of brushing as opposed to clamping down with the flat iron, but she can get closer to the scalp with the flat iron than she can with the brush.  So it seems that she has started with the brush, but then finished flattening her hair with the flat iron.  My wife also has very thick hair and this might not be a problem for someone with thinner hair.  It does seem to do the job, but I think she just prefers the flat iron instead.  I am hoping that she can get used to it and see if it improves over time.  Maybe it is a technique that needs to be learned?  Either way, she was not too impressed with it, but didn't hate it either.
rating 2.0. Not the best unfortunately Does not hear that well and takes a while for me do actually finish my hair.
rating 5.0. Works well Work well and very easy.
rating 5.0. Just what I need This is just what I needed for my natural hair. Makes it much easier to manage after I wash my hair.
rating 5.0. Works great Omg I couldn't believe how great it worked

rating 4.0. Great for a quick hair straightening This is my first hair straightening brush and I find it as a really clever invention.
Most of the time, I just want to look put together every morning before work but no time to properly straighten my hair.
I have natural long thick black hair and most part of my hair is pretty straight but towards the ends and tips are where waviness start.
It has a digital screen that shows the temperature.
A power button and up/down button on the side to adjust the temperature.
230F was the max temperature and it takes about 6 minutes to heat up to that temperature.
It's okay to start using it before it gets to the max temperature.
The cord is about 5 feet long.
rating 5.0. Best present ever Bought as a gift and my sister in law swears by it and loves it!

rating 3.0. Brush does what it’s supposed to do I was hesitant to get this brush but took a chance since many of the reviews were positive. It’s sturdy. Has a long chord. It heats up pretty fast. Not too crazy with the buttons. They tend to be too sensitive to the touch. At times by mistake I turn it off as I am combing my hair. At first the plastic coating/rubber on the brush smells a bit and I did smell it on my hair. I have left it out of the box to air out and it gets better. I love how it straightens my hair and I’m able to keep my hair straighter for up to two days without washing. It does tend to pull your hair off in the process so I would take it easy. Overall so far I’m happy with it.
rating 5.0. Love it! Great and easy to use!

rating 3.0. It’s okay... I have long, semi wavy hair that gets poofy after brushing. Bought this on a whim to see how it worked compared to my flatirons. It takes a while to heat up and doesn’t go as hot as I wish it did. It does straighten after many brush throughs and it adds a little volume.

I think I will end up giving it to my teenage daughter whose hair is shorter & tamer than mine.
rating 1.0. Doesn’t work well This product did not straighten my hair at all, it left my hair wavy and fluffy. I don’t think it got hot enough to actually straighten it.
rating 1.0. Waste of money Horrible product it didn’t straighten my hair as described .....took forever to heat up .....very disappointed I returned a product immediately
rating 2.0. Didn’t like it Didn’t really care for it and it burned my fingers.  I am a satisfied customer.  Will be receiving a refund for the product

rating 1.0. Extremely poor design. Junk Poor product design. There is no indicator light or other mechanism to know if the unit is on or how hot it is even though there are +\- buttons. The power button and plus/minus are right where you place your hand so hitting any or all of them occur just by picking it up. I selected the power button and waited...brushed my hair with it...and nothing. Pushed the button again and repeated...still nothing. Junk.

rating 2.0. Usable with design flaw This does straighten hair nicely, but with one major design flaw. The buttons are on the side of handle where your fingers land, so as your brushing your hair you are constantly turning it off unintentionally! It’s annoying! Why not put the buttons on the underside like most hair products? Also it doesn’t look good with a layered cut. You would need to use a curling iron after straightening.
rating 1.0. Not impressed. Doesn’t work. Daughter has fine hair and a slight wave in it. Doesn’t work straightening at all.

rating 1.0. Wasted muy money! The temperature control buttons are located in the brush handle, dificulting to manage it.  The brush turn off frequently when accidentally my hand touch the buttons when brushing my hair. Very dissaponted with product. Not recomend it.
rating 3.0. Not the best.. Does not work all that well. The bristles are too thick which makes it hard to comb your hair and get in there.

rating 4.0. Great Quality Brush for Cheap I'm amazed that for $18 I got this stylish brush that works great! I have naturally curly hair. I washed it the night before and let it dry some and two-strand twisted it. My hair was still a little damp the next day when I used the brush. It took me 1/2 the time to straighten my hair with this brush than it would've with me blow drying. The only downside is it doesn't get to the roots. It probably would work even better for people with naturally straight hair. Still love it and will add it as a permanent  part of my at-home straightening process.
rating 1.0. Review Waste of money, doesn’t do anything.

rating 3.0. It's ok at best I have shoulder length very very fine spiral curly hair. I tried this on dry, slept in hair, that I threw in a bun for hours, so most of the curls were worn out before I started. My hair is very easy to straighten with a straightener. Usually takes me about 20 minutes to straighten. I found this was easy to figure out, didn't even need to search the box for instructions. I set it for about 200c but as I was using it my fingers kept hitting the temp and power buttons so by the time I finished the temp was as high as it goes. It did straighten my hair, kind of. It left it fluffy and static. Overall, good for a quick brush through to make my slept in hair presentable instead of putting it in a bun. Honestly I would not buy again though. It took the same amount of time to do my hair as a straightener but my hair would look better if I used the straightener. I actually used the straightener afterward because you can't get the brush near the roots.

Pros:
-Shipped very quickly. Took 2 days from ordering to doorstep
-Heats up quickly
-Easy to use right out of the box

Cons:
-Hard to get hair straight close to the head
-Makes hair very static and fluffy
-Burnt my finger on brush while using it, so be careful of letting children use it
-Temps in Celsius
-When using it you tend to accidentally push the buttons a lot.
-Packaging leave something to be desired. Nothing is actually sealed, so I'm hopping it was actually new. It was haphazardly thrown in a yellow envelop to ship. The envelop was half open when I got it. The box inside the envelop slides open, no tape or anything sealing it shut.
rating 1.0. Sent a used item I just opened the box and notice there are strands of hair in the brush!!!! Picture shows the hairs.
rating 1.0. Don’t purchase Does Not straighten hair very well. To me it didn’t get very hot. Not worth getting.

input: rating 5.0. Love! I absolutely love this makeup sponge. It really is as amazing as everyone says it is. It doesn't absorb makeup like a sponge or a brush does. And it's super simple to clean all you do is rinse it off with warm water. It takes some getting used to though to learn how to blend with it so it's not streaky but once you get the hang of it, it looks flawless! ❤

rating 1.0. It does not blend easily and it has rough edges that makes it uncomfortable ... This product is absolutely not what I had imagined.  It does not blend easily and it has rough edges that makes it uncomfortable to use on your face, particularly the eye area.  Not a fan of this product.

rating 4.0. Really Interesting Product I've been a makeup artist for over 30 years and have always been a fan of a dense foam sponge. My favorite one has an antibacterial strip inside. I am honestly not sure if I am ready to ditch the sponge, but using this silicone sponge is at least an interesting adventure. It's squishy and yet dense and when using, the makeup just slides almost like magic. The makeup finish is smooth and there is no residue left on the sponge to speak of. It all stays on the face. If I didn't want to use this as a makeup sponge, I'd be using it as a stress reliever!! It's so cool to squish and squash!
rating 4.0. Love it! I love it! It's so much better than a brush or sponge. So easy to clean as well!

rating 5.0. Incredible Was nervous to buy it not knowing anyone who uses it, but I love it. Blends well if used correctly. My favorite part is being able to clean it and have a clean start every time.

rating 1.0. Did not like this method of application at all Did not like this method of application at all. Felt like using a spatula to put on makeup. Difficult to even out coverage. After 5 minutes it was in the trash.

rating 1.0. False Advertising Claims to be Silisponge. Do not let this fool you like it did me. This is not the original Silisponge. I'm not sure how this company has gotten away with using this name since it is not their product. However, this is a silicone beauty sponge.  Much smaller than I thought it would be.
rating 1.0. Smelly So it came in the mall had rough edges smelled really bad and didn't really blend anything. Have better luck with my fingers.

rating 1.0. Booooooo. Me no likey. The product is deserving of zero stars. Unfortunately that's not an option. This is not a ponge, its a plastic blob. All it does is smear foundation around your face. It does not blend cream foundations, or smooth it. It only smears cream foundations around your face. Looks horrible. No thanks, going back to sponges.

Follow up- Someone asked if this would work with powdered foundations....first of all that's a dumb question...this thing is plastic. Second- no, this product won't work with powdered foundations either. This went into the trash after owning it for a mere 5 minutes.

rating 1.0. Not a good product. The makeup goes on like a putty ... Not a good product.  The makeup goes on like a putty knife and does not blend in at ALL using the "sponge"  My face was covered in uneven streaks even after trying to blend for more than 3 minutes.  I would not recommend this product at all. Back to basic sponges and brushes for me.
rating 2.0. Two Stars It just smears the makeup around, doesn't blend it.

rating 2.0. I'm sticking with my regular beauty blending sponge You end up applying more foundation and caking foundation on. It doesnt at all blend as well as a sponge. I ended up using a sponge because I was actually saving foundation because I wasn't needing to use as much. A regular beauty blender works best in my opinion.

rating 2.0. Not for me, but it was fun to try! I wanted to love this, but I can't. It may be because I am a makeup novice, but I do not like how the sponge blends...or lack thereof. Even though I barely had to use any product on the sponge, it took nearly 10-12 minutes to apply one layer of foundation evenly.
rating 1.0. One Star Save your money. Not worth it. Back to sponges for me.
rating 2.0. Not worth the hype This doesn't really work to blend out makeup. I now just use it to spread foundation onto the skin and then use a beauty blender or real techniques sponge from there

current_product_reviews: rating 3.0. Not great... I really wish I didn't fall for every beauty gimmick that appears and I should have skipped this one!  While the product itself is well made, it just doesn't deliver a flawless application like a sponge or brush.  Seems to just smear the foundation and leaves it looking streaky...I end up having to blend with a sponge anyway.  Seemed to work a bit better for concealer on my skin.  This is definitely not a replacement for your favorite sponge blender or foundation brush.  The only real pro is that it's very easy to clean...otherwise it  just makes a mess of foundation application.

input:
rating 5.0. Perfect! I bought this clips to lessen the task of washing and detangling
my extremely curly-kinky hair. It's made a big difference than using hair ties
and stays in place--even at the most awkward angles! It's been perfect so far!
rating 2.0. Very cheap, but ok Crappy. Don't really hold anything. Super cheap. But I still use them.
rating 2.0. Just okay. I had hoped for a little higher quality item.  They are just okay.  Useful, but not as nice as the salon clips.

rating 3.0. ... opened the packaging so that doesn't make me feel good about how long the rest will last Haven't used them yet but one was already broken when I opened the packaging so that doesn't make me feel good about how long the rest will last. They don't feel very sturdy and I have thick (4C) hair. They look wide enough to do the job of sectioning off hair just fine though.
rating 1.0. Not good. Got the completely wrong product sooooo. Not good.

rating 5.0. Cute and practical way to get hair out of your way. These work great for getting your hair out of the way, for whatever reason you have to want it out of the way.

In my case, I have sensitive skin that can get itchy if my hair touches my neck or back, so I use these at home to keep my hair off those areas, especially in the summer when I'm wearing skimpier tops. It's also great for keeping my hair out of the way when I have to do cooking or housework. It's a lot faster to glob my hair on my head and clamp it down with a couple of these than it is to monkey with a pony tail holder or barrettes or whatever.

Bonus: The colors in this set (blue, light blue, purple) are some of my favorites, so they're not only useful, but also cute to look at.
rating 1.0. One Star They are very thin and break easily. Do not waste your money.

rating 3.0. Three stars I bought these to help my hair stay up while straightening it. My hair is very curly and pretty thick. I’d say these are useable BUT not the greatest for my hair. So I wouldn’t recommend for hair types like mine but they are good clips!

rating 5.0. YOU NEED THESE IN YOUR LIFE Great clips, although the ones I received were in a much different color scheme than the ones pictured. Mine are translucent pastel colors (some light gray and white). Didn't really care either way, however. These are so much better than traditional jawclips in terms of getting a grab on your hair. These clips are intended for hair-styling purposes more so than using IN a hairstyle if you get what I mean. I probably wouldn't wear one out-and-about but I do use them for sectioning off my hair when I'm blow-drying, curling, or straightening it. Also nice for using to get hair away from face while applying makeup or washing your face. The "grip" power these have on your hair is like nothing I've ever had in a hair clip. The word "clamp" in the product title is accurate. These do not budge  or shift, even in straight hair. They really lock your hair in, I think the triangular nature of the teeth on the clips has something to do with that. Very versatile clips that I will most definitely get a lot of use out of, and priced well for the amount you get.
rating 2.0. Snag hair These hold, but they also snag my hair (the metal springs catch the hair). I will be repurposing these as kitchen bag closures.
rating 1.0. One Star Useless for long hair. Might be fine in a youngsters hair?

rating 5.0. ... thick curly hair and this clamps my hair quite nicely when I wash and/or style it I have thick curly hair and this clamps my hair quite nicely when I wash and/or style it. I used metal clips for a long time and I like that these are plastic so they won't rust...a generous amount for a low price. Love them.
rating 1.0. I wish I could return this, but it is ... I wish I could return this, but it is not strong enough for my hair. I just got the more stronger ones from Sally's

rating 4.0. Reasonably Priced Clips I didn't like the weird clicking sound when clipping my wet hair so I can put conditioner onto my hair.
Although the clips easily open for me since my hands are slightly arthritic.
Recent note: I slept with them on with minimal discomfort!! 💜💜💜👄👄
rating 2.0. Four of them were broken by the time they got ... Four of them were broken by the time they got to me. Cheaply made but the ones that made it are okay.
rating 2.0. You get what you pay for. The quality isn't that great but its expected because of the price.

rating 4.0. Soft 'N Style Butterfly Clamps These clips are too small to hold up an entire head of hair, however, I bought them for blowing drying my hair where only small sections need held at a time.

rating 3.0. I have thick hair that is a couple inches past ... I have thick hair that is a couple inches past my shoulders. These clips don't do much for my hair at all, they can only hold a little at a time and are slippery. I keep them around just for coloring my hair.
rating 1.0. Not what I expected! My hair is too thick they can't hold my hair

rating 5.0. Go-to tools for natural hair? I'm a bargain shopper, I was looking for a decent amount of clips for a reasonable price. I have 3 natural curly heads of hair that use these, so far they have survived regular use. The fact that they are cute and a nice variety of colors is a bonus.

rating 1.0. These should cost a dollar... These are cheaply made. They hold but they don't open up that wide and the plastic is thin. The edges are sharp enough to cut your hands if it slips or if you're just trying to grab it.

rating 5.0. These last forever!  I still have ones I bought years ago.  I have long thick hair, they hold great.  Love them! I have been looking for these for years.  I still have a few of the ones I bought years and years ago, but haven't been able to find them.  I just figured they were a relic of the past, and then I stumbled across them on Amazon.  I keep one in the shower, so after conditioning I can put my hair up while the conditioner does its thing.  I keep a few with my other hair products, in case I want to clip it in place till the gel or whatever product of the moment kicks in.  I keep a couple around for working out, to get my hair out of the way.  I keep a couple by my bedside, in case it's a warm night and I want it up.  These are so incredibly handy.  I love them, they work great.  The only way I've had them break is if someone steps on them!  They won't just crack or snap or anything.  I bought two packs of them, so that should last me a lifetime!
rating 1.0. One Star These are pretty cheap quality. They get the job done, but, they are not the best.

rating 4.0. Butterfly Clamps 1 dozen,  Size Large 3"  Assorted Colors The clips are nice and no doubt will be totally useful because who doesn't use clips.  The colors listed are lighter than they really are, but still pretty.  The lighter purple ones are darker like the top ones and the blue ones are more navy.  Other than the slight difference in color, I'm fine with them.  I have had these clips in the past and they have held up well, just wanted to have more on hand. rating 5.0. Amazing for Curly Hair I've found this spray mist bottle to be extremely helpful in evenly moisturizing my insanely thick, curly hair.  Those of y'all who also have untamable curls are probably familiar with the struggle of trying to moisten your hair with a normal spray bottle, only to end up with some sections soaked and some barely damp.  This mister is indeed a life saver.  Never again will you suffer with clumpy wet hair!  I have always mixed a few squirts of conditioner with tap water (no precise measurement) in order to help detangle my hair in the morning before I put it up for the day.

rating 5.0. Love this mister!!! I have never owned a mister/spray bottle and this thing is amazing. Super small water droplets get into hair strands better without getting it super wet. Much easier to manage curly/frizzy hair after a few quick sprays! You won’t regret getting this!!

rating 5.0. Great for curly hair I love this spritzer for my curly hairstyle. I was using an ordinary spray bottle which resulted in hair that was more frizzy than curly. This one creates a fine mist that spreads evenly throughout the hair and results in a more uniform curl (and less frizz). After using it for a few days I noticed that the water took on a mildewy smell, but since I've switched to distilled water, I don't have to replace the water daily anymore.

rating 5.0. You still pump to spray but great product. Fits what I needed This is exactly what I needed. I have a chameleon and I bought the push down from the top to pump type of continuous sprayer and it absolutely soaks everything down to a ridiculous degree. With this it's much finer mist, something my chameleon likes better. It doesn't freak him out like the other type and he quickly heads to his spot to get misted down.

One gripe I could have was I was wondering how this product works if you don't continually pump it. How could a non-powered sprayer continually spray off of one pump?.. Well you do still pump it.... It's less difficult than your typical pump sprayer absolutely, but you still pump each time to spray. Each pump though will spray for a short period of time before cutting off, maybe half a second to a second after fully depressing the handle if you pressed in one fluid motion.

I like it. I actually ordered this first and cancelled once I'd gone to the store and found the other sprayer I've mentioned. Now I wish I would've just stuck with this instead of wasting my money and having to order it again

rating 4.0. Works as described I received the Hair Spray Bottle in expected time. I questioned the suggestion in the description that the bottle created a "continuous" spray. But I do like the fine mist that it provides when I want to refresh my hair after sleeping on it. My hairdresser had the same bottle but taller and she explained that you had to pump it before you spray to make a "continuous spray." The word continuous may be misleading but in the taller bottle, it was a longer spray.  What is important is that it creates a fine mist that refreshes your hair rather than soaks it down. I love the fine mist it creates as opposed to the usual spritz from a regular spray bottle.

There's nothing wrong with it - I just happen to like liner with an extremely flexible tip. This liner is definitely felt tip and not brush tip, as I am more comfortable with. The liner itself is a nice dark black, and lasts well but isn't anything mindblowing.

rating 3.0. Fine for Special Occasions Overall, this works okay. I cannot do winged eyeliner for the life of me, so this pen was very appealing. I liked that it had eyeliner on the other end, so the two colors/sheens of the eyeliner and stamp are uniform. I did have to try the stamp a few times, as my eyes are big and every now and then, the stamp did not get my whole eye (so there were spaces it did not get to). I'd recommend stamping it with your eye closed. You also have to practice so both sides are at the right angle. I thought the end of the eyeliner brush was pretty thick (making the line more dramatic than usual) but it easily glided on and was very easy to apply. The stamp also was fairly light at times, so I had to go over it again (but it was helpful to have an outline). It looks nice overall and will be good to use during fancier events where I want my eyeliner to be more dramatic. Still helpful overall and makes the winged look more attainable, just not ideal for my everyday look.

rating 5.0. 100% Recommend! I'm not going to lie, I purchased my back scrubber in June...and I am STILL shocked by the quality of this back scrubber! When I first received it, I wasn't sure what to expect from something that looked so simplistic, although the quality stitching and material of this scrubber was quite different from what I've seen before. The fabric of the scrubber is slightly cushioned, and much like a crushed satin texture. After trying it out in the shower (for over month now), I'm excited to say that its raised my standards in bath accessories. It exfoliates AMAZINGLY and without any irritating scratchiness for my delicate skin! The best part of all is the ease and range of motion. Since I have shoulders issues AND I've got a wide body frame, Ive always needed something that had the reach without unnecessary length. I finally found it.
I honestly couldn't be any happier with this back scrubber.

rating 5.0. Great Scrubber I had always had difficulty reaching parts of my back, and I decided to buy this a try. You can totally FEEL the difference after using it! It's soft and easy to use. And the last but not the least this Scrubber comes in a very nice package.

rating 5.0. Reach all angles My wife always wanted one of these and I never could understand why! Until I tried it myself. The natural color matches my bathroom and after I clean it and hang it to dry it actually dries pretty fast. A great buy for those who want to create a nice spa feel to their shower collection.

input:
rating 5.0. My New Favorite! I LOVE this curling iron/straightener!

Pros:
It is very solid and well made, and the color is nice too, lol.
There are 3 heat settings, easily accessed by just pressing one of 3 buttons, so you don't have to fry your hair.
The tip has silicone coated grips so you don't burn your fingers.
Since it is ceramic, it makes your hair very shiny after use. You can see the difference between processed/unprocessed sections.
Curling brush and straightener in one - Genius!
Very easy to switch between brush and straightener.

Cons:
none

rating 5.0. 2-in-one love! One less hair tool in my drawer to worry about now. I love this hair straightener / curling iron. I have been able to use this instead of having one of each. All I need is a blow dryer and this! I have been learning new ways to use the straightener since it has a brush on the back too. Lots of possibilities with this. I'm really glad I tried it. The straightener and curling iron both get very hot which is a great thing for stubborn, wavy hair like mine. The top has a nice cool area that stays cool for your to hold on to for styling. Nice weight, but not too heavy.

rating 5.0. In time for Christmas This was a present, they loved it

rating 5.0. Great for short fine hair. I purchased this styling to replace the $100 Perfector I had for about 9 years. The spikes/bristles were falling out. I did not use it daily and usually only a couple of times a week. I received the Olaxer yesterday and used it today (day 2 is a bedhead day). First, I definitely like the price. Secondly, I like the 3 temperature settings and that it heats quickly. I have a chin length bob and very fine hair. I was not looking for curl but volume and smooth shine. It meets all my expectations. I would definitely buy it again and highly recommend it. Hope this is helpful.

It's a good concept but it just doesn't work well. Plus no styling tips or anything. Guess this is going back :(

rating 5.0. I am reviewing BOTH the curling iron and the 2-in-1 straightening iron/brush REVIEW FOR THE CURLING IRON:  The curling iron is THE BEST ever. It gives my hair the most amazing curls. You can brush out your hair countless times and the curls will remain for 3 days (without hairspray). It is such a great iron, way better than very expensive irons I've owned! Don't let the inexpensive price fool you- this is a GREAT iron! I don't know how I lived without this iron! My hair has the most incredible volume and body after I use this iron. It makes my hair look so THICK, shiny, and bouncy. The small clip is genius, it makes the iron so much easier to use than a clipless wand. You can make such a variety of curls too depending on how and where you wrap the curls around the iron. My hair is long, so some curls I will start at the ends of my hair and some curls I will start at the root of my hair (the shaft of the iron is a little short, so you need to wrap hair tightly in order to fit long hair strands). I love that the temperature locks too (so many irons I've used in the past, I end up hitting the buttons accidentally and I shut off the iron). I recommend this iron to everyone who compliments my hair. Giving this iron a very enthusiastic 5 stars!!

REVIEW FOR THE 2-IN-1 STRAIGHTENER/ BRUSH:

I liked the ceramic hair straightener/ hot brush, but it seemed defective because it made a loud electrical buzzing sound while turned on. Wanted a replacement iron, but I didn't see that option, so I returned the iron. Customer service was super fast, responsive, and excellent. Giving the iron 3 stars, but I am tempted to order another one and see if I have better luck because I absolutely love the other curling iron.

rating 5.0. GREAT SHAMPOO When I first saw this product on Amazon, I was wary of all of it's good reviews. I have long hair that is prone to dryness and breakage, and have tried just about every shampoo and conditioner on the market to improve hair health. I am pleasantly surprised that this shampoo lives up to it's claims.

I want everyone to understand that this is, in fact, a shampoo; it is NOT a cleansing conditioner. In my opinion, that is a plus, as it's important to cleanse your scalp and hair follicles without adding buildup that a "cleansing conditioner" often imparts. This shampoo is sulfate-free and gives a mild lather. I feel like it cleans my scalp and hair sufficiently, without stripping. I color-treat my hair, and this shampoo has never stripped or lightened my color.

As far as moisture is concerned, this adds hydration without weighing my hair down. Yet, it is NOT drying to my hair as so many shampoos are. I have long, fine hair, so that's a significant point. If you read the ingredient list, you will see that this product contains many natural oils and humectants. Given that, I am continually surprised that it doesn't weight my hair down.

After use, my wet hair feels smooth and sleek, but I still need to follow with a conditioner for detangling. Again, this is a shampoo; it is not a cleansing conditioner. Since there is no matching Pure Body Naturals daily conditioner for this shampoo, I have been experimenting with some other argan oil conditioners sold here on Amazon.

No matter your hair type, I think this shampoo can add to your hair health. I highly recommend trying it.

I used it on my brown medium length pretty thick hair, (my hair is usually straight not a problem and dries nice ) and I used it and it doesn't lather, which is fine I like that it has no sulfates but I also used naturals argan conditioner from another brand. So I used both together and my hair felt good . It felt FINE it looked normal and not anything better then my sulfate free loreal moisturizing shampoo for $5. So I had the same result, I recommend everyone get that. This is a hype "luxury" product because yes it has pros and it made my hair feel good but it's not worth $15 and definitely nothing was luxurious about it expect the price. My sulfate free loreal deep moisturizing shampoo and conditioner even feels a little better then using this , for 1/3 of the cost. So yes it works and feels good but MOSTLY HYPE AND OVERPRICED

rating 1.0. If it seems too good to be true, it probably is Lesson learned with this product. Too many 5 star reviews (1000's) should have been a clue.  I really hoped for the best with this product.  I have dry chemically processed hair that looks & feels healthy IF I use quality products. After my hair dried it looked and felt like--STRAW.  Not a happy customer.

rating 5.0. Such an amazing and gentle shampoo I think at last this is my Holy Grail! Having finally understood 8 years ago that regular shampoos were poison to my head, and first trying Wen, which was ok but expensive, then various non SLS shampoos, also just OK, and finally this which is truly in a class by itself- if you read the ingredients.
Very nice stuff, and so super gentle. The smell is pleasant and mild, does not smell like cheap perfume. My only complaint is that the product is very thick and the pump does not work.
I have used this now several times, every other day for the last 2 weeks and my hair is definitely improved. You could certainly use it every day if you so desired. I don't think conditioner adds anything to this, so I probably will use up the conditioner around my house and not re-purchase. This product makes a good 2 in one, for those who like to simplify their routine and de-clutter the bathroom. It is a little expensive, but much less expensive than many other products .You can save money by not washing your hair every day as you probably don't need to, unless you work a very dirty job. I used a quarter size dollop for my very thick, shoulder length hair, but you could probably use less. A bottle should last a couple of months or more.
It was the list of ingredients that truly sold me. This has a very gentle cleaner in it and Wen does not. I have suffered with bushy and coarse hair my entire life and this has actually helped. That being said, I have also been gradually shortening and layering my hair to accommodate its' natural flow.

rating 1.0. I saw the high star rating for this product and assumed the best. There are many chemical ingredients in this product ... "Naturals" is deceiving.  I search amazon for a natural shampoo.  I saw the high star rating for this product and assumed the best.  There are many chemical ingredients in this product that make it far from natural with a smell that is not suitable for bathing in essential oils.

rating 5.0. Protects my RED hair. Stopped the color stripping from my old shampoo. This stuff is wonderful. I am in a place in my life that I am removing ALL chemicals from our household. There are so many bad things for you in Makeup and Hair products - endocrine disrupters and such. I had done everything from Baking soda and ACV - and I was trying my hardest to get to a water wash only place in my hair care. However, I have been having to combat the fact that a year and a half ago I decided to perm my hair. It was AWEFUL. 2 months later, I bought a home perm and combed it through my hair to reverse the fried frizziness. Needless to say, my hair hasn't been the same since. It grows slowly, so I have major issues with split ends (sometimes a strand is split in 5 places and when I brush my dry hair, I have tiny pieces breaking off everywhere.) I also have VERY fine hair so using anything reparative makes it flat and heavy - and who wants that?! Anyway, I was doing ok with a Dr. Bronners soap (which I really loved) but I recently colored my hair red and the Bronners was stripping the color. After reading a ton of reviews on this product, I bought it and LOVE it.

I was hoping that I wouldnt have to use a conditioner, but if you dont, then you HAVE to wait till your hair is dry to brush it as to not damage it while wet. But I can tell you that THIS Argan Oil shampoo keeps my color fresh AND smooths the shaft to make it soft without weighing it down. I have yet to find something to repair my split ends - but I have only used this 3x now - so we'll see.

rating 2.0. Not impressed. My hair type: naturally curly. Medium thickness/density. Medium/long length. Very fluffy i use no hair products. I usually blow dry it straight after a wash and it lasts for several days before I need to wash it again.

PROS:
- Smells nice. Smells like the essential oils. It's very subtle, not perfumey at all, and really I can't even smell it after my hair is dry.
- Gentle. It does not irritate my scalp
- Cleared up my dandruff/scalp rash from my previous shampoo that irritated my scalp and I was always itchy.
- Cleans well. Some natural shampoos don't seem to remove all natural oils or hair products, but this one does.
- Even without conditioner, I can get a comb through my hair. Not something I can say about most shampoos.

CONS:
- Still need conditioner. I thought with all the oils are nourishing that I wouldn't need a conditioner, but I do.
- My hair gets oily faster. When using this, I need to wash my hair more often. I used to get 4 days out of wash and now I barely get two since switching to this.
- My hair is extremely static-y! It doesn't matter how much conditioner, leave-ins or serums I apply, I cannot get the static to go away. I didn't have this problem before this shampoo.
- Price. It doesn't do anything for me that I can't get from a cheaper shampoo.

OVERALL: The fact that may hair gets greasy fast and and that it's so static-y tells me my hair is too dry. I need a moisturizing shampoo. When my hair/scalp is properly moisturized, it doesn't get greasy and I don't get flyaways. I thought this was a moisturizing shampoo with all the oils in it, but I guess they all just get rinsed away, and then some. I will not buy this again because I cannot stand static-y hair.

input:
rating 5.0. Good value if you’re not too picky about make-up brushes Look...you can’t buy a set of 32 brushes for $7 and expect to receive a super high-end product. However, these brushes are perfectly usable. The bristles on some of the brushes remind a little bit of what you find with craft brushes, but they are soft and fairly dense and they do a decent job.
I bought this set for my daughter because she does stage make-up for the students in her high school plays, and let’s be honest...the price is right for this type of use. There are enough brushes that she can still have plenty of clean brushes to use while someone washes the brushes she used on the previous student. She said the brushes apply product well enough that she has no complaints and they do wash up well. They haven’t lost any bristles after some very hard use and multiple washes so they get an A rating for durability. You can see from my photo that these brushes have been used a ton already, but they’re still going strong. The handles are just long enough to be comfortable to use and they feel sturdy. The handles don’t wiggle inside of the metal ferrules; they appear to be very securely attached. There is a great selection of brushes as well as duplicates of the most often used types so it’s a well-rounded set. They also come in a great roll-up case that makes them very portable and storage is a snap.
These brushes may or may not be for you. If you’re picky about your makeup brushes then you probably won’t be satisfied with these because they just don’t have as nice of an appearance as more high-end brushes and the bristles aren’t as satiny soft and smooth as more expensive brushes. You’ll need to spend a little more to find what you’re looking for if you fall in this category (not much more, though...check my reviews for other awesome sets). However, if you’re looking for a good, usable and durable set for a teenager, if you’re a makeup novice and you’re just want something to learn with, etc., these brushes work perfectly well for their intended purpose.
Overall, I recommend this brush set if you want a whole bunch of durable, usable brushes and you have reasonable expectations of the quality of the bristles based on the price of the set (in other words, don’t be expecting gold for the price of copper).

**Note - If my review has been helpful to you, click on the button below and let me know!**

rating 4.0. good for dispensing Listerine mouthwash without waste i've been searching for a solution to using my 1 litre Listerine. usually, i have to squeeze the cap and rotate to remove it. then, pour enough mouthwash into the cap and swig. the whole process of squeezing to remove the cap is bothersome along with sometimes pouring out too much.

rating 3.0. Works as described. Use taller 3 oz cups with pump. Bought the pump for my elderly mother-in-law who has difficulty lifting the larger size mouthwash bottles and opening the caps. Works fine for our needs.

Pros:
Fits Listerine Zero 1.5L bottles. Can't comment on whether it fits other brands or sizes but based on previous reviews, sounds like it doesn't fit other brands.
Makes it easier to dispense product vs. lifting and pouring out product.
Inexpensive solution - I paid $6.50 with free Prime shipping.

Cons:
Pump dispenses additional product as it releases/comes back up so be prepared for this and keep your cup beneath the spout the entire time until it has reset to the starting position.
Spout tip is angled outwards so place your cup directly underneath the tip to keep product in cup.
Pump flow is strong so definitely use a taller larger cup or you'll get splash back. I'd recommend the standard 3 oz Dixie type cups. I bought the tiny 3/4 oz paper medicine type cups thinking that would work but they're a tad too difficult to use with the pump.

rating 5.0. Amazing value! These stamps are just like or even better than konad. The designs are unique. At just under $18 this is a steal. You'd be spending six times more if you purchased twenty one stamps from konad. I find that with these image plates transfering the image to the stamp is much easier. I agree that the full nail designs are not wide enough to cover the entire nail. Nonetheless I love my new image plates and would like to see more in the future from this seller. I also feel that using an old credit or gift card works better when scraping off the excess nail polish. It is much more gentle and does not scratch the surface of the image plate as with the scraper that comes with the konad system. All in all I'd recommend this to everyone and I would repurchase if need be :)

rating 5.0. I LOVE IT! I been watching Konad nail stamping art videos forever. I was like, even if it doesn't work (which was doubtfull since most people put good reviews) I wanted to try it since it was only $17.99 for 21 IMAGE PLATES.....AHHHHHHHHHHHH!!! BUT THEY DO WORK! I thought about it too much at first, so I couldn't figure it out. But if you watch a YouTube video on it, and do just exactly what you would do for a Konad image plate (as shown on videos, I wouldn't know bc I don't own any) then you should be fine! LOVE IT!!!!!!!!!!!! SO CUTE!!!!!!!!!

rating 5.0. Great Price and Great Product! I bought this pack of image plates because the Konad plates are so expensive. I wondered if the quality would be good, if the images would be deep enough, etc. I shouldn't have worried, these are great!

BE CAREFUL THOUGH! The edges are sharp and I accidently sliced my finger while cleaning the plate. Each plate comes with a thin plastic layer over the entire plate to keep the plates from getting scratched.

The only differece between these plates and the Konad plates are A) there is no paper backing stating where the plate is from and B) the full sized nail images are a bit smaller than the Konad ones. Still, they should be big enough for most nails, as they fit my fine. Longer nails (depending on the length) won't be stamped in one stamp, as the images are only so big, however, the same can be said for the Konad plates as well.

All of the images are nice and clear. There is a nice varity to them all. I love that they include a Halloween plate and a Christmas plate, and there are lots of lovely flower and feminine designs as well.

I am SO happy I bought this BundleMoster pack! If you have any questions about this plate or how to use it, etc., you can contact me on my blog [...] (I don't want to give out my email address as I hope you can understand!)
