Pros: feels great, nice light smell, real nice non slip shave, you get to say wool fat allot. i find this pairs well with a Feather blade in my DE razor

Cons: a little expensive but should last you about six months; takes experience to get a good lather, your skin might not react well to lanolin

Ok so for the lather... when it first got this soap my fore arm was getting huge from trying to work a perfect lather. Hopefully it can save you some trial and error. You don’t need to face lather. Soak the puck and your brush in warm to hot water (hard or soft), take shower, and dump out water from soap. One shake of the brush and then work the puck gently. Now transfer the froth into a separate bowl and work it until it peaks. Should take less than two minutes. I do this with a silvertip brush no problem at all. you don’t need to be an expert barber to work a good lather.

Soak the puck, drain the puck, and play with the amount of water and soap you use until you figure it out. If it took you too long to get a perfect almost whipped cream lather, adjust your technique.

rating 5.0. THE GOLD STANDARD IN SHAVING SOAPS You rarely hear this product called by its full name. In shaving circles it's known simply as "MWF" and may be the most widely used product in shavingdom. For good reason-its primary ingredient 'tallow' is the basis of great shaving soaps worldwide. It has a nice, fresh soap smell. It treats your skin to a rich moisturizing experience like nothing else. If I try a shave soap that leaves me feeling less than fully protected, adding a few swirls of MWF assures a great shave.

rating 4.0. some soaps its fine, others are not so apparently I'm one of those people that has difficulty lathering it up correctly. I do have hard water but with a softener...some soaps its fine, others are not. i definitely have to work for this one! I've only been using it for a few days now, with an EJ DB89 and Polisilver Super iridium blades, and its a nice shave. I'll have to try it with some other blades too...I occasionally swap between Astra and Feathers as well.
Using this setup the razor does glide nicely. I'm mixed on the scent however... its soapy, which I don't mind, but tends to linger longer than I like. I do prefer it to other scents like bay rum and sandalwood... they are too 'old man'-ish for my tastes, even though they are a favorite with others. If you're used to those and not a soapy/clean scent, this might not be to your liking. Lastly, I have a feeling this puck is going to last a VERY long time! I'll give it a few more weeks before deciding if it'll have a permanent place in my rotation but so far I think its a yes.

rating 5.0. NOTHING Can Touch This!! There are shaving creams and shaving soaps ... and then, there's Mitchell's Wool Fat!

Seriously ... if you're shaving with a double edge razor and not shaving with this, you have no idea what you're missing.

Lubrication is unmatched. And lather? Well ... get a good badger hair brush (Perfector makes a nice one), watch the youtube video on how to lather Wool Fat - and you'll have no trouble building up a thick layer of lather FAST!

I use this with my Shaveology Phantom razor and I can barely even feel the razor working ... it so smooth, it's amazing. And I'm left with no razor burn whatsoever. Wool Fat is in a class of it's own.

Tip: buy the refill ... along with an apothecary shaving cup (I got one by Parker that fits it nicely) and you'll be set!

rating 5.0. Love this soap Love this soap.  I've tried at least half a dozen different soaps and creams, and this is my favorite.  Builds a nice lather with high quality ingredients.  Doesn't dry out my skin.  Love it.

rating 5.0. What a product! Mitchell's wool fat shaving soaps have been around for a long time, and it's easy to see why. This review is based on results using a safety razor. Soaking the puck for 10 minutes prior to shaving, then loading the brush upside down and face lathering seems to work the best with this soap. Lathering correctly with MWF soap causes the blade to effortlessly glide across the face, minimizing irritation. This also leaves the face feeling soft and healthy after the shave. I rarely use anything other than a moisturizer after shaving. Wonderful product!

rating 4.0. 4.5 Stars - Above Average Performance After hearing many times of "the fat" I decided to buy my own puck of Mitchell's and see what the fuss was about. It turned out to be a really great soap though not my favorite.

Lather:
Doesn't bloom into a full lather avalanche like TOBS does for me but isn't too thin either. Certainly adequate.

Face Protection:
On the slick side, good blade glide. Just for face protection alone this is a great product.

Cost:
A little on the high side. Razorock has similar soaps available for a third less. I'm not sure that they preform to exactly the same level but since I own some I will be putting this to the test. Not super extravagant though.

Scent:
This is where Mitchell's really loses me. I like strong scents with my shave. TOBS Mr. Taylor is great for a classic yet clean scent that sticks with you. Mitchell's smells like a bar of Ivory Soap. Clean for sure, but nothing to get excited about.

Overall:
I wish I could give Mitchell's 4.5 stars. It will give you a great shave. The price isn't that bad and the lack of strong scent may actually be preferable to some people. If you haven't tried it I suggest giving it a go.

rating 5.0. Better and Longer Lasting Than Shaving Gel or Foam Been using this shaving soap with my double edge safety razor for years. rating 5.0. It's the only shave soap I use and the only soap I will ever use. I've tried 3 different Barrister and Mann soaps, Haslinger's Ewe's Milk, Imperial Barber, TOBS, Pre de Provence, Phoenix Artisan soaps, and many more. The main thing I'm looking for in a shave soap is protection from the razor blade. I have a very tough beard and without that cushion and glide I end up with a very uncomfortable shave and the occasional nick. I like the aroma, it's very mild. But that's not my main concern.

As for the lathering, I put some warm water on top of the puck and let it sit for a few minutes. I then pour that water out into my hand and rub it on my face. The water is slick. Then I lather up with no problem. I do have hard well water, but we have a softener.

The post shave feel of your skin is just incredible.

There's a reason why this soap has been around for over 100 years. No soap I've ever tried compares to cushion and glide I experience from MWF. It lasts forever by the way so you end up paying just pennies per shave. Can't recommend it highly enough.

rating 5.0. Awesome lather This stuff is AWESOME.  I've tried a few other shaving soaps from various online shaving shops, with mixed success. rating 5.0. A must-have for any wet shaver! Right out of the gate, Mitchell's Wool Fat is an amazing shaving soap!  It lathers up well (not any trickier than other tallow-based soaps), clean/mild scent (a classic Ivory/bar soap type smell), protective & very slick!  The slickness is definitely one of my favorite attributes of MWF.  Tallow soaps are generally known for their glide, but the addition of the lanolin in Mitchell's takes it to another level.  The post-shave feel with this soap is hands down the best I've experienced.  Some of my other products are certainly going to sit around now that MWF is in the picture.  Do yourself a favor & add this to your wet shaving stash asap; you won't be disappointed!

rating 3.0. Probably won't buy again. It's ok, but doesn't obviously stand out above less expensive soaps I've used. I don't mind spending more for a superior product, but I find this soap to be average.

rating 5.0. THE Standard in premium shaving I've tried at least a dozen shave soaps, maybe two dozen. MWF is my go-to, standard. I leave it in a shave bowl in a drawer. I rinse my brush and then swirl the dripping wet brush on top of the soap. In about 20 seconds, you have phenomenal lather. Wet and repeat for more water if needed. Lather around your face further as needed. I often do this, then take a shower and repeat the lathering when I get out of the shower, and then shave.

I have found a few artisan soaps that lather as good, but none better. Those artisan soaps often come in a variety of delightful fragrances, but I don't care that much about fragrance. MWF doesn't have much of any fragrance. In fact after having wet it and let it dry a few dozen times, there is no discernible scent of any kind. If you like the smell of MWF (or any other shave soap), keep it in a covered container between uses. I'd suggest for those who like fragrance in their shave soap to just put MWF in a covered container and sprinkle in a little of their favorite cologne a few times and keep it covered and you'll have a $40 artisanal shave soap!

I like the ingredients. It's tallow based which I prefer. There's lanolin in it which I like. Although it's not a glycerin based soap, there is a little glycerin in the ingredients - it doesn't seem to be a large amount, so if you really like glycerin, get some vegetable glycerin on Amazon and sprinkle it on top of the soap or add it to your pre-shave. It doesn't have shea butter in it, so I sometimes keep an open puck of shea butter shave soap in a shave dish next to MWF and occasionally reach down with my brush and lather from both.

I've seen some reviews that say that it doesn't lather all that well in "hard" water. We have moderately hard water in my city and I've never had trouble at all.

Finally, it's cheap! I lather before showering; after showering, and usually a second time while shaving, and my brush is full of lather when I finish and my single puck will last for maybe 300 shaves?? so maybe 4 cents a shave??

Also,

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. MWF - great shave soap and it even lathers in hard water! One of my top two shave soaps along with Mystic Water. Very little scent (just lanolin), and slick enough for a straight razor - as a bonus, it leaves my face feeling soft.  This shave soap regularly gets recognized on various shave forums like Badger & Blade as one of the top performers.

input: rating 5.0. Another really nice product from Mehron I am so impressed with the Mehron line of products. This primer helped the make up go on easily and evenly. I sweat on stage, and I did not sweat through the make up. I used this primer four times in one weekend. I did not notice any dryness or acne. I have very sensitive skin and I did not have any reaction to it. After it dried I did not even realize it was there. Use as recommended and let dry to have the best effect!

rating 5.0. This is the perfect skin prep for the summer months If you don't have this in your life, you are missing out.  This is the perfect skin prep for the summer months.  Try it, you would like it.

rating 5.0. This is pure perfection! This stuff is great. I was worried it would create streaks or clumpy spots because of what one review said but after eyeing this for months, I finally took a chance & I was not disappointed at all. I just put some on a cotton pad & dabbed (NOT RUBBED) all over my face & it did not create any visible marks or rough spots when I applied my makeup. A little goes a long way & it really does stay on until you take off your makeup. I sweat so much that I have stopped wearing makeup just because I sweat it all off within an hour but my makeup stayed on literally until I had to take it off for bed. I have never been more happy with a purchase. It is such good quality. Just handling the bottle, you can tell it is made well & is of good quality. It looks & performs as something that should be priced really high but it was so affordable I was blown away by how great it is. Another great thing about this is that it makes your makeup go a loonngg way. In fact, I was so use to my makeup smearing so easily and thinly that I didn't notice that this made it spread harder just because it keeps it from smearing (thats its purpose) so thats great haha but I have to make sure to evenly shade my face to my neck next time. All in all, not one bad thing about this. I never thought something could do what this does. Oh & some people mentioned that it makes them break out but it actually cleared my skin up a lot just because it dried out all the spots on my face. It's great!!!!

rating 2.0. so it can get pretty hot down here I live in the South, so it can get pretty hot down here. I also have some skin problems (mild to moderate acne, redness, dry flakes), so I like to wear base makeup whenever I go out. I bought this because I was hoping that combined with a primer and fixing spray, the skin prep pro would help my makeup stay put and not get swept away by the flood of sweat that comes crashing in every summer. The primer and fixing spray I use work well for me (or at least are the best I've tried so far) and sweat is still an issue for me. When this came in, I had high hopes, but unfortunately this is not a miracle product. It did make my face feel tight, so I applied a small amount of moisturizer over it after letting it set but before applying my makeup. I'm a college student, so I walk to class all the time, and after a few classes I could tell that my face was fading and melting as usual. It wasn't a pretty sight. So the next day, to see if it was due to the moisturizer, I just applied the skin prep pro before my makeup. Sadly, I got the same results. I break it out every now and again to see if it's a certain product that it won't work with, but after going through all of my routine taking one product out at a time, I've determined that this just doesn't work for me. I gave this two stars because while it didn't do what I wanted it to, it also didn't make any of my skin problems worse. I also want to give it the benefit of the doubt in case it is helping, just not significantly enough.

rating 5.0. AMAZING!!! This stuff really works! I have very, very oily skin and have lots of problems keeping my foundation on all day, especially in the summer. I've used this to when my skin is having an especially bad oil day and found that it can last up to 12 hours without needing ANY touch ups! With other, MUCH more expensive primers, I tend to get greasy in under 6 hours. Save your money & buy this instead.
I really do love this stuff, and highly, highly recommend it!

rating 5.0. This product is amazing, and worth every cent This product is amazing, and worth every cent. To put this into context, I live in Southern California and we experience high heat and high humidity.

- Makeup stays put and looks fresh for 12+ hours WITHOUT any touch up
- Makeup adheres better to skin - I ended up using less foundation, bronzer, and highlighter. This primer ENHANCES color payoff in other products
- Primer does not feel thick or uncomfortable on the skin throughout the day

Only issue: this product dries very quickly to a tacky texture. I got the best results when I applied moisturizer before the primer. After the primer dries, liquid foundation should be applied with a very quick hand. Otherwise, the foundation will begin to collect unevenly in blotches. You can apply liquid foundation by hand or brush, but the best method is probably stippling with a brush or beauty blender. Stippling will prevent the foundation from sticking to the primer in blotches

rating 2.0. Use With Caution! pros:
it truly makes your make up stick to your skin and doesn't melt off on the hottest of days. i wore this to a concert festival during the summer and by the end of it, my face wasn't melted and oily.

cons:
taking the fact that it's for high-performance conditions, i would NOT recommend anyone to use this daily. i wore this twice on separate occasions because i couldn't find a primer that really worked at the time (update: found a product that works amazingly and can be used everyday--MAKE UP FOR EVER Step 1 Skin Equalizer) what ended up happening after i used it, probably 1-2 days after was that my face broke out in large pimples as well as a weird rash on my cheeks. this is just my personal experience, but i would not use it again. my skin did not react kindly to this and my poor clogged pores were probably suffocating under it. so if you must, use with caution!

apply this LAST, after any other creams, lotions, sunscreen. i made the mistake of applying it before my sunscreen and it became flaky and i had to wipe off crumbs from my face.

rating 5.0. smoothe feet I love this product. It is easy to hold. Looks and almost sounds like a small blow dryer. Has a 9 ft cord and makes your feet really smoothe. If you have dry cracked feet this will take care of the problem.

rating 5.0. Wow, this is great So I just got this not too long ago and have only used it once, but that's all I've needed so far (it's been 3 months since I got it).  I developed the dry type of callous.  The one where your skin cracks and the bottom of your feet gets white and a bit stiff.  This resolved the problem in no time.  IT'S STRONG, so watch out, but it gets the job done.  I don't know how it'll work on different types of callous since I know some people have the callous type that looks like the bottom of your feet is leather-like, so I can only speak for the dry, cracked type.  Great purchase.  Also, I don't know how to get replacements, so I'll repost once that time comes.

rating 5.0. Finally something that works! I LOVE this product! I have (embarrassingly) dry and cracked heels.  In the summer I would have to spend time every week filing with a course, medium and fine file to get my heels to a place where I wasn't embarrassed to wear flip flops.  Even then, it wasn't how I really wanted my heels.  After one of the files I used was discontinued I decided to look for something else.  I decided that I wanted something with a motor that would really get the job done.  Most of the products I found had mediocre to bad reviews until I found this one.  I decided to give it a try.  Now that I have it I don't think I'll even use a foot file again!  It is very easy to use and works to file the skin away with ease.  I love the adjustable speed.  I keep it about a third of the way up.  The first time I used it (with the course disc) I had the speed set higher and my skin became very warm and felt like it was burning to I turned it down to a slower speed.  The fine disc I can use at a higher speed.  I can file my feel in a few minutes and they look and feel great.  I have used it 4 times so far and both of the discs seem like new, so I suspect that I won't need to buy refills for a while.  The only suggestion I have it to start at a slow speed and get used to it before using higher speeds to see what you find comfortable and effective the first couple time.

rating 5.0. Really works! I bought this product based on other customers' reviews and gosh, they were right. After 15 minutes with this beauty the soles and sides of my feet are smooth, cracks on heels almost gone. Its powerful though, a couple of places on my feet heated up quickly and painfully for a few seconds when i bore down too hard. An easy touch on a low speed did the trick.

I have tried pumic stones, foot shavers, chemical callus removers and even a drywall sander and nothing came close to working as well as this product.

rating 5.0. Excellent product... There are plenty of really great reviews for this product already. Nonetheless, this is the absolute best callus remover product I have ever used. I therefore feel obligated to at least point out any pros/cons.

Pros:

- It works fast.

- It works on even the most difficult and stubborn dried, cracked and/or damaged skin.

- It works with very little effort on the user's end. No need to apply pressure...it will work just as well without doing so.

- It doesn't get absurdly hot. If you start to feel the heat is a problem, you can just swap the pad for a new one and resolve this issue. (Of course you can go back and swap back later so as not to waste an entire pad).

- Replacement heads are cheap and easily obtained here on Amazon - both the coarse and polishing options.

- The unit works immediately, right out of the box. No need to pre-charge or assemble anything.

- For those with fragile hands, this is a lightweight product with a comfortable grip.

- Works well even on dry skin that is *not* pre-soaked or treated with any creams, etc.

Cons:

- Although I mentioned this in the pros, the fact it does get hot and *could* require a swap of the pad mid-job, makes it a con as well.

----------------

The above is my personal assessment of this product. I have yet to encounter any other cons and would highly recommend this to anyone in need of such a product. My days of scraping, scrubbing, etc. are over. For years I have tried every approach, product, method, and what not. I have even used straight sandpaper at times. I wish I had discovered this product sooner, but am pleased to have it now at least. In my opinion, this is worth every penny.

rating 5.0. greatful to have found this product Tried many things before, but nothing as great as this item. My feet calluses have been very bad for as long as I can remember. This worked awesome. Very powerful, easy to use. Had on the lowest setting only. Took my calluses totally away in one treatment. Now I only need to moisturize. rating 4.0. A LOT of power for really bad feet. I am going to confess something, my feet are hideous. My family make fun my feet all the time and call them barney rubble feet. I basically walk around barefoot almost 24/7 and never go for pedicures. I would go for a pedi but I am too embarrassed at how bad my feet were. I will be the first to say I neglect my feet, they are (or should I say were) very callused and stained. My heels had deep cracks from neglect and three years of being barefoot almost exclusively. Today my callus remover came and I have to say I am impressed. I shop on amazon ALOT and it takes a lot for me to go out of my way to write a review but this gadget deserves one.

First, out of the box it looks to be a heavy duty machine. Thick power cord and a decent weight but not cumbersome. It looks built to last. It has enough power on low to do a major overhaul on the hardest and deepest of calluses. User beware this thing packs a punch. Don't spent more than a couple seconds on an area or you will feel the burn quick. Try just tapping the head on your calluses. Go against the direction of the spin because it will run off on you. It's strong enough to sand down thick toenails too. My feet have never looked this good.

No worries for lack of power on this thing, if you are looking for a gentle buffer this isn't it so if you feet are in decent shape look for something a little less aggressive. If your feet look like they walk over hot coals from time to time, this baby will take care of that in one quick session. My feet are super smooth and look like brand new, albeit a little sore.

rating 1.0. Does not remove callus's As the title says, this machine does not remove callus's. It couldn't even remove normal dead skin much less a callus. I understand this is probably to help prevent injury but it makes things a lot slower and annoying. I tried using a higher speed and the disc did get a little hotter so I imagine if you're not careful you could get burned, it just goes too fast (which doesn't make a difference in removing dead skin btw because I tried the lowest speed and a very high speed).

I only have 1 callus and it's not a bad one but then the skin on the rest of my feet just needs to be filed down a little bit and I give myself pedicures all the time, I usually use tweezerman files and I can see if it's working because when you file off dead skin it turns into a white powder sort of. Using this product, hardly any dead skin was taken off at all, just a tiny bit. It wasn't pretty much polishing the skin instead of removing the build up.

I've already contacted amazon to return this item...it is NOT worth 50 bucks. In my experience it doesn't work at all & I would not recommend buying it. I guess I will stick with regular filling and elbow grease.

rating 5.0. One of the best Amazon puchases EVER! I live in the desert. I hate what the heat and constantly wearing flip flops does to my heels. I have tried everything to stop the deep cracks that would often lead to bleeding; nothing worked. I got pedicures every 4 weeks; nothing. I exfoliated and moisturized every night, but there was so much skin, I couldn't make a dent (literally). I was getting really frustrated. I considered buying the Clarisonic foot exfoliator, but everything I read about the product told me it was too weak to treat what I was dealing with. Then I got a plantar wart on my heel. Ick. No matter how much I filed, I couldn't get the acid to reach the source of the virus. I turned to this product and the wart was gone in a week! My heels have never looked better. My feet look like I just got a pedicure, EVERY DAY!

There are some things you need to know before you use this:
1. It is super powerful. It could probably sand wood, if you turned it up high enough. Leave it on the lowest setting.
2. Wet your feet before you use this. If you apply it to dry skin, you could burn yourself. After you get used to it, you can use it on dry skin, but I still like to soak my feet first so the dead skin is nice and supple.
3. If you can, use this outside. The machine blasts off a ton of dead skin, but it leaves a fine dust all over everything in the process.
4. Be extra careful around toes and between the toes. Do not be adventurous the first time you use it; stick to your heels until you get used to it.

Enjoy! You will be so happy you bought this. It is worth every penny.

rating 4.0. Something to think about I've been using this product for well over a year.  I only use it once a day and my blackhead pores are smaller but it does not rid blackheads.  There is still material in the pores, so don't expect a miracle.  The one thing I can add is this product can cause some serious inflammation to skin that does not need to be treated.  I always get a little overlap on my cheeks and under my eyes and try to wash it off right away, but if this is left on for the five minutes in application and wait time, my skin almost blistered and it took months to get the skin area close to my eye back to normal.  Just a heads-up.  You may not have this problem but it is definitely a problem for me.  I apply this product now with a Q-Tip and am extremely careful that I don't touch areas of my skin that do not need this product.  I'm pretty hyperconscious about it now.

rating 5.0. First time user, customer for life. I buy plenty of stuff from Amazon but rarely if ever do I write a review. Yes, my pores are still visible but they've gone from large and clogged with dirt and oil to noticeably smaller and most importantly clean. To anyone considering this product but scared away by the price, even at Amazon's significant discount, I urge you to try it. The bottle is small but I've found a little goes a long way. rating 5.0. It Really Works!! I've had acne for 55 years, which has caused major enlarged facial pores.  I've tried a lot of pore minimizing products but NONE has EVER done the job like Vi-Tae's More Than Clean!!!  In just 1 weeks time, I could visibly see the difference and now at 17 days use, I see a remarkable difference.  The condition and texture of my skin has also changed and I've noticed some dark spots starting to look lighter or almost invisible.  I'm not saying this product will remove dark spots, I'm just saying I've noticed a change in MY spots.  I HIGHLY recommend this product!  I currently use Basis Cleaner Clean Face Wash to remove my makeup, especially mascara, because it's 100% oil-free and soap-free. rating 5.0. Nice. My nose definitely looks better than before. I've been using Vi-tae 'More Than Clean' for about two weeks. I'm a 56 year old man. My pores are definitely cleaner. They may be closing or shrinking in size, also. That, however, my be the from the general drying and tightening affect this has on skin. A few more weeks will tell for sure. I'm hoping it reduces pore size permanently. That would be nice. My nose definitely looks better than before I started using this.

I like the product. It has a nice aroma. It is warm on my skin. It rinses well.

I use it twice a day. My routine is to 1) wash with my traditional facial cleanser, 2) gently rub 'More than Clean' on the affected area (my nose) for a minute or so, 3) dab a bit more on as a sort of facial mask, 4) let it sit there for 2-3 minutes while I brush teeth and such, 5) Gently rub a bit more and 6) Rinse.

I tried adding straight aloe vera gel but it doesn't dry my skin out enough to merit that.

The company is quite nice and has followed-up with a couple of emails. I'd continue using this long-term. I like it!

rating 5.0. Awesome! I love this product. I have huge pores and blackheads on my nose. After using this product for 2 weeks I have very few blackheads and my pores actually look smaller. My face feels clean! I use it in the morning and I have less shine all day long. I love it so much and am on my second order of the product!

rating 5.0. Finally a Real Solution This stuff works, plain and simple. After only several uses, my nose blackheads have disappeared. I have struggled with them, and finding a solution, for years. Don't scrub too harshly. Go gently in a circular motion. If, after several uses, there are still blackheads remaining, press out gently. The cleanser will have loosened them significantly.

rating 5.0. A very good face product! Am in process of trying out some new "pore reducing" products and am really enjoying this product. I have actually, probably like most people, gone through mountains of facial soaps and scrubs to try and finding that is amazing. I have been using this as a soap and Kyoku serum and have been getting numerous compliments on how well my skin has been looking.
It is a low sudsing cleanser that has a very strong peppermint-like tingle that my husband and I both love! This might be an awkward point to make but I also like it because it tastes good, not that I eat it but there are times when I'm in a hurry and don't "splash" enough on my face and there is a bit left on my face and the dripping water sneaks into your mouth...am I the only one this happens too 😒 but it doesn't taste like chemicals so I feel a little better about using this versus some other brands.

rating 4.0. This stuff actually works! I had a pretty ugly blackhead on my nose. For weeks I tried everything to get rid of it. I even asked my girlfriend for some beauty tips. Nothing worked. After awhile I noticed it getting bigger so I became desperate. I did something most guys would ever do... I visited a beauty salon that specializes in skin care. Fortunately for me, the lady I spoke to didn't want to take my money and told me to just pick up a bottle of Vi-Tae Blackhead remover. She told me all this mombo jumbo about why and how it works and I pretended like I understood but it all flew over my head. I went home later that night and found it on Amazon. Honestly, I didn't want to spend $30+ dollars on a health and beauty product because, well, I'm a guy. But I took the lady's advice and went with it. Like Prime normally does, I got it in two days. I followed the directions - apply every morning to damp skin, let it sit for a few minutes and rinse. I have to be honest... I didn't see any difference after the first day. The blackhead was still there. I did it again the second day. Nothing. Third day. Zilch. Fourth day. Nada. I was becoming impatient and felt ripped off. However, after I applied it on the fifth day, the blackhead was gone after I rinsed it! I was like WHOA! This girly stuff really works. Before I start to rave about this stuff, I have to say that it didn't get it all out. If I look close enough, I can still see a tiny spec left in my pore. But I'll just continue using this stuff and see what happens. In all honesty, no one else can see it anymore. But my girlfriend said to continue keeping it clean so it doesn't come back.

FYI, I'm a 31 year old Asian male with pretty oily skin.

PROS:
- Actually works but it can take up to a week to remove a large blackhead
- Smells good and refreshing
- Directions are easy to follow

CONS:
- This stuff will sting the first few times you use it. It's not unbearable but it's pretty annoying
- It's a tad difficult to rinse off after you let it sit for a few minutes

input:
rating 5.0. Secure, Cute, Extras Just received this today and I love it more than I thought I would.
It would be great for makeup, but I got it to keep my vitamin supplements in to keep them secure.
The material is high quality, the combo lock is quick and easy to use and more secure as you slide the button when your combo is in. It doesn't just pop open if your combo happens to be turned past (if that makes sense). The zipper clicks into the lock so that's how the lock works on the bag at least.
It also comes with the two little makeup bags in it, which I didn't expect. They have little snaps on them so you can take them out and put them in when you'd like.
Overall high quality, cute, simple to operate, and better quality than expected.
If this helped, click that helpful button please!

rating 5.0. Sturdy and secure Love this case. It comes with two zipper pouches inside and mesh pockets. Locking part works great and feels secure. I use it to carry medications in my purse to they stay locked and safe. Fits 2-3 reg size prescription bottles per pouch. Decent size. Would absolutely recommend.

rating 5.0. Cute multifunctional make up bag for an awesome price I'd been looking for a good makeup bag/ organizer. I want one that's small enough to throw in my purse, but big enough to hold my needed cosmetics. I can't stand make up bags that are just one large compartment, cuz I'm always searching and searching through it for what I need. What I need always is at the bottom too. So annoying. This bag couldn't be more perfect. The size is a little bigger than an average blow dryer, it has a couple removable pouches insides, one side zipper compartment, and the other side holds brushes securely. The price you can't beat either. I love black and white stripes... Perfect bag. Now the only thing left is to see how long it'll hold up for.

rating 5.0. Perfect size for storing feminine products at work! I was getting sick of finding that my feminine products supply was running low because other people at work were taking from my bag - but I also didn't want to have to carry a bag with me to the bathroom every time I need to go while on my period. I decided to buy two of these so that I could store one in each of our work bathrooms (so that I don't have to wait for the "specific bathroom" that has all my supplies - now both do!).

Each bag has enough room for storage for every feminine product possible - I fit 4 extra thick pads, a dozen tampons, about 20 liners and at least a dozen "slim" pads. It's pretty full, but there is still more room to spare - I just preferred to not have it bulging, for easier zip/close. And that's what fits in just ONE bag! Soooo looking forward to keeping my supply stocked longer, with no one else taking from my bags anymore! Thanks, Vaultz!

input: rating 4.0. Recommend! This is a lovely cleanser. Light and slightly runny, not highly foaming. I have normal to dry skin and Super Detox leaves my skin feeling fresh but not dry. I love the citrusy essential oils. The natural ingredients make it feel very high-end. Don't let the simple packaging fool you.

rating 5.0. Fantastic for oil prone skin. I love this product. I have super oily skin and very large pores. I have used countless other products (proactiv, clean and clear, neutrogena, ect) and they have been helpful. But I have always wanted to find something equally helpful that was not as chemically harsh. This completely fits the bill. My skin feels totally clean but not dried out after I wash and it stays feeling that way for at least as long as the other chemical based products if not longer. AFB has definitely won me over and I have already purchased more of their products. One warning. As others have mentioned it DOES NOT lather. If that is of importance then they have another cleanser that does. I haven't used it so I can't comment on its effectiveness. But if lather isn't a must you will probably love this cleanser!

rating 3.0. ok, but nothing special for the price This is NOT a bad product, in fact it is quite nice. However my skin did not feel any different or cleaner than it does after I use my usual organic cleansers that costs half the price. I found it quite curious that the 4  5 Star reviews are written by people that only reviewed products by this company, seems a little fishy to me. Having said that, if money is no object, this is a nice cleanser, but there are others that do the job just as well and are also all natural that cost half the price.

rating 3.0. Just received I was a bit surprised at how small the bottle was, especially for $24, but I guess the description did say 4.3 oz, so I should have paid more attention. I received the cleanser today, immediately washed my face and here's what I found: It has a pleasant fragrance, a bit minty. It does not lather, but spreads fairly evenly over the face, without needing a lot of product; a lot goes a long way. My face feels very clean, and does not feel as though any residue was left behind. But again, this cleanser will most likely only last a couple weeks, which I don't think is really worth the $24 pricetag. I would have rated this product 5 stars if there was more product or was less expensive.

rating 5.0. Add this to your skin care regimen I never heard of charcoal removing toxins from your body, so I was surprised to come across this product while researching natural facial washes. Upon reading some of the reviews I took it upon myself to do some reading on charcoal and its properties. I felt what I read along with some of the reviews convinced me enough to make a purchase. I'm not going to lie, I was skeptical but the way my cheeks have been riddled with blackheads I figured I had nothing to lose. I was so excited about this product I washed my face immediately after I got it out my mailbox, even though I had just finished washing my face 5 minutes before. Like all the other reviewers said, this product DOES not foam up, instead it is a thin liquid that smells like roasted minty lemongrass. Mmmm! I left it on my face after massaging it in thoroughly for 5 minutes, when I looked at my cheeks they were so much lighter which indicated the product worked with removing the blackheads. However, it did not remove all of them, which are the ones that are embedded deep in my face(ewwww). After using it 2 more times, I could feel the embedded ones coming to the surface, and now since I've had it for a week, my cheeks are almost bump free, yayyyy! It is a great product for ladies who wear make-up, it can help with removing all that stuff from your pores. I recommend using it with [[ASIN:B004V0SZNO BriteLeafs 4-in-1 Electric Facial & Body Brush Spa Cleaning System (BL-802)]], a great alternative to the Clarasonic. This is def going in with my skincare regimen.

Update 4-29-13: I did stop using this product bc of the price however when I seen that they had increased the bottle size I purchased another one. I hated that I stopped using this product bc my pores get so clogged I am constantly breaking out. My face was so congested I could feel little bumps beneath my skin and nothing was working. I ordered another bottle a week and a half ago and my face just cleared up and now when I touch my cheeks they are smooth. To increase this product effectiveness take a rag wet it with hot water and put it to your face for about 3 times for about 10 seconds each. Then use a facial scrub brush to get in your pores and let it sit for about 2 minutes, this helps also with milia under your eyes, just gently rub those areas with the facial wash and in no time those will disappear too. No I do not work for the company, just offering advice to other oily faced people.

rating 5.0. Skin has improved Im half way through my first bottle and have stumbled upon a product I'll never be without. I've never been one to try a lot of products, just used purpose liquid face soap for the last 20 years. This stuff has improved my skin, smells incredible and a little goes a long way. My pores appear smaller as they are clean for the first time ever. Love it.

rating 5.0. I honestly love it! So far I have been using this cleanser for 4 months now. It has kept my skin clear of breakouts. It actually has stayed clear for the 4 months that I have been using it. I definetly recommend to everyone to at least try once.

rating 3.0. Good cleanser, but too watery I have combination skin (with oily T-zone area) and live in a hot, humid climate. I like my pores to be deeply cleansed but not to the extent that my skin gets dry and tight after a wash.

This cleanser does a good job of cleaning and has no harmful/harsh chemicals, but it doesn't give me the totally clean, exfoliated yet 'just-right' feeling that my Dr. Alkatis cleanser does.

Perhaps it's because it's too watery or because it has essential oils or something like that.

For the price, the bottle is also a tad small.

Conclusion: I will reserve it for the days when my skin is really dehydrated and I only require a mild cleansing.

rating 4.0. decent I really liked the way this smelled - very floral with a slight hint of orange.  In fact, it's one of the best smelling cleansers I've bought.  However, I didn't really notice any visible difference after using it.  (A few times, I would even break out). I have combination skin and it affects the parts of my face differently. It doesn't seem to strip all the oils from my nose, but at the same time, the other sections of my face could get very dry if I didn't put on a moisturizer after. Overall, I would say that it is decent, but is no miracle product. I've had better and I've had worse organic products. And it's a bit on the pricey side.

rating 4.0. Love that it's natural. This is a great product for the fact that it does not contain a ton of chemicals. I got tired for putting this acid or that acid or alcohol on my face and wanted to find something that would work well but not overwork my skin. I have oily skin and susceptible to breakouts and have large pores. I was reading articles and searching for many products and found this. While it is very thin and will NOT foam, it can and will do a great job of getting the stuff out of your face.

The best way to use this product is to use very little water on your face to start. In the morning I pat my skin with a little bit of water and apply a dime size amount to my palm and apply to my face. What I found that works best is that you have to keep rubbing your skin with your fingertips, this works the product in the skin to pull the grim out.

Some hate it for the watery consistency but this is a natural product, not a chemical compound that will give you the foam feel you are used to.

rating 5.0. Joan Crawford would be proud! Hard weave is not *that* hard if you're used to washing with a rougher texture. I use this daily just before I use the Super Hard weave; DO NOT recommend for those with sensitive/thin skin. Tip to save water: use a bucket; fill while letting the body and cloth get thoroughly wet; apply face wash and allow to sit on the skin; apply body wash to cloth; the bucket having been filled, TURN OFF WATER, give yourself a good scrub down; rinse with bucket water and finally one more time with shower. Cuts down time and saves money! I also buy body wash by the gallon [EO Brand] which saves A LOT of money as it last for six months or more.

rating 5.0. Comes with all the tools you need I haven't been to the dentist in the last few years and graciously still have dodged cavities, but have some plaque build up in between my teeth. Because of this, my teeth weren't looking as white as they once were. I went to school for dental hygiene like 10 years ago and all I can say is this is the perfect "at home solution."

rating 5.0. A dental visit at home. Amazing! This set of dental tools for at home is honestly amazing. I was hesitant from reviews but it does work great. I have some not awful but still bad calculus build up on my teeth. The calculus remover with little effort got the majority off the front of my bottom teeth that most bugged me. I used the metal tools to scrape a bit of the harder stuff on the front. Then I’d go back over it with the tool. Even more impressive was what it did on the inside of my bottom row. I definitely had a few mm of calculus between teeth built up. It cleared out chunks around my teeth. I will note I used a combination of the remover and scraping with the tool included. The tool itself though did do some of the removal and was better around the gums especially as it’s not as sharp. The best way is to scrape with the point between teeth. Then use the side of the metal too to scrape off of the tooth surface. Then use the tool to go over and break up the calculus. So for the price this is such a great value! Not that you want to skip the dentist but of you don’t have a major issue this is a GREAT inexpensive way to keep up on regular tooth health between visits.
rating 1.0. Don't waste your money Unfortunately this tool does absolutely nothing but vibrates. My toothbrush does more!!!

rating 5.0. Important tool!! I got it about 10 days ago and have used it several times at a low setting with good results. Great value for the money!!  Will pay for itself over and over!! Google other peoples' experiences with this excellent tool for some tips and do's and don'ts. Great for those of us with no dental insurance. Start out slow until you develop a feel for working it. If you have a well behaved and trusting dog or cat you could probably do their teeth too. You will be pleased with this, especially if you have a lot of tartar buildup.

rating 1.0. Beware! Be careful!!!! Wow! Please be careful with this. I did as instructed at 45 degree angle and this left a grayish stain/mark on my tooth. Once I was finally able to remove the stain with floss and electric toothbrush, I found that it left a track down my tooth as if I had used a chisel and it also left a bunch of little dots as if I had picked at it. I will post pics of my tooth once I get a good close up. If you have sensitive or fragile teeth, In my humble opinion, I do not recommend. Be extra careful.

rating 2.0. Does nothing Does l as than nothing in terms of cleaning tarter.  The only reason I gave it 2 stars is because it came w a good enough dental cleaning tool and mirror. Both of which I could have bought for well under $5. Oh, and while charging it works as an expensive night light for the bathroom.

rating 5.0. Excellent Plaque and Calcium Remover I adore this product! I ordered a system to whiten my teeth but needed something to remove calcium/plaque on the bottom portion of my teeth. I saw the dental calculus remover and decided to try it. I am so pleased I did. It has numerous speeds, is easy to hold and comes with a mirror, scraper and power cord you can plug into a computer. I removed the calcium and plaque within an hour. My teeth have never looked better!
You owe it to yourself to give it a try.

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Plaque finder This tool is very effective at cleaning between teeth and at the gum line.  Even after flossing I experience this tool to find left over plaque.  I am 69 yrs old and clean teeth and heathy gums are critical to staying healthy overall. I use it about once a week and I get very good checkups with no need to deep clean for exorbitant amounts of money at the dentist office. This is a very good investment on several levels.
other_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Terrific lipstick If you are like me you may have a few lipsticks.......but use only one or two.  Buckle's lipsticks are the ones I use everyday. And evenings. For little events and big events. Never smears.  Never dries my lips. Lasts. Doesn't taste icky. Colors are believable.  Price is not scary.
rating 1.0. Quit after 2 weeks Quit after 2 weeks.  Won't take a charge.  Waste of money.  I have an older Emjoi that worked for several years.

input:
rating 5.0. Excellent when used correctly :) This is amazing. I've been using it as a primer for my majorlica majorca fiber lash mascara. It really helps my lashes. Mascara removal is so much easier now at night; I'm no longer accidentally pulling out my lashes while trying to clean my face!

To apply, you only need to barely blink your lashes on the brush. A very light hand is needed. Your lashes shouldn't be covered in the white primer. I think the other reviewers who had issues with this product clumping were using way too much or maybe had a poor mascara product they used afterwards.

rating 1.0. Not a good conditioner This primer did not condition or strengthen my lashes. One morning, all the ends just broke off! Going back to Chanel mascara base and waiting for my lashes to regrow. Ugh.

I didn't want to use mascara that's y I brought it so it not good for me

rating 5.0. Good primer, slightly pricey for off-brand Great lash primer. Works as expected, but I do find it pretty pricey for an off-brand product. I use primers to help build my mascara so I can use less mascara and decrease the time it takes. I do one layer primer, follow with one layer mascara, another layer of primer, finish with another layer of mascara. This builds great volume and it doesn't make the mascara flake off or anything. I don't wait for it to dry between layers just FYI. I'm happy with the product overall.
rating 3.0. but nothing great enough to write home about Does not irritate my eyes,  Adds a little extra "umph" to your lashes, but nothing great enough to write home about...

rating 5.0. Love Love, Love, Love this primer! I apply it first and then apply mascara immediately after. It makes my eyelashes look so long!

rating 5.0. Product REALLY works! I LOVE Radiant Complex.  It gives my thin eyelashes volume and length.  Yes, I've tried other more expensive & less expensive Lash Primers (very famous brands) but this Lash Primer by Radiant Complex does a better job, lasts longer and has more ounces in the container and of course IS the better product. rating 5.0. Recommend for Older Women This product is exactly what I was looking for!  My lashes have thinned as I have gotten older, and mascara just wasn't working for me.  It was too heavy and my lashes stuck together, making my eyes look even worse than before.  What I wanted was a lighter look to accompany the overall lighter make-up look that I now prefer.  I had never used a lash primer; did not even know such a thing existed until I overheard some other women at the cosmetic counter discussing it.  After receiving this product from Amazon, I was intrigued.  It took me a few days to get the right amount; I found that wiping the brush with a tissue to get a part of the primer off before I use it works best for me.  After the primer is allowed to dry for awhile (2 or 3 minutes), I apply light mascara and I am set to go!  My lashes look longer and fuller; the mascara does not clump but instead just adds a little color.  Perfect!  This product is well worth the money!

rating 5.0. I absolutely love this product I absolutely love this product! If I use two coats of primer and two coats of mascara, I get the results I want every single time. Follow the instructions to apply the primer and mascara to one eye before applying to the second, in order to get smooth coverage. I think the price is well worth the results.

rating 3.0. PLEASE READ MY UPDATE - DO NOT I REPEAT DO NOT BUY THIS ITEM..... I love this brush. My only issue is something others mentioned but I didn't think it would bother me. You can EASILY change the temperature settings just by using the brush. Otherwise it's really good - I truly knew nothing about these but really glad I didn't spend double the money on something I will only use a couple of times during the week. Works really well. I have wavy hair then does curl. But it's fine and straightens easily. But this makes it silky smooth. And it then lays really well.

UPDATE- PLEASE TAKE NOTE - I thought I would use this brush more often but probably used it maybe 10 -15 times within a 3 month span. Previous reviewers noted how EASILY IT IS to touch the heat controls while using the brush. WOW that was UNDERSTATED. I ALWAYS ALWAYS changed the temp just when holding the brush. PLEASE TAKE NOTE IT IS DIFFICULT NOT TO TOUCH THE HEAT BUTTONS. Then surprise surprise - yesterday I went to use it AND IT NO LONGER WORKS. According to Amazon I can no longer return this time. So Great - now I OWN A LARGE PAPERWEIGHT. I did not abuse this item. I unplugged it as soon as I was finished with it. Just in case I'd forget to turn it off. The other day not only could I not turn it off-after unplugging it I could not turn it on again.
DO NOT PURCHASE THIS PRODUCT....it STINKS.
AND I think Amazon is one of the best places to buy "stuff". Most suppliers are willing to work with you on returns and respond immediately. This supplier did not reply to my email.
BUY SOMETHING ELSE - BUT NOT THIS ITEM.
THANKS AND HAPPY HOLIDAYS TO ALL

rating 5.0. What fun What a deal. These polishes go for $7-$8 a piece at Walmart. I probably would have only bought 3 of the colors I was sent but the other 3 I don't mind owning, I will use them and I'm glad to have them. I reordered again taking the gamble I get some "fall" colors in addition to this Spring selection. I received (in order of left to right) Throwing Shade (pink), Electra-Cute (orange), Wet My Whistle (Green), Rhythm &a Blue (darker blue), Lemon Heaven (Yellow), Tea Party (soft shiny blue)... the green one had a sticky residue in the cap but I'm sure a little nail polish remover will fix that... probably a packaging error with glue at the factory?

Update: I ordered a second batch of random colors. 3 of the 6 were the exact same colors and 1 was incredibly similar to the Orange I received before but the other 2 colors were great and 1 was down right gorgeous. The green one again had something weird on the outside of the container and one of the glass bottles has chipped off a piece on the box.

rating 4.0. Speedy delivery .. disliked all my colors 5 stars for speedy delivery,  wasn't expecting it today, but it came, Yay!!  However I do wish maybe you could try to meet the customers wants, just slightly.  Maybe come up with different pallette choices and the customer can choose which pallette they prefer.  Though it was clear in the description that the colors would be selected randomly,  I just figured like most of the other customers, I too would be lucky and receive at least 1 color that i would have chosen myself... nope I was wrong. The colors are okay, just not what I was hoping for. And you figure if you're paying $30 for some nail polish,it should at least be a color or two that you like. .. Not the case for me. I'm a fan of the Nail Polish itself, though.  Good luck, hopefully you'll get a color you like!

rating 3.0. It’s a Gamble I originally purchased this because I thought it would be fun to get 6 colors at random, but I should have known better. I strongly dislike all 6 colors I received and the Tan-acious has nail polish around handle area which makes me question if I should even try it out.

Granted, unlike some purchasers I got all miracle gel polishes and none were broken. The packaging was a bit iffy and I’m shocked none were damaged in shipment.

It’s a given that it’ll be a gamble with what colors you get, but if you’re going to give an atypical color at least balance it out with something more normal like a red or pink, even black or white would have helped!

Again, it’s all subjective and someone out there might love every single color I got, but I’d rather pay more per bottle knowing it’s a color I’d actually use. If you really don’t care what colors you get, then by all means this is a great deal and you should totally go for it!

Colors from L-R, top to bottom: Tea Party, Rhythm & Blue, Beatnik, Electra-cute, Wet My Thistle, Tan-acious

rating 4.0. Colors sent may not be colors included in the photo, mine weren't Slightly disappointed that the colors I received are not included in the photo. I thought the choice of colors sent would be a selection from the photo not just random colors that are not included in the photo. Nothing compares to the quiet boost you get from a fresh manicure. It just makes you feel pretty and put together. However my manicures only last about a day and then I would get in the shower to get ready for the next day and POOF! The polish would crack and peel away. All that time to paint your nails, two coats of color with 15 minutes in between to dry and a top coat that takes 20 minutes to dry. All that time and it only lasts one day if your lucky. What a waste of time! Well gel colors have changed all that and Sally Hansen has not only made a good one but it's also affordable. Gel coats will last any where between 7 to 14 days. Sally's gel also need no annoying light to activate the gel, however be sure to purchase and apply the Sally top coat or the gel will not activate and it will last less time than regular polish.

rating 1.0. I love the Sally Hansen gel nail polish and when I ... I love the Sally Hansen gel nail polish and when I saw this offer from Beauty Brags, I was thrilled with the price even knowing I might get a color or two I wouldn't use often. The product arrived in a very timely way and was wrapped securely. The problem I encountered was that I could see through the wrap that there were only 2 colors I could use. I suspect the bargain is the result of retired and off color paints. I decided to return the package for refund. Unfortunately even though this is a PRIME qualified purchase a return wasn't possible stating 'special handling' was required. This was not indicated in any of the product details. I opened the package and found that two of the bottles were used as evidenced by the wearing off of the type on the bottle cap and less than full containers. In addition there was also a leaking bottle which suggested a third was used as well. See attached photos.

Even though the cost per bottle seems to be a really good deal the shipping of a used product is very disturbing. I have been in communication with Beauty Brags and will revisit my one star score if the customer service is responsive.

rating 4.0. A friend of mine had recommended the Sally Hansen Miracle Gel Polish to me A friend of mine had recommended the Sally Hansen Miracle Gel Polish to me, promising me that it was the best nail polish she ever had.  As a nail polish addict with limited funds, I was intrigued by the recommendation, yet saddened by the $10 price tag in stores.  I bought the 6-piece random color collection from Beauty Brags since it was such a deal (60% in-store prices) and I like the idea of being surprised by the colors I would receive. I was not disappointed!  I received a classy creme, light blue, pink, peachy orange, green, and fun sparkly gold color!  After a few trial and error runs, I was able to optimize the application to get my longest lasting nail color yet!  If you apply a hefty base coat as well as the Miracle Gel brand top coat, you can make your nails last close to a full week before your first chip, and then a quick reapplication will make them last a whole other week! (My job is not very friendly to my nails either!)  Tip:  putting the Miracle Gel top coat over your cheap $2 polishes will also help you squeeze an extra few days out of those colors.  I am very happy with my purchase and would recommend it to a friend.

rating 5.0. Great dry-oil moisturizer that stops acne and acne scars Inn&Co Moringa Oil is a great facial moisturizer for people who have acne. I am African American, and this moisturizer/acne treatment makes my skin dewey, radiant; gives me vibrant skin tone; is non-greasy; and prevents acne. I use it after I have washed and toned my skin with toner. I am using My Doctor Suggests Silver Soap and Probiotic Action sprayable probiotics for acne and rosacea for my cleanser and toner, respectively. Inn& Co Moringa Oil smells like Thyme. If you don't like that smell, add a few drops of your favorite good smelling acne fighting essential oil (e.g. Lavender, Sandalwood, Patchoulli oil) in your hand along with 3 spritz of Moringa oil. You don't need much, but you want to make sure it is evenly distributed on your face, so it's best to put on when your skin is still damp from your toner. I no longer have to use harsh chemicals and exfolia -nts to get rid of acne-that stuff only dries out skin and makes it over-produce oil-causing acne anyway.

rating 5.0. Pleasantly surprised with the wide uses. REALLY impressed with this oil. I use it on some "too much sun" dry spots and they are actually clearing up. Full disclosure, I am also taking Moringa supplements (working it from inside and outside). I use this on my face and neck and have been so pleasantly surprised with how well it holds moisture and it makes my skin look moist - not oily. Have also been using it on an unhappy spot on my gums before bed (a piece of the gum was cut back accidentally). It's definitely calming it down and reducing infection. On a whim, I used it on a foot blister and was also very impressed with how fast it healed. Lastly, my daughter fell into some bushes and we used it on some of her cuts and they healed surprisingly quickly (and it didn't sting!)
There is a very slight smell and taste; kind of earthy? I'm very picky about smells and this doesn't have a good smell - but what small smell is there - isn't offensive. Others have mentioned using it as a carrier oil - seems like it would work fine.

rating 3.0. Cool concept, but not as easy as it looks I looked through a lot of magnetic eyelashes, and these seemed to be the best reviewed for the best price. The packaging was in good shape when I got them, but it took me forever to figure out how to put them on

PROS:
- the double magnets on each end make it so neither of the ends flare out
-they are short so you can place them at the outer edge of your lashes to make them look more natural
-they are tapered which gives them an even more natural look
-they are not as cheap looking as some of their competitors
-they slide off easily without pulling out your lashes

CONS:
-even after practicing for over an hour, I still could not get the lashes to sit flush to my eyelid. No matter how hard I tried, there was always a 3 or 4 millimeter gap that was pretty noticeable. I tried having my friend put them on for me, and even with an extra pair of hands, it is still pretty impossible.
-I bought these because I thought they would be an easier, less messy alternative to traditional fake lashes. It's true that they aren't as messy, but they definitely are not easier. It takes me 10 times as long to get these things on compared to fake lashes.
-they don't look as natural as traditional fake lashes

Overall, if you can somehow figure out how to put these on accurately, I think they would be a good alternative. I just don't have the patience to spend an hour every day trying to get these to sit correctly.

rating 5.0. There are 800+ Pokemon in the Pokedex; these are REAL! My 25 year old grown azz husband loves these. He was so excited to take a bath when I got these for him for our anniversary. He knows all the Pokemon and I don't know how because there's over 800 in the Pokedex. Over 800!

One reviewer said these were false advertising but I identified the Pokemon in their photos as Cacturne and Monferno. Another reviewer said these were fake Pokemon but I identified the one in their photo as Amaura.

They are legit Pokemon in these. The first one my husband got, he didn't remember its name but he knew it was one of the newer ones. It looked like a pink blob to me. We got 2 Pikachu's in one set and were bummed because we wanted some of the less popular Pokemon. We got Raiku and Flygon too.

I highly recommend these for the biggest Pokemon nerds you know. It's not for people who only want the originals, because you're playing the lottery with around 800 different Pokemon.
I hope this info helps.

current_product_reviews:
rating 5.0. Product is amazing, tray is not. The entire product is 100% recommended aside from one thing. The plastic case these come in breaks and sharp shades can stick you. Aside from that, the bath bombs are cute, well-made, smell great, add a lot of color and fizz, and don't bother my or my kid's sensitive skin.

The pokemon are not officially licensed, which is fine because if they were each bath bomb would be $30. They're still close to the original designs, and no small pieces or other safety issues.

I understand how hard it can be to keep costs down when selling handmade products, but I hope the seller can find some other trays or similar packaging that doesn't splinter. I have to move these immediately from the tray to avoid cutting my fingers every week (kid gets one per week). Other than that, absolutely amazing product, 100% recommended.
other_product_reviews:
rating 2.0. Difficult to accurately give stars, varying quality and color accuracy. The green shimmer is A+, gorgeous color, not too thick or thin, great opacity (2 thin coats).

The spring green is brighter than represented, almost a lime. It's also thin, very low opacity, and turned yellow at the ends of my nails after roughly 3 weeks. It also chipped a bit in three weeks, on toenails.

The smokey lavender is actually just a slightly lavender-toned medium gray. The dark blue is actually just a blue-toned medium gray. The blue-gray is just neutral gray. The colors in the swatches are NOT accurate for those three shades. The formula is good, the colors are just off. This isn't due to the difference between displays, either.

I haven't tried the olive yet. It is, at least, fairly color accurate.

I love the green shimmer, and do like the grays. I can use the lime green, and the olive will probably be serviceable. But part of the point of this purchase was to have a smokey lavender and a dark blue, and I don't. So I'll have to spend more to get them. Disappointed.

input: rating 3.0. A-H makes a less expensive version This stuff works, but Alpha Hydrox's Enhanced AHA Creme works just as well (despite being a slightly lower percentage of AHA), contains more (2 oz vs 1.6 oz) and costs several dollars less. I've used them both and find the lower percentage a better bargain.

rating 5.0. Wonderful effective nightcream! I absolutely love this product. I have acne-prone skin with some fine lines, and has not broken me out. . but more importantly I swear my fine lines are beginning to soften after only a few weeks of use:) You do need to apply moisturizer on top of this though as your skin just sucks it up. Some tingling upon application, so you KNOW it's working! Great stuff. Don't ever stop making this product Alphy Hydrox!!! I LOVE IT!

rating 5.0. Feel It Working I'd used the Alpha Hydrox brand in the past, always with great results, but never the 12% solution. Here's the thing: When you put this lotion on you can actually feel it working. There's a mild tingle/burning sensation. And within minutes you can detect a discernible difference in your skin's appearance. If you're looking for a product that tones your skin, reduces fine lines and wrinkles, and fades dark circles under the eyes, look no further. This stuff is inexpensive, a jar lasts a long time, and it works absolute wonders.

rating 5.0. Highly recommended. Even though this is advertised for fine lines, I use it for acne (because of its high AHA content).  It clears skin up within 6 weeks and evens out tone.  I'm not wasting my money on anything else now that I know this product is out there, and is very affordable.

rating 5.0. Great stuff!! Glycolic Acid is the one ingredient that you want your facial products to have. If you have problem skin such as acne, uneven skin tone, oily skin, dry skin or wrinkles you can count on glycolic acid to fix those problems. I bought this product because glycolic acid was recommended for my skin by my skin care specialist many years ago. I have uneven skin texture, oilyness and acne. I bought some very pricey glycolic acid from her and it did work wonders but the price was way too much for me ($50.00 a jar!). So ever since I have been searching for something similiar and I think I have found it with the "Alpha Hydroxy" line. And who can beat that price?? When I say I searched for similiar products, I am not kidding. I have thrown out and gave away (not to mention stored away) so many products that didn't work it is crazy.

One thing you must understand is that you have got to be faithful with this stuff. Don't skimp and don't skip treatments unless you have a skin reaction. First you got to get your pores open and a simple pot of steaming water with a towel wrapped over your head should do the trick. Buy the facial wash and wash your face gently. Slather this souffle on and go to bed. You should feel some tingle and that is good because that means you got some open pores and this souffle is sinking in. If you don't feel the tingle, don't give up on this product! Keep using this every day and you should see some difference in a week or so.

I can't believe the difference in my skin in only two weeks. And the amazing part is that I could see a difference in my skin texture within the first few days. The climate here is very dry and my skin was suffering from being too dry also. This product fixed that. AMAZING! My acne along the jawline is also clearing up a little at a time. But it is going away and that is a huge relief because this product is working. The fine lines on my forehead are also slowly disappearing.

One more thing about using this product for acne. I was watching a infomercial about a new skin care line that is supposed to be better than ProActive (which I have tried and it didn't work). I wanted to see what the main ingredient was because they did not use benzoyl peroxide. I couldn't believe it when they said glycolic acid was their main ingredient. And here we are getting the same benefits with the "Alpha Hydroxy" line without having to be bothered with orders over the phone, trial memberships and pushing more products that we don't want or need.

Glycolic acid can be pricey so to be getting a jar for this price is a bargain. Don't let that cheap price fool you....this stuff works.

rating 5.0. Works for me I have used this product on and off for years.  It works for me.  My face is smoother and skin softer and the over all look much more bright.  I get seduced (ha ha who doesn't) by cosmetic claims and I try the products but I seem to always come back to this one as my stand by. The other products are more expensive and actually don't work as well for me.  I am going to stick with this one from now on. The price is right and it does what it says.  What more can you ask.
