rating 5.0. Where have you been all my life??? Where have you been all my life??? I had looked at purchasing a product like this before as I have noticed some wrinkles forming on my chest (due to being a side sleeper)... I thought to myself, how could a product like this actually work??? I was a big skeptical until I just decided to give it a try... I read all the great reviews on these chest pads so I took a leap of faith and I'm glad I did... These pads are an ingenious creative masterpiece that still mystifies my skeptical nature... The first night I used it I washed my chest with foaming antibacterial soap and allowed to completely dry... I peeled it off the plastic wrapper and placed it on my chest and applied pressure to the pad with both hands to make sure I had a good seal...  I was amazed at how it stayed in place and that it did not irritate my skin whatsoever... I slept with it on for over 8 hours and when I woke up that first morning after, I was in utter amazement on how young my chest skin appeared... The wrinkles that I had noticed where "G-O-N-E"... I immediately thought to myself, this is a miracle... I am kicking myself now because I waited so long to actually try this type of product... This a great price for 2, and they work amazingly... Washing it for the first time is what sold me completely on this product... This would be the moment of truth (for me) to see if the product was as good as it says it is...  I was baffled that it functioned just as well after washing it as it did when I used it for the first time... I have not missed a night using this product... I will be buying a package a month from now on, as I will never be without these wrinkle blasters... EVER... I will have a stock pile of these baby's on hand at all times... I've been shouting from the roof tops to all my friends about this product!!! These are a must have for every woman out there...

Edited review: I received the newly designed chest pads a few days ago, and wanted to give an updated review. The pad is larger and covers more surface area, and the adhesive backing is improved in that it does not "shed" and peel off after time. However, the pad is stiffer, does not stick to my skin as well, and it comes loose around the edges while I sleep. I have to say I slightly prefer the older version of these pads, but this product still works great at removing wrinkles and softening the skin and I will continue using them.

I am a side sleeper and I do try to change that so I don't end up with the wrinkle lines like I see so many women have. I do not know what all causes these lines but I will tell you this, I will be 61 years old this summer and you would not know it by looking at my chest. The reason I won’t buy from this vendor again is because after I informed the vendor that I got the flyer for the free wig and after I left my review they have not contacted me regarding my free wig. I bought this product after wearing Eyelash Extensions for about 3 months. I removed the extensions and my eyelashes were much shorter than what they were before I tried the extensions. Don't believe when they say wearing extensions will not damage your regular lashes. Mine were extremely short and very thin.

I was excited to use this product to hopefully get my eyelashes to grow faster.

Unfortunately, however, I cannot recommend the product. I did not notice any difference in the length of my lashes. Also, my eyes became very red. Therefore, I stopped using the product after about 3 weeks.
I'll have to look for something that doesn't irritate my eyes.

rating 5.0. Works for me Took me awhile to write this because I wanted to see how well this product works ...for me. I've read many reviews on this product pro and cons and did my research on the ingredients before purchasing.After two weeks, glad to say that it doesn't change the color of my irises (already dark brown...it would be great to have a nice shade of green though) or cause the surrounding areas of the eye to have a weird eyeliner effect or possible grow extra hair on the tops of my eye lids lol! I am well aware that what works for me may not work for another and that everyone has different hair types as well as growth rates base on different factors such as genetics, diets, habits, etc. Well, it definitely works. It does thickens and strengthens my lashes. Doesn't pull out easily when I try to brush my lashes straight. Also, I've noticed that the wild lashes have started  to straighten out (the ones that grow at a curve or turn upside down when pulled). Yes, it does burn a little in the beginning of using it but wears off with continued use. I've read not to put on bottom of lashes but I've done this with no problem (just keep in mind that its a small brush so if you dont want brush it into your eyeball, position the brush first and then close your eyes and gently stroke the bottom of eyelid). Right now, the results are good enough to continue using:-)

input: rating 5.0. great product I loved the way it worked, I have tried many and this one works. Will for sure use it again.

rating 5.0. Great exfoliant I order this for my daughter and use it occasionally myself.  The only ingredient is glycolic acid and does not have and a lot of other ingredients, which I am a little tired of.  I was glad to see that Amazon carries this product since you cannot buy it in any local stores.

rating 4.0. I suppose I could live without this product, but I wouldn't want to... So, I wanted to wait a week before I posted my review. I felt that would be enough time to see some minimal effects, and see how my skin reacted to the product.

Well, as the product warned and from reading other reviews, it did sting a little after application. However, I have used AHA products before and have done glycolic peels, so I wasn't bothered or surprised by it.

By the fifth day, the stinging was only felt around my nose, and probably because I tend to have a heavy hand with any products I use.

Well, I don't really have wrinkles. I'm in my early 30s, but people always ask me if I'm in my 20s. My mom and grandmother also look quite young for their ages, so I may have some good genes...

But, that doesn't mean I won't try to do what I can (within my budget) to keep my skin looking the best it can. I have some old acne scars from years ago. I have done $800 peels with a dermatologist and such in the past and I didn't notice life-changing results. Well, this product seems to make my skin look softer, and it gives it a glow it doesn't have when I don't use it.

After using it for a week, I find that I like it a lot. I actually look forward to washing my face and putting in on. I just ordered the face wash today because I like this product so much. I have some freckles on my nose and those look like they are fading. I'm going to keep using this product. The price is right, and I feel my results will continue to improve.

rating 2.0. It wasn't efective for me. After using it for over 3 months, I can't report any noticeable change in skin's texture/completion. Not reordering.
I did feel a little tingling after application in days I had had used an exfoliator prior to this, but that's it.

rating 5.0. Great stuff!! Glycolic Acid is the one ingredient that you want your facial products to have. If you have problem skin such as acne, uneven skin tone, oily skin, dry skin or wrinkles you can count on glycolic acid to fix those problems. I bought this product because glycolic acid was recommended for my skin by my skin care specialist many years ago. I have uneven skin texture, oilyness and acne. I bought some very pricey glycolic acid from her and it did work wonders but the price was way too much for me ($50.00 a jar!). So ever since I have been searching for something similiar and I think I have found it with the "Alpha Hydroxy" line. And who can beat that price?? When I say I searched for similiar products, I am not kidding. I have thrown out and gave away (not to mention stored away) so many products that didn't work it is crazy.

One thing you must understand is that you have got to be faithful with this stuff. Don't skimp and don't skip treatments unless you have a skin reaction. First you got to get your pores open and a simple pot of steaming water with a towel wrapped over your head should do the trick. Buy the facial wash and wash your face gently. Slather this souffle on and go to bed. You should feel some tingle and that is good because that means you got some open pores and this souffle is sinking in. If you don't feel the tingle, don't give up on this product! Keep using this every day and you should see some difference in a week or so.

I can't believe the difference in my skin in only two weeks. And the amazing part is that I could see a difference in my skin texture within the first few days. The climate here is very dry and my skin was suffering from being too dry also. This product fixed that. AMAZING! My acne along the jawline is also clearing up a little at a time. But it is going away and that is a huge relief because this product is working. The fine lines on my forehead are also slowly disappearing.

One more thing about using this product for acne. I was watching a infomercial about a new skin care line that is supposed to be better than ProActive (which I have tried and it didn't work). I wanted to see what the main ingredient was because they did not use benzoyl peroxide. I couldn't believe it when they said glycolic acid was their main ingredient. And here we are getting the same benefits with the "Alpha Hydroxy" line without having to be bothered with orders over the phone, trial memberships and pushing more products that we don't want or need.

Glycolic acid can be pricey so to be getting a jar for this price is a bargain. Don't let that cheap price fool you....this stuff works.

rating 5.0. Non greasy, non irratating, and makes my skin look smooth. I have been using this product for more than a year now and it is a regular to my beauty routine. I wash my face at night, put on a eye moisturizer, and than put this product on my face. Remember to wash your hands when your done, bc this product can stain your towels and pillow case. I started using this product with a lower AHA level and then moved up to this % when I thought my skin could handle it (sometimes my combo skin can be sensitive). My skin looks healthy with a glow in the morning, and I believe better in the morning than at night bc of this product. I recommend this product to someone looking for smoother skin without grease or irritation.

rating 5.0. Does what it should. This is excellent for getting dead skin off of your face. It works really well - I like to put it on in the AM and then follow with Retin-A in the PM after washing my face before bed. It works wonders for discoloration or retinoid-induced flaking.

rating 5.0. Helps skin feel and look softer. I've tried many products but this after one use ad softened fine lines. I had be careful how long I left it on my neck because it turned red. It's strong which is great!  Definitely will buy again.

rating 1.0. Wanted to love it! After reading the raving reviews, I decided to give this a try! I wanted to see if it would even out my skin tone since I did have some lingering scars from an acne battle I had in the past. After a couple nights of using this product, my face was so irritated and my chin began to break out like crazy. It looked like a had braille across my entire chin. The breakout area hurt and it was so dry, I was shocked. I decided to stop putting it on a night and went through my nightly regime as normal and my chin is starting to clear up. I really wanted to like this product but I think the product was just to harsh for my face. I'm happy it works for some people, oh well, the hunt continues!

rating 5.0. Wonderful I am in my mid-30's with combination/oily, fair, sensitive, acne-prone skin. I've been using this for over a year & strongly recommend it to everyone. At first I had to use it only once a week until my skin adjusted to it (took a few weeks), now I use it twice a week.

rating 5.0. saves $$ & gives beautiful skin amazing line of products; inexpensive and very efficient. high concentration of active ingredients, no fragrance or coloring; i'm using the entire line-without a doubt beats high end brands like Peter Roth whose products are quite fascinating but glycolic producs didn't really work for my skin.

rating 5.0. YES! You Can Feel It Working! You definitely feel tingling and a slight to moderate stinging shortly after applying the cream. My face started looking healthier and more radiant within a few days after first using. I've also noticed that the fine lines on my forehead seem to be decreasing....YIPPEE!

But, be sure to heed the warnings about avoiding your lips or you'll end up with severely chapped lips like me, and always follow-up with sunscreen before going out in the sun.

rating 5.0. Highly recommended. Even though this is advertised for fine lines, I use it for acne (because of its high AHA content).  It clears skin up within 6 weeks and evens out tone.  I'm not wasting my money on anything else now that I know this product is out there, and is very affordable.

rating 4.0. If it ain't broke, don't fix it. I'm very disappointed in the new tube version of AHA Souffle. It has been reformulated and now has a different consistency that does not seem to absorb as well. It also leaves my skin feeling dryer than the cream version, which made my skin feel dewy for several hours after application. It also goes much faster, because you can't as easily control how much you use. Accidentally squeeze a little too much, and you have to use it, because you can't put it back in the tube.

Shame on you, Alpha Hydrox. You downgraded the best AHA product on the market.

rating 5.0. I tell all my friends to use this product! I bought this product after having crazy acne in my mid-30's.  After making my first-ever trip to the dermatologist at 35 and being prescribed a $200 medication, I knew I needed to find an alternative treatment.  After doing tons of research and reading many reviews for products on Amazon, I decided to try this product.  I had read several reviews that said you should give the product 3-4 weeks before making a judgment about whether or not it was working.  I am so glad I read those, because for a few weeks, I felt like my face was getting worse.  There were a few, frustrating breakouts after I started the cream, but by the end of the month, I was SOLD!  I tell all of my friends about this product!  Not only did it clear up my acne, but it makes my skin feel more hydrated and even softened the overall appearance of my skin!  I cannot say enough about this product!
rating 5.0. Smooth I use it to help keep menopausal acne at bay. Works.it keeps my skin hydrated and helps it heal. Not drying or irritating..
rating 1.0. One Star Didn't do anything to help my skin

rating 5.0. Love it Really great product. I'm 28 and have been using it semi-regularly at night for about 1 1/2 months. My skin is so much brighter and softer, it's lessened my dark spots from a patch of acne and really improved the texture of my skin. It does sting/tingle a bit a first and there is a period of "detox" so some pimples might come to the surface but after that it's really great.

rating 5.0. Feel It Working I'd used the Alpha Hydrox brand in the past, always with great results, but never the 12% solution. Here's the thing: When you put this lotion on you can actually feel it working. There's a mild tingle/burning sensation. And within minutes you can detect a discernible difference in your skin's appearance. If you're looking for a product that tones your skin, reduces fine lines and wrinkles, and fades dark circles under the eyes, look no further. This stuff is inexpensive, a jar lasts a long time, and it works absolute wonders.

rating 5.0. Have been using this for 5 years and love it. I am in my 50's and this ... Arrived on time.  Have been using this for 5 years and love it.  I am in my 50's and this works wonderful.  I do use other Alpha Hydrox as well and very pleased with this line.

rating 5.0. Terrific! - Beware of packaging I am in my late 30s with fair skin and adult onset acne. I have started using the souffle about three months ago and have seen great results in not only significant reduction of break outs, but also in the way old scars and spots fade and become less visible. I should say that this product does take a couple of weeks to get used to as it did leave my skin stinging just slightly after application at first and I did see some redness. However, as the instruction leaflet says these do go away. Some people may find it helpful to use every other day at first, which is what I did. I now use the face wash from this line and the lotion which I use on my body every now and then, not daily. I do see that my skin looks brighter and more radiant. I am very happy with having finally found a product that works. Just do not forget to use a sunscreen!

UPD: The product no longer comes packaged as described. I attempted to receive what's pictured twice, and had to return it twice. The souffle used to come in a JAR, but only comes in a TUBE now. For those who don't like creams in a tube (I don't because a lot more of it is wasted as it is impossible to squeeze out exact amounts and pointless to get whatever little is left when the tube is almost empty) this is a point to consider. Amazon needs t change product description and picture. Switching to 10% cream from this line as it is available in a jar.

rating 5.0. Difference was immediately visible While this product came highly recommended, I wasn't expecting to wake up the first morning after using it and see a dramatic improvement in the texture of my skin. But that is what happened. I have some mild acne (close comedones) and have been fighting stubborn fine lines on my forehead, and both looked miles better. My skin was smooth and firm and beautiful. I was not sure if starting with such a high percentage of AHA would cause irritation, but I have not had any issues. I have been using it for about a week now and my skin consistently looks beautiful. I'm really pleased by the results, especially considering the price of the product.

rating 5.0. AMAZING I've been using this product off and on for about a year now. I feel like it's a face lift in a bottle. I use the Alpha Hydrox lotion on my back and it cleared up any blemishes I would get from time to time. I've never had perfect skin in my life until I tried this line of products. I will warn that if you get this product on sensitive areas, it can burn. I've gotten cold sores before if I accidentally get it on my lips. It can irritate sensitive skin so keep it away from those areas.

rating 5.0. Only a week and my skin is FABULOUS! I've only been using this product for a little over a week and can already see a marked difference in the condition of my skin.  I am in my upper 20's with combination skin, large pores on my nose and on the apples of my cheeks, and am prone to adult acne.  I'm starting to see very slight laugh lines and a few lines between my eyebrows.  After just a week, my skin is smoother, my pores are refined, and my fine lines are diminishing.  ONE WEEK!  My skin has not broken out and purged yet as others have warned.  My acne scars have faded.  My skin is not oily nor dry when using this product and I have not had any sensitivity issues (I usually have sensitive skin).  This has been a miracle product!  I have been using it morning and night after cleansing, and have no problems applying makeup over it as it absorbs well into the skin.  A little bit goes a long way.  If you're looking to try a glycolic acid product for minor resurfacing, this is a great place to start.  It's an excellent product for the price!

rating 5.0. Amazing Product! I am absolutely thrilled with the results that I have gotten with this product in the short time that I have been using it. I am skeptical about most products that promise results in which acne or fine lines will improve dramatically with use but this is the only one that has delivered on those promises for me.

I am 36 years old and I have fair, sensitive, oily, extremely acne prone skin and it has been a problem for me for over 20 years. I have tried everything to keep my acne under control. Everything! But nothing has ever worked for long. My biggest problem is pores that clog like crazy and nothing I tried could keep them clear, so I would be broken out constantly or just ready to break out. It doesn't help that I am skin obsessed either ( touching and picking is a no-no, but I couldn't help it) so my skin always looked raw and sore. I also have scarring and and using makeup to help cover the damage only made me break out more, so I felt helpless everyday and depressed.

After going to a dermatologist, he said that I was going about this the wrong way entirely. I had been using benzoyl peroxide products and he said that for older skin this can aggravate the problem even more. Instead, he gave me a glycolic acid/ salicylic acid face wash and told me to try this product in addition to see if it helped at all to keep my pores unclogged and it really does! I used to have many blackheads and clogged pores and now they are drastically reduced. I look at my skin and see very few to none now and for me that is a miracle. I am losing the desire to constantly touch my face as well. This product makes your skin baby soft and helps to erase fine lines too. I also use it on my chest, where I also used to break out constantly, and that has helped enormously as well.

The price, benefits and promises that this product deliver are all reasons to buy this product. But you will keep using it after discovering how amazing it can be for your skin to be mostly clear almost all of the time if you have suffered with acne as I have. I am so so happy with the results I got.

When first using it your skin will tingle and feel burning, but that goes away. I only use it at night and I also mix the product with moisturizer to hydrate my skin at the same time. Also, you might break out a little until you have used the product for a few days as I did, but then I cleared up and have stayed clear. This truly is a miracle in a jar!

rating 5.0. As Powerful as an Electric Water Flosser I like to use a water flosser as part of my daily dental routine. I had a problem as to what to do when I traveled and was gone from home for long stretches. The h2o water flosser has solved that problem! The varied levels of pressure are perfect for whatever level of pressure you might desire. I had purchased a different brand of cordless water pick but its weak stream of water meant it wasn't worth the room that it took up in my suitcase. The h2o cordless flosser is as powerful as an electric flosser. Its sleek design is not only beautiful but easy to pack in the provided bag. A case is also included for the many different flosser attachments. The water tank holds enough for a complete floss without the need to refill. Quite simply I love this flosser. If you are a traveler or prefer a cordless flosser this is the perfect accessory for you or gift for the travellers in your life.

rating 5.0. Good flosser for the money DESIGN:

The chrome-plated plastic buttons and cap add a nice touch to the look of the flosser, but it feels a little cheap and will probably wear off quickly. The overall fit and finish is good. It has a nice weight to it—not too heavy or too light. It fits rather comfortably in the hand, even small hands, but the placement of the on/off button creates the sensation that you may unintentionally push it. It doesn’t seem to be a problem, though. The charging port comes with a small rubber insert to protect it from water. It works well, but because it is not attached to the unit, it could easily be lost. It does come with an extra one, though, so that it nice. The portability of this cordless flosser is what I like the most.

PERFORMANCE:

The performance is very good. The power of the water is perfect. One thing I did notice, in comparison to my countertop flosser, is that the third level of power on the cordless flosser is about same as the first level of power on the countertop unit. So, it does not seem quite as powerful as the countertop unit, though the advantage of the portability outweighs the slight loss of power. As for me, I don’t use the highest setting on my countertop unit, anyway, so it is not an issue. A great thing about this flosser is that it is quiet. It doesn’t sound like you are using power tools in your bathroom every time you are flossing. Bottom line, I love this flosser. I think it is a great product for the money. The experience is pleasant, and it does its job well. All in all, a good buy.

rating 2.0. Design flaw This works well, but has a major design flaw: The on/off button and the button that varies the water pressure are right next to each other. When you are using the flosser in the shower (with your eyes shut so you don't get hit in the eye) you often miss the on/off button and increase the water pressure by mistake. And let me tell you, the highest water pressure is hazardous. In one case it cut my lip!

They should have the two buttons separated, or at least distinguished so that you don't mistakenly rivet yourself with high water pressure.

rating 4.0. Test Small Amounts Sparingly First I decided to purchase some castor oil at the recommendation of a friend to promote hair/lash growth.  The order was prompt and packaged well.  I love the bottle that it comes in, and it serves as a bonus cute decoration in my bathroom.  I applied the oil to my top and bottom lashes with a q-tip at night to promote hair growth.  After a few days of this, I noticed that I started to develop several chalazions in my eyelids which form when oil glands in the eyelid become blocked/clogged.  I also tested a little bit out on my face as a moisturizer and noticed that a small pimple formed the next day.  After giving the regimen a rest, I have slowly begun to try to apply it again and it doesn't seem as though any new chalazions are forming, so maybe it was purely coincidental.  I kept the four stars because the quality of the oil is good and it seems to be a fair price for what you get.  I would just encourage anyone to use sparingly and test small areas of skin first before liberally applying anywhere.

rating 3.0. Dip Powder Manicure Approved! This little drill is great for a novice like myself. I was tired of paying $35 to have a dip manicure so I invested in a kit and started doing them myself. Now filing my nails seems to be the bane of my existence so that why I purchased this drill. It's small and inexpensive which is what we're clearly looking for. I read lots of reviews that spoke of this unit being portable but let me clarify. IT DOES NOT WORK WITHOUT BEING CONNECTED TO A SHORT CORD! Let me tell you what a pain that is! Based on the other reviews I thought I could charge it, then walk around freely with it. No such luck. You have to keep it plugged in. Bummer. I also dislike the package did not come with instructions on how to use the nail bits or what they are for. Or even directions on how to put them in. Thank you to the people who posted videos. I had to do some research and found this great video that explained everything about the nail bits. [...] . Put those things aside this drill is pretty darn good for the price. It isn't strong and I like that. Like I said I'm a rookie at doing nails so the last thing I need is a powerful drill that murders my cuticles. Yes, it does stop if you apply too much pressure. That's a plus in my opinion - another safety feature for me. It does a great job of filing down old dip powder just enough so soaking them off doesn't take forever. It's great to smooth out your dip mani when it's too thick. The unit does get warm when used but has never clonked out on me. It does not have a forward or reverse feature like some of the more expensive ones. Big whoop! I didn't need it! I'm pretty content with my purchase.

rating 2.0. A decent drill...while it works I bought this to file down acrylic nails I was doing on myself with dual nail forms (which I don't recommend if you have high c-curve nails, by the way). At first I had to watch a video to figure out to put on the bits, but once I got the hang of it, it was quick and easy. To turn it on, there's a little wheel towards the bottom of the drill where you can control the speed. It worked well enough for filling, though I mostly used the barrel bit for buffing and the sanding for taking down length. The other tapered bits weren't too useful, they didn't work well for filing underneath the nail. Overall, compared to a professional drill I'm sure this is much slower, but also much safer.

That was about 8 months ago, and since then I've used it about 10 times. I used it one more time for acrylics and the rest of the time to (very gently and slowly) file off top coat from gel nails for easier removal. Just a couple of days ago while doing the latter, the drill wouldn't turn on. I moved it around, and it would start and stop in short bursts as I would move it around trying to use it. That means the adapter cord is already damaged, which is ridiculous considering how little use I got out of it. For this reason I'm taking off three stars, no product should being to fail so quickly. Look elsewhere for a drill, unless you don't mind dealing with a faulty adapter.

rating 4.0. Great product for price. Great product for the price.

Use: Easy use but I wish the drill didn't turn on with a switch but rather with a button where the thumb would be when holding the product. Allows for more control of the tool as opposed to using both hands to turn the machine on and off.

Product: All drill bits shown were included and great but they weren't as "sharp" as a professional would want. If you wanted to file of the edge of an acrylic nail to shorten it, it would take a little more time but overall it's not that much weaker.

The bits: You have to unscrew the top to remove the bits which is a bit of a hassle since you can't easily take it on and off but no big deal if you're using the tool on yourself and not a client.

The charger: It sucks. It's a really short cord so you need to sit really close to a wall switch.

Overall it's a great starter kit especially for the price so I'm satisfied and look forward to using the product. I would recommend to people who plan on doing their own nails but not for professionals who want to work on clients.

rating 5.0. works as advertised but remember few additional tips This very thick and slippery gel is definitely different than your typical massage oil.  Key is to follow the instructions on the bottle.  Can't overemphasize that especially on the part where it says 'Take a shower or bath. Do not dry off' before using the gel.  There are already very informative reviews posted on Amazon.  With dry central heat in the room, it got tacky pretty quick. I had put the strong wooden bowl (containing the gel) into the bathroom sink of very hot water before use of the gel.  A warm massage gel feels better than cold on the skin.  When the gel becomes tacky (and it will unless your room is humid and temperature is super hot), spray some warm water on the skin to get the gel fluid again.  Again, warm water feels better than cold unless you are both really hot and don't care what temperature the water is at.  Keeping nearby a spray nozzle bottle with warm water should do the trick.  As advertised, it seems to be taste-free.  Not so sure it is fragrance-free but what  'smell' there was it seemed to be pleasant and very light scented.

Its been about three weeks since ive been using it, and I must admit I was higly skeptical with all the paid reviews. For the price it couldn't hurt to try. After week one no noticeable difference. Going into week two my strech marks looked absolutely worst, but I kept on using it. I started back using bio oil and by accident applied the anti cellulite cream. I used a spa massager to rub it in until it was dissolved. At the beginning of week three I saw drastic improvement in my strech marks. They've improved to the point that I don't feel so bad about them. They're entirely not gone yet but its faded enough that I can show my stomach and not be so self conscious. I gave this product 4 stars because it worked well for me. As time goes on I will update my review. I will definatley purchase another bottle.

rating 5.0. My quest appears to be over, FINALLY a treasure, after 20+ years of trying non-aluminum deodorants! Howdy intrepid aluminum-free deodorant researchers and adventurers!

I've spent hundreds of dollars over 20+ years buying Schmidts, Native, Tom's, Lume, Kopari, Lavanila, the natural salt crystals, making my own using a schmear of coconut oil and then patting some baking soda on top of it, and some men's Deos like Old Spice, hoping to find something that works for me. Some things worked ok for odor, but stained my shirts' underarm areas, or irritated the underarms.

Native, for example, works great for my young adult son, but not for me -- irritates my underarms. This Nivea 0% Aluminum Fresh Pure doesn't irritate and lasts ALL DAY! Where has this been all my life?! Hiding in plain sight in Europe, where so many Good Things reside, evidently.

After about a week of using the Nivea -- today, I sanitized and gave my son several barely used Native scents I'd tried but can't keep using. YAY for this product!! It smells clean and soapy, some reviewers have said floral but to me, it's more light and soapy-clean and I LOVE love love it. But if you're sensitive to scents, this isn't for you, I suspect.

Yep, I'm aware the ingredients aren't all-natural, edible, organic, free-range and all that, but better than putting aluminum on my armpits daily and better than stinking. I've tried the edible and free-range deos and they don't work on me. lol.

Everyone's body chemistry is different so your mileage can and likely will, vary, but this is well worth a try, imo.

p.s. And bonus: I LOVE the glass bottle and design of the label. Love the heft of the bottle, bi-lingual text and design, feels like I popped into a pharmacy in Europe and picked this up, and since it's the closest I'll get to Europe for a long time, I'm afraid, I'll take it and dream about a walk along the Seine while applying this every day.

A while later after using this deodorant I realized it had dried and the stickiness was gone. Thank goodness!  Even the pleasant scent calmed down so as not to compete with perfume. rating 4.0. Excellent - gentle and effective but... This works exceptionally well for an aluminum-free alternative.  Most of the time, I will use Nivea antiperspirant once or twice a week, and supplement it with this deodorant. Antiperspirant seems to last through washes, so I don't need to apply it every day.  I don't have the kind of body that can go with using only deodorant, and often times even antiperspirant fails.  This Nivea deodorant really does work for getting rid of odor, and because it dried in the armpit, it seems to make a seal that stops sweat a bit.  One word of warning...this deodorant has a REALLY STRONG scent.  If you are bothered by fragrances, you may not like this at all.  It definitely clashes with perfume for a few hours of wear, and if applied at night, I found the fragrance to be annoying and it game me a headache. There are other aluminum-free Nivea formula with different fragrances that I'm going to try to see if their perfume is less pungent. Also - it smells like "deodorant" even though it's a fresh scent.  Anybody near to me could be thinking "Wow, she wears a lot of deodorant."

rating 5.0. Fresh Pure scent is terrific! Personally, I prefer the deodorant-only products that are easy to wash off, whereas I find that antiperspirants seem to stick to me in the shower and have to be scrubbed off or else they build up over time. On me, antiperspirants also darken my armpits.

Keep in mind if you are ordering [[ASIN:B00NQ2CCOQ Genuine Authentic German Nivea Deodorant Fresh Pure Aluminum Free 1.69 fl.oz / 50ml]] deordorant, it is *just* a deodorant, and *not* an antiperspirant. Which means your armpits can sweat. Which means that while *you* won't smell (because you are wearing a deodorant), your clothes *will* after the sweat dries on them. So you will only get a single wearing out of a shirt if you sweat, but my clothes are washable, so that is OK with me. If I had to pay for dry-cleaning, I might have a different opinion.

I've tried this scent (Fresh Pure) and another scent (Fresh Natural) and the Fresh Pure scent is terrific. The other one I did not like, although another reviewer did, so your experience may vary.

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. HOLY. MOLY. HOLY. GRAIL. Wow. As someone with a skinny eyebrow shape and yet thicker hairs on my eyebrows, it’s been hard for me to shop for eyebrow products my entire life. I’ve tried everything from the beloved Anastasia’s to higher end brands like Tom Ford and Charlotte Tillbury, even drugstore products and Japanese and Korean products and I think I’ve finally found my holy grail. This kept on me all day at work, even though I had to walk for a good distance in the rain to my car. It didn’t smudge or budge a bit for the entirety of my day and I’ve NEVER had a product that wasn’t eaten up by my weird eyebrows or completely disappeared. This product did it all. A little goes a long way, and the best part was it was so easy to get a natural and defined eyebrow shape that didn’t go over the top or too heavy either. I will be buying all my eyebrow products from them from now on. Best $9 I ever spent.

rating 5.0. oil cleansing method + clarisonic! my skin is finally starting to show its age and my lazy lack of care for the past 47 years. i've never had a cleanser i've particularly loved, and i've never been good about washing my face other than in the shower. i decided to try the oil cleansing method and a clarisonic, and i got this oil after seeing this type recommended on crunchy betty. i LOVE it. i use it on my face and body all over, a few drops applied to the clarisonic, and my skin feels and looks amazing. because it's not messy, smelly, or splashy all over the bathroom, i actually use it pretty much every day, too. never going back to commercial cleansers or body washes again.

rating 5.0. love, love, love this! I bought this oil after using their avocado oil. Life-Flo is a great brand. I've never had issues with any of their products. This oil is food grade, cold pressed. It is a lighter weight than their avocado oil, but it works just as well. I use this on my son who is two to help his skin retain moisture (he has severe eczema). I put a cap full in his bath and apply it all over after his bath while he is still damp. His skin is soft and his eczema spots are softer, not as rough, but I still have to apply a layer of Vaseline to his rough patches to keep him from scratching and to keep his spots super moisturized. I use it on his scalp also once a week. I massage it through his hair and let it soak in while he's playing in the tub and I follow it put by shampooing his hair like normal. It absorbs quickly, and I do apply it throughout the day when I change his diaper. It doesn't have a scent to it really, which is a plus since I have to be careful with perfumes with him. It does make your tub slippery if you add it to your bath water, I always clean the tub after his bath to be on the safe side. We usually go through a 12 oz bottle every six months so it lasts a while compared to a gel baby oil (we go through one of them a month if we use it).  A little bit goes a long way. This oil used in conjunction with Vaseline and his prescription meds helps keeps his eczema in check, and I have discovered that we are using his prescription med less since we swapped over to this oil. For us this oil is more effective than coconut, avocado, baby oil, ceteaphil, or aveeno.  If it's for eczema we have tried it. He's had eczema since he was 3 months old and I feel like we finally found a product that I know is safe to use, it's all natural, no chemicals, and it's within budget.

rating 4.0. Okay moisturizer - keeps skin healthy but takes long time to absorb I decided to try Life-Flo's apricot oil after using their avocado oil, which I love. I use it as I had read that apricot oil was supposed to be thinner than avo oil, but it felt way heavier (almost greasy) on my skin and took a lot longer to fully absorb! I'd end up smudging oil on things frequently, not a problem I had with avocado oil after the first 10-15 mins or so. I also prefer the smell of the avocado oil and the way my skin feels with it to the apricot oil. I'm a litte disappointed.

Just a few days ago I figured out that I have to pat all the excess oil off my body after letting my skin absorb it for a bit. It felt so much less oily and lighter. If you're having issues with oiliness, definitely pat off any excess.

I'm giving it 4 stars because it does keep my skin very soft and healthy despite my dislikes with it in other areas (my skin is dry and itchy which the oil helps immensely). It's a good product and it works, but I'll be returning to the avocado oil next time.

rating 5.0. Different yes, I use it daily :) With cosmetics online it's difficult if you haven't seen the product first hand,choosing colors.

At first I cringed at the orange of the bronzer. Yet once applied they all blend well. It's a Fall / Winter combo for me.

rating 4.0. Works on pale skin, sorta! I have to start by saying that I am a super pale girl! Therefore, my review might not be the best frame of reference (unless you are also a super pale person). The contour and bronzer shade are amazing! The contour specifically is the kind of shade that is neutral enough that it doesn't look out odd. It functions really well. A light hand is always a good idea. It is easy to build, as is the bronzer! This actually might be one of my most favorite bronzers. I 10/10 prefer matte over shimmer. I mean, its more orange on my skin than it would be on more fair than light skin, but its the kind of shade that can dual as a blush too. I like it, it brings the life back in me. The only thing is the highlight shade. I cannot use it for my face. It makes a decent light color for the eyes if I need it. Its just too dark on me and cannot do the job. Still, I don't regret buying this. The packaging is plastic, but really nice! It comes with a brush, but I used my own. Contour and bronzer blend out really easily too! Lastly, theres a little mirror which is always a bonus!

rating 4.0. Not ideal for very pale skin, but usable For the record, I am a longtime Physicians Formula wearer, and their products can be hit or miss. I am not being paid to leave a review, or representing anyone but myself here. This is the first time I tried PF's countouring powder, and I've used it for about three seasons. I like it. I don't love it.

I have very pale skin with pink undertones that is uber-sensitive and I have to be very careful about sun exposure. Anything can make me break out in hives or eczema, at any time, even if I used it daily for years. Thankfully, PF products have never done that to me, in almost a decade.

As for this product, the shades are where I take some issue. They worked best for my tone in summer, but now, in winter -- I'm shopping for a different product.

* The dark shade is really mahogany-like, so I have to blend, blend, blend in daylight or risk looking like I smeared mud on my face. It's good for shading jawline and cheekbones with a light touch at temples if you need it. Beware, though. If you are very pale, you want a very light touch with this one.

*The medium shade is very subtle and helps blend and soften the dark. It also works well as a matte bronzer, around sides of the nose, and wherever you need just a little definition. This is the best shade of the bunch, honestly. At least for my skin tone.

* The light shade is, frankly, worthless to me. It gives my skin a pasty, chalky look and looks heavy. Yuck. I occasionally use it in tiny spots as a concealer, but as a contour powder, it just looks like I put on way too much setting powder or something. Instead, I use my lightest shade of matte eyeshadow (also a PF product) and a higher-end illuminator for highlighting. Those results are beautiful, frankly, even on my 38 year old skin.

All in all, PF's contour colors are suitable for pale skin, but may be better on other slightly darker or warmer skin tones, or on summer tanned skin.

rating 4.0. Top 3 Contour for Ghostly Pale Skin I'm about as fair as they come. That makes finding contour powders difficult.  The center color in this palette is in my top three favorites.  I like that it's very cool.  It edges towards a slightly purple/grey taupe without being so purple/grey that I have to be careful.  It goes on sheer,but really nicely pigmented.  If I want it to be a little warmer, I'll blend it with the lightest shade of Profusion Cosmetics contour powder. It's also a great ghostly contour if wanting a cool taupe without the purple/grey undertone. The Profusion one is just a skosch warmer.  I don't use the outside powders normally. The bronzer color could work for eyeshadow, I guess. The highlight is too dark for me and is chalky looking on my skin.  If they ever make the center color as a contour all by itself, I'd be really happy.  The  one thing I don't like about this product is the container. Mine won't open all the way without lifting the bottom up and it drives me nuts because I can't just open it and sit it on my vanity.  It will close if I try.  Other than that, it's probably the cheapest contour that works great for really pale skin, and it blows every luxury brand I've tried out of the water.  Two thumbs up!

There is a small brush that comes with this setj, which is nice.  It has soft bristles and a nice angle.  There is also a nice size mirror considering this is small.

rating 5.0. It really works! I bought three different plaque/calculus removers, not knowing which one would work best, and opened this one first because it was the least expensive with the highest rating.  The other two will be returned unopened!  The Meeteasy removed stains and plaque near the gum lime and back of my teeth in less than 15 minutes - I could feel the difference running my tongue against my teeth.  I keep it on my desk and use it when my hands are free - it's lightweight, quiet and pain free!

rating 5.0. It actually works I was skeptical at first. But this device does remove plaque from teeth and quite efficiently and easily. I am 2 weeks out from my bi-annual cleaning. I had some plaque build-up on my lower teeth (front and back). I put the device on high and it removed all of the built-up plaque. I was amazed. The back of the teeth was a bit harder for me. My advice is don't be afraid of the device harming your teeth. Once I "dug" in the plaque was gone!

rating 4.0. PLAQUE BE GONE! When I first used this product, I thought it wasnt working because nothing was really happening.  I read the directions about the angle in which you are supposed to hold the tool for it to work properly and Voila! It worked like a champ!!! Removed some plaque I had on the backside of my bottom teeth! Thank goodness for the mirror that comes with it! My gums DID bleed! This thing is sensitive so be careful!!! Recommended to everyone I know!
rating 1.0. Do not buy This does not work at all as advertised.

rating 5.0. Very useful I have been using Waterpic flossing. I was surprised to see this descaler was able to locate and remove food items even after water flossing.  Now I use descaler first and then use waterflossing to flush out things dislodged by descaler. Another surprise discovery is - this is a much better tooth pick. It effortlessly removes any food particles stuck in the teeth,
rating 3.0. Not worth it No difference noted. I could use a pick at get more/the same off. Not worth it.

rating 1.0. Doesn't do anything I don't see how this would possibly work. The metal part is rounded and dull, it also doesn't move at all. So it's just a vibrating piece of metal. Not sure how this is supposed to do anything? These other reviews have to be fake?

rating 5.0. It helps. I have notice a difference.

rating 5.0. Easy to Use! I purchased this item due to the dentist recommending getting a device that could remove plaque from the teeth in between cleanings.  I tried it at first on low setting so I could get used to the sensation.  Slowly I increased the intensity which seem to actually be more effective especially on the back of my lower teeth where most build up occurs.  I would recommend this device to anyone looking to take better care of their teeth between cleanings.

rating 5.0. For the cost, it's pretty impressive I've had plaque issues for a couple of years, with a periodontist suggesting a $3350 cleaning. I don't know if this item will take care of everything, but it certainly has lived up to the manufacturer's claims so far. Originally, I was going to return the item without even opening it, but that periodontal estimate had me blinking. I'm glad I tried it out, and I'm quite pleased.

rating 2.0. The machine felt useless. Only needed the side pieces to get the job done The machine doesnt really do much other than vibrate. And in my experience trying it, the vibrating does nothing but risk cutting your gums. I had more success using the manual metal pieces. So to save you money, dont bother with the machine.

rating 1.0. WASTE OF MONEY DISLIKE. This is just a vibrating piece of metal.MISLEADING!!! How can it polish your teeth?  It did absolutely nothing for me. Maybe if u have layers of tarter on your teeth it may work. Delivered today,tested today,requesting refund TODAY. HIGHLY DISAPPOINTED!!

rating 5.0. Great Mini ultrasonic.! Great mini ultrasonic.!! Has diffrent levels from low to high.! This little machine is great for people that buildup easy & its great for at home care , i really reccomend people who have severe buildup to still go to the dentist , perio disease is no joke.!

rating 4.0. Good value Arrived in 2 days to Hawaii, quality stainless steel dental pick and mirror, this calculus remover apparently has five speeds but doesn't indicate in the instructions what the different speeds are for nor even how to adjust them. Questionable whether or not this kind of device can remove stains but it definitely removes hardened plaque and calculus without the potential hazard of cutting yourself with the manual tools. I will definitely use this device on a regular basis to maintain healthy teeth and to travel with it. Half the price of other brands and appears to be identical.

rating 5.0. Excellent Plaque and Calcium Remover I adore this product! I ordered a system to whiten my teeth but needed something to remove calcium/plaque on the bottom portion of my teeth. I saw the dental calculus remover and decided to try it. I am so pleased I did. It has numerous speeds, is easy to hold and comes with a mirror, scraper and power cord you can plug into a computer. I removed the calcium and plaque within an hour. My teeth have never looked better!
You owe it to yourself to give it a try.

rating 4.0. Helps w/severe dental calculus So I saw a family member of mines teeth were so bad it literally scared me for them. They had so much dental calculus you almost couldn’t see the tooth/teeth anymore. It was just enveloping the teeth so much.
So I quickly went online in search of solutions for at home for dental calculus and found this and ordered it for same day delivery. I went to work as soon as it came.

At first I wasn’t getting anything & didn’t think it was going to work. But then I was SHOCKED with seeing it work. It’s kind of scary at first seeing chunks and pieces just chip and come off and hearing them break off. So if you have dental calculus this bad too be prepared for that mentally but if yours is that bad too it’s best to have someone help you cause you can’t really see it yourself.

I worked on their teeth for over and hour and was able to get probably 80-85% off which I wasn’t expecting at all. I mean I was hoping but it was something I’d never done before and never used this product either so I didn’t know what to expect but I was seriously able to get most of it off in a little over an hour.

One thing I will say about the device is for some reason it will randomly turn off (and no I’m not talking about the auto shut off after 5mins) it really does just turn off it seems when it thinks it’s stuck or something. It’s annoying but not too bad but I thought I’d mention it.

I also used the manual tools it came with too to try and get more control for picking the calculus off in sensitive spots and they worked too :) I found them useful for going in between teeth.

So far I’m REALLY glad I bought this. Worth the try if you’re struggling with SEVERE dental calculus because it does work.

Their thoughts on it’s performance is now their teeth feel rough but that’s because it’s not been perfectly scraped and not finished being cleaned so there’s now rough calculus instead of a “smooth surface” of HUGE dental calculus deposits.

I also bought a special toothpaste to pair with it that softens plaque so hopefully that will help too.

Good luck and I hope this was helpful :)

They didn’t want to share pictures but hopefully my description was helpful.

I also have a lingual wire behind my lower front teeth. No problem for the Meeteasy Sonic Dental Calculus Plague Remover tool. I am truly amazed.

rating 5.0. Weaken the calculus and get your stable hands ready This came in a few hours ago. I'm thrilled by the results. Here's what I did -- softened the calculus and then broke it up.
1. Flossed
2. Rinsed with Mouthwash.
3. Brushed thoroughly with baking soda toothpaste (A&H).
4. Used this device to break up the calculus.

Had high hopes and strong doubts, but was willing to try. Glad I went by the picture reviews. I still have some areas that need work as you can see from the picture, but I feel confident about solving those issues with this device. Yes, I know the lighting is a bit different. I stood in the same spot but didn't do it so scientifically -- wish I took a few more before pictures. Overall, I am extremely satisfied by this fantastic product!

I read reviews bashing the product saying that the company was giving a second device for 5-star reviews. But, if the product was no good, why would anyone want a second one? Anyway, if this is true. I'd be glad to give a second one to someone!

Cons:
-It turned off randomly several times, and it was fully charged. I hope this doesn't lead to the device failing to start eventually.
-It's only been a few hours so it hasn't been time tested.
-My teeth are still crooked. 🤓😅🤣

input: rating 5.0. Caruso Steam Unit Would not use any other unit or type of heating for my hair.  This makes the curles stay in and is so easy to use!  I had lots of rollers, the original steamer finally broke (it was dropped by one of my granddaughters) so I just bought a new one!  Takes up a lot less space than the electric roller sets and much, much easier to use!

rating 5.0. CARUSO HAIR CURLER I've been using these daily for years and they always seem to last well (except for one).  I don't know what I'd do without them. My hair benefits from not using electric curling products which dry and burn the hair. These sponge steam rollers are gentle, fast and make your hair soft and shiny. I would recommend them to anyone.

rating 5.0. Love this thing I really like the Caruso hairsetter, as this is probably the 5th or 6th one I've gotten. I feel they work better than dry rollers. The only drawback is that after a while they do die so you have to replace them. I've been using these for probably close to 20 years, and as long at they still make them and I have hair, I'll continue to use it.

Delivery was a day sooner than promised, always a plus.

rating 5.0. Caruso Steam Unit - Only Exactly what I wanted, since I already have a healthy collection of the rollers. I purchased my first unit at the beauty supply store, but they do not offer units only.  With this unit, I am being very diligent in filling with distilled water (we have very hard water and lime build up is terrible) and emptying properly as described in the directions.  I've used Caruso every day for 4 or 5 years and love it!  Excellent delivery service from this vendor.

rating 1.0. Unacceptable I have been using Caruso Steam rollers for over 20 years.  The units usually last 2-3 years before needing replacement.  I was thrilled to find that I could order the unit only, because I have enough of the rollers to last a lifetime.  However, this unit barely emits steam.  It needs to warm up for at least 10 minutes and the rollers need to sit for 30-45 seconds each to get completely hot.  I'm a busy girl with little time to fuss with my hair.

rating 5.0. Caruso hair steamer I've bought so many of these...it's the only hair curling system I like. They don't damage your hair. The only issue I ever have with these is the clogging up or failing to steam. I still can't remember if you're suppose to use salt in the water or not...it's been awhile since I've used them again. The unit itself is great tho. The only one I would consider using to curl my hair. I've been using Caruso for 25 years.
rating 5.0. Awesome. My wife swears by this style and when her old broke she was very upset. Thanks for having these . Awesome

rating 5.0. LOVE this steam setter I have been using the Caruso Steam System for probably over twenty years.  I have gone through I think three base units.  So great that Amazon allows you to buy the steam unit or the curlers individually.  Does not dry my hair out like the old electric curlers used to.  Highly recommend.

rating 5.0. Steam Unit The Caruso Steam Unit works great.  Very quick to heat up.  I fill it up with water to the line that it shows and within seconds, it is ready to use.  I bought (2) different sizes of rollers to use.  So, buying the steam unit seperate allowed me to buy what I needed and not have a lot of unused rollers.

rating 5.0. This unit arrived quickly and in perfect condition. The Caruso Steam Curling System has always ... I already had plenty curlers and just needed a replacement for a deceased steam unit.  This unit arrived quickly and in perfect condition.  The Caruso Steam Curling System has always been one of the best I've ever used.  I highly recommend it!

rating 5.0. My Favorite Beauty Helper OMG !!!!!!! I have been cruising Amazon for this exact item for quite some time and was thrilled to see it for an excellent price. I had been to retail and beauty supply stores everywhere I went, only to be told I could not order just the unit. I had already purchased extra rollers with my original unit. My Caruso Steam Unit gave up the after some major miles, through many hair styles.
I have very thick, straight American Indian hair that was prematurely gray hair before I could graduate high school. I purchased the Caruso Steam set and many extra curlers years ago when it first came on the market. I had tried various kinds of steam roller sets that were difficult to wrap my straight hair around. They were pokey and heavy with painful steel pins to hold rollers in my hair; only for the curls to fall out almost immediately. I tried ceramic, adjustable heat settings, and many different curling irons and dryers that was new on the market. I combined hair gels or mousse with them only to have curls and waves fall out within minutes. I went to beauty school (lol) after high school. Really not my thing
The new unit I received is not round like this picture. It is kidney shaped.
The old version I had to add a small amount of salt to the water.
The newer version has a slider switch for OFF, STEAM and IONIC STEAM.
I love, love, love the Caruso Steam for my hair.
I used 6-8 curlers for my whole head.
Literally seconds to put each in and about the time I get them all in it is time to take them out. Just like my old Caruso Steam unit (without the salt).
My curls last three days minimum.
I DO NOT use hair products on my hair ever.
Curls are soft and natural feeling.
Caruso Steamer does not damage hair. Stopped perms many years ago after finding this steamer. This amazing steamer adds shine to my curls. I can run my fingers through my hair as much as I want.
There is never those bent ends of hair, curls just fall, I shake my head, move a curl or two with my fingers and I am out the door.
I have missed this little time saver and am continually complimented on my hair and how much younger I look.
I hope this helps someone, lets me know how you use your Caruso Steamer

rating 5.0. Great for fine hair with less damage than a curling iron. Curls very fine hair and holds curl longer. My hair is very fine and stick straight. In order for me to get any kind of volume, I have to use curlers or a curling iron, but both damage my hair. These work for me and are not as damaging. I use long hair clips to hold them, not the holders they come with.

rating 5.0. Used this product for years I have used this product for many years. It has an excellent life for the unit itself. I have only had to replace it every 6 or 7 years which I think is good. Quick and easy hair setting especially if you're in a hurry.

rating 5.0. Love it! I absolutely love this thing! I got so lucky that I found the rollers at a thrift store because they are very expensive! That's how I heard about this product but I wish I would have known about it years ago. Since I had the rollers all I had to to was buy the steam unit by itself. It works great but I have a few tips -

1. The more rollers you have the more curly your hair will turn out. It's worth it to buy more.
2. Spray each section of hair with hair spray before you roll it up.
3. Your hair absolutely must be completely dry before you roll it.
4. Use distilled water so as not to clog the unit. If it does get clog you can unclog it with vinegar and water.
5. Make sure the water is filled at least half way always. If it gets below that level not as much steam comes out.

I am very happy with my purchase and like the steamer much better for curling my hair than just a plain heat curler.

rating 4.0. The larger the head & the thinner the hair..the more the metal pressure shall hurt your scalp. Really pretty. If you have curly, dark and short hair (like me) the ears will appear smaller but your poofy soft hair will work as comfortable pillows when the harsh metal side pieces start to dig into your scalp with it's rough pressure. Honestly... I can't wear this for more than a hour when I have my hair straightened or tied. Really hurts the tender area above and a front of my ears.

Also... the golden one kind of broke after a few weeks of use. Ears detached from the band.
I'm not upset- I could fix it with superglue.

input: rating 5.0. XTAVA Infrared Hair Dryer Quiet & Efficient This is one of the quietest hair dryers I have ever owned! No more rattling of the windows with this one. rating 5.0. The accessories are nice and stay put This dryer lives up to its hype.  My hair dries in half the time without all the frizz.  The accessories are nice and stay put. rating 5.0. BEST HAIRDRYER/DIFFUSER COMBO EVER!!! Hands down the BEST diffuser/hairdryer combo you'll ever own for the rest of your life. Period.  I have always had short or long wavy to curly hair and struggle with it all the time.  I went so far last year as to have my hair professionally straightened using a Keratin treatment because I just couldn't find a way to love my hair again.  The Keratin was okay for a while, but I (and my boyfriend) wanted my soft curls back.  I was even told by a few friends that with straight hair I was less approachable. Weird.  Anyway...  I just had my hair chopped to just below my ears in an effort to "start over."  I purchased the hairdryer and this diffuser as a "combo deal" from Amazon and what AMAZING PRODUCTS THEY ARE!!! This is day 2 of using the same products I've always used in my hair (conditioner in the shower/leave in after towel drying/keratin & smooth and straight combo) but this dryer/diffuser has made ALL the difference.  I can now easily dry my hair on the warm/high setting in less than 10 minutes and my hair is shiny, the curls are defined, and there is absolutely, positively not one bit of frizz!!  This combo has been a lifesaver for my hair!  I can now re-embrace my curls and never have to pay over $250 for a straightening treatment again!!  Thank you XTAVA!!!

rating 5.0. Saves time, good materials Should have spend the extra money a LONG time ago. I was buying the Revlon $20 blow dryers from local Kroger each year. Xtava Saves me time daily by drying my hair faster. The diffuser is great and makes my curls hold together, but yet still fluffy appearance. The cord is very strong and longer than I need, But I think it will last long. The dryer does have switches where I place my hand (righty), but I am getting used to it- only negative.  Love love love! Buy it!
rating 5.0. Five Stars Great dryer at an exceptional price. Bought one as a gift and one for me!

rating 4.0. Great product! Okay, so I have super long, thick hair, and managed to kill 2 Revlon blowdryers in one week!!! In all fairness, the second one was a worn out one that I replaced the first one for. The first one is one of the highest-rated Revlon blowdryers on Amazon, and it lasted me less than 6 months. I was super disappointed, so combed through customer reviews before deciding on this Xtava dryer.

First, it is super heavy-duty. It is heavy. My mom, who's in her mid-60's, specifically looks for lighter-weight hairdryers, because as she's lost strength with age and they hurt her arm. This dryer initially did that to me. It is NOT at all lightweight. After a few weeks of use, I've gotten used to it, but I wasn't completely sold at first. Also, I like dryers where the attachments fit into the dryer nozzle. These slip-on to the end of the nozzle, and sometimes they slide right off, so that I don't like. Also, I'm not soooo sure that it's as quiet as it claims, but who can really tell when it's right in your ear.

However, my hair does dry in a fairly normal time frame (I can't claim it dries super fast or anything, as some have) and while product and less-frequent washing probably helps, I've noticed my hair is very shiny these days. Overall, I DO like this hairdryer and am happy with it. I just hope this one lasts a significant amount of time, then I'll love it!

11/09/15 UPDATE:
Well...another one bites the dust. In all fairness, I dropped the dryer about a foot and a half onto the carpet while using it, but that is apparently all it takes. I'm extraordinarily clumsy, but still super disappointed that it wasn't more tough. However, I do really love the dryer and would probably buy another if they were in stock. They just need to make them a little tougher!

rating 4.0. Good product This tooth powder made my teeth feel VERY clean, exactly how they feel after a professional cleaning at the dentist. My teeth were slightly whiter after the first use, but nothing too dramatic. I'm confident that my teeth will continue to get whiter with continued use.

I bought the vanilla flavor, and noticed that the flavor was very subtle. I personally like this.

The only thing keeping me from giving this product 5 stars is the price. The jar is very small; barely big enough for me to put my toothbrush in. So $25 is a bit steep. But the product itself is fantastic.

rating 5.0. just buy it After reading all the reviews and because of my hatred for the way regular whitening products make my teeth feel, I had to try it and I was not disappointed. This is the pictures I took, in the same exact natural lighting with no flash just a few minutes apart after using it for the first time. I dont feel bad for being a daily coffee drinker anymore cause I can maintain the surface stains without having to give up cold beverages and food for uncomfortable whitening treatments.

rating 5.0. Bizzare...But it is working Ok...I have to tell all of you because I don't recall it being mentioned. Buy a SEPARATE toothbrush for the use of this product. The second thing, after you are done brushing your teeth with this stuff, you can't just "rinse thoroughly" as the jar instructions state. Your teeth will be grey, likly your lips too! Lol! So I just then brush with my regular toothbrush and toothpaste and usea clean dry washcloth to remove anything on mylips. Other than those technicalities....This stuff is great!! It really has no flavor, nor grittines left in your mouth. A little goes a long way when dipping in your toothbrush so with it being a smallish sized jar....It still should last quite some time. This is my first time using a charcoal agent to whiten my teeth and it's just easier on your teeth overall than the stuff from the dentist.

rating 5.0. Whitens Teeth Better than Other Products I love this product!! I think the proof is in the results- check out my before and after pic. Your teeth will immediately look whiter than before. I was researching products that were affordable, worked, and didn't use harsh chemicals. Time and time again I was directed towards Active Wow Teeth Whitening. I finally purchased it and love the results. It takes 1-2 minutes. I use a separate soft toothbrush to clean my teeth with this product. The vanilla flavor is a soft hint and the texture is very fine. I am already receiving compliments from my friends and family. I highly recommend Active Wow to whiten your teeth.

rating 5.0. Easy and Effective Holy Molar!  It's been a week and I've gotten compliments already. It does look a bit scary in the process but it's truly flavorless, with just a subtle pleasant note of vanilla mint (or whatever flavor you picked).  It's a good product.

rating 4.0. Only after 1st use, wow!! I was very skeptical about the charcoal teeth whitening thing. I decided to try it though... and I was blown away by results. I am an avid coffee drinker and I smoke every once in a while, so my teeth tend to stay yellow unfortunately. It is a TERRIBLE mess in my sink, but its so worth it. This picture was my first try at the charcoal stuff. Instant results. It will leave your gums a little tender, so don't brush vigorously like normal toothpaste. I use the charcoal stuff for 2 minutes, wash it out with water, brush my teeth, then use mouth wash. I'd definitely recommend this to my coworkers and friends. However, if you still drink coffee everyday, the whitening will not stay. If you give up smoking or tinted drinks, you'll fall in love with the long term results.

rating 5.0. This stuff is the bomb! Wow! Now my teeth have been said to be very white for my age of 44, but I always wanted them whiter. Was shocked to see in one use just a little, but noticeable difference!!! I brushed for 2 mins w electric toothbrush (keep your mouth closed while brushing as it's messy but so worth it!). Then I rinsed off w same brush. I have a water pik I can use too. U def need to rinse good after! In totally impressed. Got the vanilla mint. Tastes fine! No aftertaste either! Pics attached. Slight difference very early w one use cannot wait until a week or two! Arrived early and packaged well. Just be careful opening as it has no seal.

rating 1.0. This is a scam I got taken in by the positive reviews here, but I suspect that most of them are fakes. Researching it, activated charcoal does not whiten teeth. But I didn't look that up until after buying this stuff, using it for two weeks, and seeing absolutely no change in my teeth.

current_product_reviews:
rating 5.0. NOT A FROST!! TRUE MIRROR!! I have had these long enough to test all three colors. I'm satisfied these are clearly NOT frost. If you apply correctly, the mirror effect is better than the powders. However, the gold is more of a gold/green, not a true gold. The silver & rose gold are beautiful.

To apply correctly and have the mirror effect, you must adhere to nail tech guidelines!!

1. Wash & scrub your nails with a nail brush.

2. Dry your nails!

3. Apply a base coat. This is VERY important to have a filled in base on your nails. I use Mia's.

4. Apply one thin coat to each nail.

5. Use a nail corrector pen or small brush dipped in acetone to remove any on cuticles.

6. Go back to first nail painted and apply a second, thicker coat. Repeat on other nails.

7. Repeat step 5.

8. Apply your choice of top coat. I use Mia's in my salon.

If you can't get the same results, you're either not putting a base and top coat on or you're using too much on your first coat. Enjoy!!

rating 2.0. Weak construction, have repaired twice already This mirror arrived in perfect (we thought) condition. After just a day of use it fell apart. The nut on one side that connects the mirror to the stand continually becomes detached and the mirror falls off the stand. Luckily the mirror itself has not shattered or cracked (so far). I have been able to reattach the nut and reassemble the mirror. And then after just a few times the same thing happens. I have now applied "Loctite" to the threads and reassembled again. The problem seems to be with the nut assembly itself. The outside nut is metal (appears to be stainless steel) and the inside part it attached to is made of nylon. It appears to me that the nylon part is the weakness in this product as it flexes and gives way when the mirror is flipped from the magnifier side to the standard side and then the nut snaps off and the entire mirror falls from the stand. If the Loctite does nor solve the problem I am contacting the seller to replace or refund.[[ASIN:B01DYXQQBQ Ovente MPT85BR Multi Touch Tabletop Makeup Mirror with 3 Tone LED Light Option, 8.5 inch, 1x/10x Magnification, Brushed]]

rating 5.0. I love the coconut scent and the color turns out a ... I love the coconut scent and the color turns out a nice bronze, and not streaky.
