rating 3.0. Proceed With Extreme Caution I'm really torn on this review. If I could give it 2.5 stars, I would. It does have a considerable pro or two, but it also is laden with a lot of items in the "cons" column. So first, the good stuff: SugarBaby delivers on its promise to provide a dark bronze tan. The color is deep and natural looking and develops quickly. Another unexpected pro with this product is that I found the "guide" to be a pretty color once it dried and settled, so if it was necessary to go out after tanning you wouldn't have the odd color found in some products' guides. Of course, the guide in itself is a pro also, as it always helps to be able to tell if you've missed a spot, gotten it streaky, where you left off, etc. The color also lasted a fair amount of time (6 days or so.)

Now to the cons. I had to apply the mousse with latex gloves (the result of a defective tanning mitt) and eventually the help of my husband. I was absolutely exhausted once I finished tanning the parts I could reach, and he finished my back and arms. Although it was a tremendous pain, it looked good and looked even. After 30 minutes, I still couldn't get dressed in even a loose robe because a few areas felt tacky to the touch. It was almost an hour before I felt sort of dry. I eventually put on very loose pajamas pants and a long sleeve t-shirt; 5 hours later I went to bed. In the morning, there was tanner on my duvet cover, sheets, and inside my clothes.

So, Pros: Good color, lasts fairly well
Cons: Backbreaking to apply, long drying time, color transfer onto fabrics

Reserve this one for when you don't mind the extra trouble to get really dark.
Tip: Apply it 1st thing a day around the house, wear baggy clothes, and as late at night as you can, shower off the guide. You'll have given yourself the 8-10 hours your tan needs to develop (and then some), plus you'll save your sheets AND wake up smelling DHA free. :)
rating 5.0. Great Super pretty. My first self tan.
rating 4.0. Four Stars Love this! Has a bit of a chemical smell, but color is very nice and lasts around 4-6 days.
rating 5.0. Love. Could tell I was darker after one application Love. Could tell I was darker after one application. It does need to be applied daily or at least every other day.

rating 5.0. Great product! Excellent customer service experience! This is the best sunless tanner I have ever purchased. It was easy to apply and has a tint so you can see where you are applying. Initially there is a nice bronzing effect and nice, natural looking color, once the tan develops. There was no residual self tanning smell, just the yummy fragrance of the product.

My personal experience: I exfoliated using a dry scrub and loofah in the shower before drying off and applying the product using a mitt. I applied it lightly to my elbows, knees, and ankles and made a "claw" position with my hands to get the creases around my fingers. I waited the suggested 10 minutes before putting my clothes on. I wore loose dark clothing so the bronze wouldn't transfer. I would recommend taking a shower after the tan has fully developed if you want to wear light colored clothing or are worried about transfer. My tan came out looking very natural with no streaks.

My first bottle arrived with a leak but the company responded immediately and shipped the replacement quickly. I was very impressed with the level of customer service.

rating 4.0. This self tanner has great color, a nice coconut scent and it is ... This self tanner has great color, a nice coconut scent and it is buildable if you want a deeper tan!

I applied one layer, let it set overnight and washed it off in the morning. Then I applied another layer after showering to deepen the tan. I was really pleased with the results after using it!

The only con is that this has a lot of transfer compared to other self tanners I have used. The insides of my clothes were stained after using this. If you're going to use this for an event, I would suggest putting it on two days before so you can avoid staining your outfit! Overall it was a great product and I would definitely recommend it!

rating 5.0. Afordable and easy way to stay tan all year long I have been using this product for about two months and honestly like it more than the other self tanner I was using prior that was double the price.

First off the smell is devine. Especially compared to previous self tanners I've used. Does not have a strong fake tan smell, and I also don't notice the smell lingering on my skin for extended periods of time.

The color of this product is great and never looks orange or gives me that too dark/red fake tan look I've experienced with other products. The color probably lasts me 4 days, depending on how often I wash my body, workout, and shave. As with all self-tanning products I don't find the "extreme" color to be very dark. I typically apply two coats to get my desired color, which is roughly 2-3 shades darker.

VERYY easy to apply. I use this with the [[ Premium Tanning Applicator Mitt Double-Sided Soft Microfiber Glove for Streak-Free Application]] and don't typically have any problems with streaking. I have noticed I can get streaky on my legs if I apply the product too quickly and don't pay close enough attention, but I don't know any self tanner that wouldn't be an issue with.

My only issue with this product is that I've noticed is coming off on my clothes the day I use it. Even if I use it in the morning and don't wear tight-fitting or light colored clothes until over 8 hours later it will still come off on them. I've noticed it the most on my light wash jean shorts. Fortunately, the color comes off in the wash, but be prepared to plan a head if you want to use this prior to wearing light colored shorts.

Other than that AMAZING product. Definitely worth the price in my opinion.

rating 5.0. Best sunless tanner I have found and I have tried dang near all of them! This is by far the BEST sunless tanner I have ever used. I have purchased 3 bottles of this magic golden glow and I use it once a week. Each time I use it I get so many complements on my tan. HA! It's fake but it looks real.
Tips:
-You MUST use the mitt - it also gives you an even coverage and it's very soft.
-No matter how long I walk around naked in my room to let it dry, it still ends up rubbing off on clothing, it leaves a pinkish tint but washes out in the washer.
-I usually sleep with it on so I put on clothing and also put down a large beach towel on my bed to lay on especially on my pillow. The pinkish tint will end up on everything. It does wash off but this just helps. Also use a blanket that you don't care about on top of you the night you use this. Again, it does wash out but just make clean-up easier.
-Yes it will make you smelly for the night and not in a good way but a sunless tanner way.
-It fades really nice for the first 5-6 days and then gets a little patchy - just exfoliate it off and reapply.

rating 5.0. Aussies Always Get It Right! This is probably the closest thing (I've used) to having an airbrush tan. The color develops quickly and the scent is the most pleasant out of all the self tanners I've tried. It smells a little coco-nutty & like suntan lotion. I'm very fair, and I use the dark bronze formula. It gives me a golden brown tan. (No oompa loompa or cheeto orange!) It's very natural looking without being "too" dark. If I need to be "bikini worthy" dark, I just do another application.
When I received my order, a little of the product had leaked out, but nothing significant. Also, sometimes the product comes out a runny liquid rather than in mousse form. But it doesn't affect the performance results. I always use latex gloves when applying, & rub in well, and no problem. My husband has even used it a couple of times before going on vacation. I'd say we got about 7 - 8 applications out of one bottle, which makes it a huge savings compared to airbrush tans. I like that this product is not tested on animals. The fact that it's from Australia makes me love it even more!

rating 4.0. Test Small Amounts Sparingly First I decided to purchase some castor oil at the recommendation of a friend to promote hair/lash growth.  The order was prompt and packaged well.  I love the bottle that it comes in, and it serves as a bonus cute decoration in my bathroom.  I applied the oil to my top and bottom lashes with a q-tip at night to promote hair growth.  After a few days of this, I noticed that I started to develop several chalazions in my eyelids which form when oil glands in the eyelid become blocked/clogged.  I also tested a little bit out on my face as a moisturizer and noticed that a small pimple formed the next day.  After giving the regimen a rest, I have slowly begun to try to apply it again and it doesn't seem as though any new chalazions are forming, so maybe it was purely coincidental.  I kept the four stars because the quality of the oil is good and it seems to be a fair price for what you get.  I would just encourage anyone to use sparingly and test small areas of skin first before liberally applying anywhere.

rating 5.0. The good stuff A lot of castor oil products slap "organic" and "pure" on their labels but are diluted or mixed with other filler oils. rating 5.0. Great for eyebrows I bought this for the very dry skin under my eyebrows. No medical condition; simply chronic dry skin in that area made worse by pretty strong acne face wash. It really helps for both uses. It makes the eyebrows look healthy again and in the 3 days that I've been using it, it helped the flaky skin go away and made my eyebrows look healthy again. I use this every few days to keep the skin under my eyebrows looking healthy and also sleep on a small towel, as the oil stains pillow cases.

rating 3.0. Some lifting, but strong hold if you time it right. I'm pretty bummed that the lashes are lifting at the the inner corner, which is a problem I have with literally every kind of lashes. I even tried putting extra glue on the band of the lash itself but that didn't help either.

The eyeliner pen is stiff so getting smooth, precise lines is hard, although easy than with magnetic eyeliner.

I will say that when I was able to get a paid on solidlynwith no lifting, they stayed on overnight and into the next day without any re-gluing, so the adjesion is strong. I'm guessing you have to time it just right when you apply the lashes to the eyeliner if you dont want it to lift. The tweezer they send make application alot easier.

rating 5.0. Worked so well and a huge difference! I have been intimidated of fake lashes but always loved the look. I decided to try the magnetic ones and it took me a little playing with but I LOVE the results!!

1. You have to be good with liquid liner! It is not forgiving. Thankfully I spent my early 2000 college years applying it daily and have no problem! It does not come off with water or with a qtip without actual eye make up remover!
2. The lashes took me a bit and I had to make sure the liner layer was heavy enough (~2 coats) to get a good stick all over.
3. It pulled right off no issue! They felt comfortable on and I got alot of compliments. Definitely worth the money!!

rating 5.0. Amazing! 2-in-1, Time Saver, Buy it!! First of all, this eyeliner is AMAZING! It really works!! This eyeliner takes the place of lash glue. I just applied the eyeliner as I normally would, then applied the lashes that came in the package and they stuck to my lid, AND stayed there!! I live where it is currently 100+ and I had no problems with them staying on while I walked around outside.

You will have to trim the lashes to fit your eye, and I highly recommend trimming the inner part of the lash at an angle (be careful as to not cut any of the inner lashes off so you don't affect the shape!) I suggest that because the lashes have a thicker strip and it felt like it was poking me. The lashes that come with are extra, but I personally love that vavavoom look (as I call it). They are fluffy, thick and extra long. The two pictures without glasses on, are showcasing the lashes that come in the box. The picture with my glasses on are showcasing how the eyeliner works with another pair of lashes I had on hand, that I normally applied with glue. This eyeliner works on ANY lash. It seriously is amazing and I highly recommend the liner.

Would love if the company would make this liner in clear, for those days you don't want a bolder look that eyeliner gives.

To remove the eyeliner, I just used the micellar cleansing water on my make up eraser cloth and rubbed off. Any stubborn spots I wiped of with a q-tip soaked in the micellar water.

rating 5.0. HOLY. MOLY. HOLY. GRAIL. Wow. As someone with a skinny eyebrow shape and yet thicker hairs on my eyebrows, it’s been hard for me to shop for eyebrow products my entire life. I’ve tried everything from the beloved Anastasia’s to higher end brands like Tom Ford and Charlotte Tillbury, even drugstore products and Japanese and Korean products and I think I’ve finally found my holy grail. This kept on me all day at work, even though I had to walk for a good distance in the rain to my car. It didn’t smudge or budge a bit for the entirety of my day and I’ve NEVER had a product that wasn’t eaten up by my weird eyebrows or completely disappeared. This product did it all. A little goes a long way, and the best part was it was so easy to get a natural and defined eyebrow shape that didn’t go over the top or too heavy either. I will be buying all my eyebrow products from them from now on. Best $9 I ever spent.

rating 5.0. Easy Feet is easy on the feet The detractors of this product would complain if a servant brushed their royal tootsies. This is my second Easy-Feet because I lost the first one in a move.

It requires good sense to use. First, only use in a shower with hand grips because you must balance on one foot. Then use liquid soap from a dispenser--a little goes a long way. Then gently run the foot in and out of the brushes. Of course if you jam your foot in it will hurt. Duh! Be careful when you change feet; use hand grips because the scrubbed foot will be soapy.

Rinse well with the showerhead.

rating 1.0. Painfully Bad! (Yes, actual pain!) RETURNED!
First of all, I am barefoot all day long, so I need to clean the bottoms of my feet, but I also do a lot of dying, and constantly have dye spraying or dripping on the tops of my feet as well. So when I get in the shower, I usually end up scrubbing my feet with a brush anyway - I thought this would be great, because it scrubs the bottoms *and* tops at the same time! Yay! What a great idea!.... NOT.
Problems;
1. First problem, the suction cups suck (and not in the way they should!) The thing slides around, and is nearly impossible to keep still long enough to get on a good scrub. I spent more time chasing it around the shower with my foot, than it would ever have taken me to just scrub my feet by hand. Even when I was able to keep it still long enough to start scrubbing, every time I pushed my foot into it with enough pressure to actually scrub, it started to move again, and here I am chasing it around the shower again! So #1, bad suction.
2. And this is the worst part! When I was able to push it up against the side of the shower so it wouldn't slide around so much, I don't know if it's because I have high arches or what, but when I put my foot all the way in, that hard blue plastic across the top just scraped the tops of my feet raw! Very painful, and even feeling kind of bruised as well!!
So even if it didn't slide around, and make it impossible to scrub for more than 5 seconds, it is so painful to put my foot all the way in, so I wasn't able to scrub the whole foot, I had to just do the bottom of my toes, and then going only up to about half of my foot, stopping once it got to the hard blue plastic on top. So after my first use, my feet remained dirty, and now have painful scratches on the tops of my feet.
Not a pleasant experience to say the least!! I saw another one on here that only does the bottoms, so I am going to cross my fingers, and try that one, and hope that the suction cups work better! It won't get the tops at the same time, so it won't hurt them either!

rating 5.0. That said it's best used after having exfoliated with a Kojic acid soap It has all the ingredients that are proven to work for skin lightening back to it's original tone.  If it does not' work for you then you must be trying to lighten skin beyond its own natural base color.  No product on the public market is going to make your skin lighter than the color you have naturally.  The product will help speed up the erasing of tan lines and sun exposure provided you keep those areas covered up and away from the sun.  So yes it gradually works.  It's taken a month to soften that tan line on my lower legs from wearing capri slacks in the sun.  That said it's best used after having exfoliated with a Kojic acid soap.

I use Fair & White's Exclusive Whitening Soap. I decided not to purchase the soap because it's tok string for my skin. I honestly love this product!

rating 2.0. Too Hot to Touch Upon opening the box, I assumed I was getting a steal of a deal with how fancy the box looked. Then, there was a box within that box that looked just as nice. I was very impressed by the packaging. The box included the hair dyer, two different end caps, and a piece of paper with description, instructions, warranty info, etc.

The instructions didn’t really give much useful information. Nowhere on the piece of paper did it mention why you would choose to use one head attachment over the other. The biggest confusion was having no description as to what the buttons on the hair dryer were for. The images on the instructions did not match what was on the hair dryer. (See picture of the buttons – the two larger buttons both have the same symbols with no description)

I put one of the head attachments on the hair dryer, then plugged the unit in. It immediately started running, so I had to use the trial and error method of figuring out which button controlled the speed and which button controlled the heat. The hair dryer had a good weight to it and wasn’t difficult to continually hold up to dry my hair. I’ve got medium length, fine/thin hair, and it took a little over 6 minutes to fully dry my hair. While using the hair dryer, and especially after turning it off, the black end attachment was extremely hot to the touch.

Comparing to a Revlon hair dryer of the same wattage, they are almost identical in size. When using the same hot/high dry setting, the Revlon hair dryer only took about 4 ½ minutes to dry my hair. Not a huge difference, but worth mentioning. They both have around the same loudness while running. The most important difference between the two hair dryers was the temperature of the end cap attachments after using to dry my hair. The Revlon hair dryer’s end cap was 143F after I finished drying my hair, while the xtava peony hair dryer’s end cap was 256F!

Overall, this hair dryer is just okay. It’s a good basic hair dryer, but I don’t know that I would pick it to use every day. The generic buttons on the machine and lack of instructions on what they were for was annoying, but obviously could be figured out after one use. I’m more disappointed in how dangerously hot the end piece gets after using it for just a few minutes of use. I typically have to switch positions of hair tools in my hands when I’m drying my right side vs my left side, but with how hot that end piece gets, it’s not practical to touch it to rotate it. I would hate for my toddler to get ahold of it after I use it and hurt himself (yes, you’re supposed to keep it out of reach of kids, but anyone with young kids knows how fast their little hands start feeling around on the counters as far as they can reach). If you don’t have young kids and have a high heat tolerance, the temperature of the unit while/after using likely wouldn’t be an issue, but for me, it’s a deal breaker.

rating 2.0. Straight long hair 🙅🏻🙅🏻🙅🏻 hate it! I have full long straight hair and I had a lot of hope for this hair dryer. After having it for a year, hoping that I would like it everytime I use it, no, I decided that I don't like it. My main problem is the way that hot/cool air comes out of the dryer makes my hair tangle and oh boy, my hair could be all tied up and I would have a hard time combing it. This does not happen if I simply use a 10 dollar blow dryer. Really! This never happened to me with other blow dryer. I tried those provided in hotels. They work as advertised.

My second problem with this dryer is it takes forever to dry my hair if not turning it into a knotty mess. Again I am comparing it to the cheap ones out there. A cheap hotel dryer dries my hair in 5 but I would spend 20 min with this dryer every night and still go to bed with my hair semi wet. I don't get it. It simply doesn't dry!!! why?

I am giving up. I will just go to BBB and get a cheap blow dryer that works. I am so disappointed with this one.

The two stars on this product is for the look and sturdiness. That's all. It is not a good dryer.

rating 5.0. Much stronger, quieter and lighter- very happy I've always had Revlon and Conair dryers, at the highest watts available. Decided to try this new brand based on reviews and the fact that my last two dryers only lasted 2 years each. Have to say I am very happy with this new brand and it is definitely MUCH stronger than the drugstore brands. I have shoulder length, fine hair, but a lot of it. I've been frustrated by how long it takes it to dry. This dryer definitely gets the job done quicker . However, it is so strong at the strongest setting, I use the lower one when doing the actually styling. (I've never used anything but the strongest with any other dryer)  If you have short hair, it may dry too quickly with this dryer and you may not feel much advantage to this because you'll need to limit yourself to the lower setting anyway. The dry is smaller than my previous ones, which I like too and is also definitely much quieter. Very happy with this purchase.

I would not buy this product again. Ended up being a piece of crap.

rating 5.0. Love love love it. My old dryer was really heavy and I would suffer holding it up for minutes so weight was the first thing I cared about while picking a new dryer on Amazon. This one definitely did not disappoint! It's really light weight and very powerful.

rating 5.0. Sweet Little Dryer I recently purchased this sweet little dryer along with the same company's, "Black Orchid" diffuser. [[ASIN:B00VJ06PG8 xtava, Black Orchid Diffuser with Advanced Airflow and 3D Multi-Prong Design]] The dryer arrived in very professional packaging that made it feel like a very high end purchase.

Its a small, compact, very pink, and while its weight seems a bit heavy for its size, it's by no means unmanageable. I had a full size drugstore dryer, but it's size alone made it difficult for me to manage. This size is perfect for this pushing 60 Grammy!

It has both high and low, heat and blower settings, as well as a cool shot button. It also has a no heat setting. The ample lengthed cord feels premium and rather than flat, is rounded, with a swivelled attachement, that gives it no kink performance. My other dryer had a flat cord that often tangled and kinked, and drove me crazy!

This sweet dryer looks, feels, and performs like a high end dryer. Its price point makes it wondrous bargain! Highly recommend.

rating 5.0. Pretty and very functional Pretty and very functional! I bought this as a spare hair dryer to keep at my boyfriend's house so I didn't have to tote mine back and forth. I have to say I like it just as much as my hair dryer that cost twice as much. And it's pink! The accessories are also high quality. It comes in pretty packaging with a discount card off additional products through Xtava.

rating 1.0. BE AWARE! Do NOT buy this hair dryer.  After only 1 week after receiving it, my wife told me it no longer blows on "high" setting.  I verified this by trying numerous times to get the hair dryer to operate on "high" setting, without any success.

rating 2.0. Nice, but......... Dryer is lightweight, operates well,  and dries hair safely and quickly, BUT...... the heat and speed tabs are located so that no matter how I hold the dryer, I keep accidentally changing the speed or heat, or I turn off the dryer altogether while I'm using it. I'm really disappointed. I'm going to have to return a dryer which is absolutely excellent if only I could keep it running!
rating 1.0. Broken already?! I ordered this on February 7th. Just two months, and it's completely stopped working. Won't even turn on.

rating 5.0. Dry time cut in half! I have long thick curly hair and the dry time has been cut in half with this hair dryer.  I am not going to lie my search for a new Hair dryer started with the color.  It's a great Pink color but then as I did my research I thought this one was the best of the Pink ones I could find.  There are great features such as the long cord.  Nothing is worse then a hair dyer with a short cord.  This one allowed me plenty of room to move all around.  I also thought it was very powerful I was able to dry my hair in 1/2 the time as with my prior hair dryer.  I think that the quality you are getting for the low price point it exceptional.  I also appreciated that while the dryer is powerful it is not heavy.  My arms did not get tired at all while drying my hair!  This is a top notch product!

rating 5.0. would definitely purchase this hair dryer again Absolutely love this hair dryer. First I should say that my previous two hair dryers were both Revlon purchased from a drug store around $20-25. The last hair dryer I had lasted for 10 years and I only got rid of it because it wasn't drying as well as my travel one, despite cleaning the lint off, so it was time to shop for a new one!

The hair dryer comes well packaged in a fabulous box. The packaging was well beyond anything than I expected. This made seeing the hair dryer all the better. It is a perfect shade of hot pink. Comes with two attachments and a cord longer than my previous one. It is a tad heavier but it is smaller and somehow the balance on it is better so it feels better to hold even though it weighs a bit more, but I don't notice the weight at all unless side by side comparing. It is by far quieter than my previous hair dryer and has a 'low' pitch as opposed to a high whine, which I think is wonderful.

It dried my hair as expected if not a bit better. Definitely better than my previous hair dryer. It has 2 speeds (plus off) and 3 heat settings plus cool. I would recommend this hair dryer.

rating 1.0. Returned it I returned this for several reasons: 1) The first thing I noticed is that it was heavy. 2) The controls are identical, so it's hard to remember which switch to use when I'm still half asleep. 3) High speed is WAY too high. It tangled my hair terribly, and if I wasn't careful, the force of the air would hurt my inner ear. Low speed wasn't enough to dry my hair in a reasonable amount of time.

rating 1.0. Useless and disappointed. In the trash. Worst. Dryer. Ever. Awkward handle that always resulted in me changing the speeds or temperature due to the button placement and ease of pressing. Would never just STAY hot, would constantly fluctuate between hot and cold, staying mostly on the colder side. Threw it away and invested in a proper hair dryer.

rating 5.0. This blowdryer is A M A Z I N G. This blowdryer dries my hair SO SO fast. I have a short bob and it took me 2 or 3 minutes after I had towel dried my hair. So in love. They aren't joking about it being a high velocity dryer either. Takes care of business!

rating 5.0. Small but POWERFUL First of all the packaging for this hair dryer was amazing. It was securely in the box with the two attachments. Secondly, the color is SO pretty, I love it. My hair is very long (and thick) but I was able to dry it within twenty minutes - which is unheard of. It's light weight, compact and less noisy than my previous hairdryer. Also, the cord is long, which is important as I style my hair at my vanity and the outlet is close to the floor. I haven't had any issues with it overheating as mentioned in other reviews, but with all hair dryers it is important to clean the venting in the back (dust build up) between use. I've done this with every hairdryer I've owned and work in a hotel, where we use a bristle brush on our hairdryers between guests. It's possible that's why there were issues with the motors? I can't say for sure if that was the case for the other reviewers, but I definitely suggest purchasing an inexpensive toothbrush from the Dollar Store to use on the venting!

Great price, great item, I absolutely recommend!

rating 3.0. It looks cute but: 1) it is loud - ... It looks cute but: 1) it is loud - in fact it is louder than my old cheap revlon 2) it is on the heavier side, again heavier than my old blow dryer. Overall, it is ok, but not sure it is worth the money.

rating 1.0. So disappointed with this dryer I was so excited about getting this dryer that when I was unsuccessfully waitlisted for it on Prime Day I bought it at regular price. But as soon as I turned it on for the first time, it emitted a loud noise that I can only describe as being between a screech and a whistle. I thought perhaps there was a fastener I needed to undo, but no - the dryer was simply malfunctioning. Initially I thought I would request a replacement, but upon digging into the reviews a bit further than I'd done when I bought it, I found multiple reports of strange noises and dryer failure shortly after the return period elapsed.  To be fair, the majority of reviews are very favorable, but I just don't want to take the chance of anything happening with another dryer, so I am returning it.

rating 5.0. A+++ I won't lie, the reviews made me a little hesitant to buy this hair dryer. Almost all the reviews are good, but a lot of them were in exchange for this hair dryer. I'm so glad I bought it though. This thing is amazing. It has way more power than my last hair dryer, and it's quieter. If my daughter says something to me while I'm using it, I can actually hear her.
It's feels solid, but is not that heavy. I can blow dry my hair in a just a few minutes now; it took f o r e v e r before. The pink is such a nice color. The cool shot is actually cool; I find that in a lot of the cheaper hair dryers the cool is usually more room temp than actually cool. I am so happy with this, seriously if it broke tomorrow, I'd buy it again!

rating 3.0. Was awesome but blower stopped working within 2 months I actually loved this hairdryer! I used it once every other day for approximately 5 minutes, because it dried my hair super fast, on medium heat, high air. My husband used it on his beard a couple of times a week or so. This should not have happened.

I contacted Xtava since the unit is under warranty but they are undergoing a brand relaunch and have no inventory. They offered me a refund and processed it yesterday. Great customer service! I'll be interested to see their new products when they complete their relaunch.

rating 5.0. Awesome blow dryer with 2 skinny diffusers After my favorite blow-dryer broke about a week ago, I decided to browse Amazon and see what I could find to replace it and came upon this guy. I was already sold the minute I saw it came with 2 skinny diffusers, and after reading reviews, I liked more of what I saw. I'd never heard of or tried Xtava brand before, so I figured I'd give it a go since the conventional blow dryers I find in stores always seem to break down after about a year or two of use.

I just tried it out for the first time today and I'm genuinely pleased with it. It's relatively quiet on the low setting and not overbearingly loud on the high setting. The cool, medium, and hot settings are appropriate to their designations, and the diffusers are absolutely my favorite part. I used the skinnier of the two and I was able to dry my hair quicker and straighter with nearly no frizz. I definitely recommend this blow dryer if you're looking for an inexpensive one with skinny diffusers that'll get the job done well.

rating 1.0. With the first use I loved it. It had great air flow and dried ... I normally don't write reviews. But I felt that it was necessary in this case. I purchase this hair dryer about a week ago. With the first use I loved it. It had great air flow and dried my hair quickly with a shine. However. On the second use, not quite a minute or two with it on and the fan just stopped. absolutely nothing. I unplugged it tried a different outlet... nope. Pressed the reset button....nope. rating 5.0. Obsessed with this unisex scent (This is my dads account, I am his daughter, hence why the title on here is Robert)
I am a very minimalist but feminine woman who is VERY sensitive to smells. Nearly all perfumes for women give me an immediate headache. If its too floral or sweet or fruity or musky I will get a raging migraine. On top of that I generally don't enjoy the scents made for women. I don't want to smell like a bakery or a florist. But I absolutely do want to smell like nature, and this stuff is nature in a bottle. Cedar-y and woodsy, it smells like a crisp fall day. Its not a heavy scent at all, very light and fresh. It is very strong at first, and you can definitely smell the alcohol when you first spray it, but it quickly settles in to a fantastic all day wear.

rating 4.0. Pine Needles It smells like a combo of cedar wood and pine needles to me. A little strong at first spray, definitely makes me cough if I have the bathroom door closed since I'm weak to fragrance anything, but mellows out and lingers as a really nice fresh wood scent. I'm not 100% sure if other people smell it or not since no one's reacted one way or the other but after a couple days of use I really started to enjoy it.

Kind of interested in trying the sandalwood variant of this at some point.

rating 5.0. Boosts underperforming fragrances Can't compare this to escentric as I've never smelled escentric. I purchased iso e super simply because I read it helps boost fragrances. I have skin chemistry that just absorbs fragrance. Bleu de Chanel EDP is hardly a skin scent on me in 30 mins. Happily I used this as a base and sprayed my BDC on top of the molecule 01 and the sillage and longevity of the fragrance was noticeably improved. I could still smell it from my chest well after an hour, HUGE improvement. If you have an expensive cologne or perfume that just underperforms use this fragrance as a base and be impressed at how well it makes your other fragrances shine.

rating 5.0. Used it for the 1st day and success... I applied it on it's own and I could barely tell the smell. First it definitely smelled like a rubbing alcohol... but after few seconds I could tell a scent of luxurience and opulence. But after an hour I couldn't tell if scent was there or not... So I went to work today and mixed it with CK Be. one spray of CK Be and two sprays of Molecule... I kept getting compliments, so much that it became annoying. I got too many compliments and extraneous attention. Women were just keep leaning towards me to smell me, and about 50-60 compliments. And guys were looking at me, it's a look of being inspired.

Every 2-3 minutes I have a new rich customer at our luxury store. That's why I was over-exposed to too many people and got more than enough attention on a mixture of cologne that never got compliments prior to this when I wore it, but I like the scent of CK be so I mixed it with molecule 01. The scent also lasted longer. I'm not sure whether this is a placebo effect, but it did seem like CK be lasted for at least twice longer. I could feel everybody liked the way I smelled today. I'm not even exaggerating, I felt like a celebrity...

It's hard to explain what it smells like. On youtube they describe the smell but it's either confusing or inaccurate.. It smells pleasant, that's all I can say. As if you're not using a cologne yet you emit vibes that you're rich.

I'll try to wear it by itself tomorrow, to see if it works on it's own. Instructions say to be patient with it, don't just throw in a towel just because you can't smell enough of it.. That's what I'm trying to do... Definitely will order Molecule 02 and if it's good keep exploring everything this brand has to offer...

Updates pending.

UPDATE... This perfume is a MUST HAVE for sure! I now can detect iso e super in perfumes too. I always liked this scent, I just didn't know what it was. This is one of that scent that made you think your perfume smells so good.

I pheromonize it by spraying it under my arms. It works as a deodorant. Although it has alcohol, it doesn't irritate my underarms at all. This is the luxurious deodorant smell I've ever tried. My underarms smell so sexy!!! lol No underarm odor... it just smells very very sexy!

Underarms and around genitals there are eccrine glands that release pheromonic sweat. (note stinky underarm smell is not a pheromone scent. that's the smell of the bacterial turnover that destroyed your pheromonic structure.) Once you spray with this perfume, your underarms at first get disinfected. and then all you have left is iso e super molecula. which is bactericidal. hence germs won't populate underarms, so all you'll have is your pheromones that are scentless mixed with iso e super! and that smells sexy as hell!!!! Only if you try it you'll understand what I mean. My coworker girl whispered into my ear that I smell SSSEXY!!!

rating 5.0. Cute and Compact Convenient and simple hair dryer. It comes with an attachment that you snap on. I must admit it’s not the easiest to slip on an off but does a good job or channeling the air.

When I turned it in the highest setting there was a slight burn smell, which I’m not sure if that’s from the inner parts of the the heating up to produce the heat but I’ll have to keep my eye on it during long term use.

The cool button option is pretty neat if the air gets too hot for your scalp, you can just hold it down to temporarily change the temperate.

Update: I was told the burn smell is from protective oil protect in the dryer and after using several uses, the smell will disappear. On my second use I didn’t smell is as much

rating 4.0. Hair dryer is 1200 W - Not 1600. Bought this hair dryer for the size and 2 yr guarantee. Never heard of this brand before. Despite the description on the internet, the box and dryer state it's 1200W, not 1600W. I was leary as my old dryer is 1875W and drys my hair fairly quickly. That being said, I was surprised that this one is quieter and takes the same amount of time to dry as my previous dryer. The cord is substantial and the size good for traveling. The diffuser works well and the cold shot is nice to have.  The unit itself does not get hot but the plastic difuser does - be careful when taking it off. Cannot give a 5 star rating as a travel dryer as it is only 220V. So, if you travel the US or Mexico, you're fine. You'd have to buy a different dryer for Europe/overseas. I've only had this a few days - so verdict still pending but so far so good.

I Like It I thought the more you spent, the better the product was supposed to be, but after dropping heavy dollars for average results/things, I decided to go to what has always worked for me. rating 5.0. Who knew oil cleansers would treat acne? I have suffered with acne most of my life. I did the bacitracin as a child and then once puberty was over, my acne cleared up quite nicely.  However, I do tend to get adult acne from time to time which is not a big deal but I have hyper pigmentation which means I have spots all over my face from the acne.  I have tried many different products to prevent acne, to not over dry my skin, to cleanse my face without harsh chemicals and was at my wits end.  I read an article online about a lady that started using moisturizing oil to help without break outs and I was intrigued.  It seems like putting oil on your face would break you out more but I was wrong. I have been using Neutrogena Ultra Light Cleansing Oil for about 2 months (same bottle) and I am beyond satisfied. It is very light but cleanses my face without over drying.  My face feels soft and full of moisture after I use it.  I have also noticed less break outs since using this product. I haven't noticed any change in my glow but other people have noted that my face seemed more vibrant. I definitely suggest this product!

rating 5.0. Excellent for gel nail application also I used these to create a set of gel nails. I followed a tutorial on YouTube by JapanNailsandMore. I don't know her real name, but she's an experienced nail technician and cosmetologist who does great tutorial videos on YouTube. These forms are great for gel nail application, using clear builder gel (either non-soak off or soak-off) by IBD, and a UV light. You brush a small amount of the gel into the form and cure it on its own under the UV lamp for about 30 seconds, and then take it out. Then you brush more gel into the form and make sure it sticks to the sidewalls. You then place it over your finger and hold your finger under the lamp. You must hold the form down with another finger so as to prevent bubbling, at least for the first 10 seconds, then you can let go and let the lamp cure it for 2 minutes total. Once the lamp is turned off, remove your finger from the UV lamp and then pop the form off. It comes right off and the nail is PERFECT! So much easier than doing the sculptured nail forms. I am SOLD! Will never be without these again.

rating 5.0. Perfect Nails This is the one of the best products for those that do their own nails at home and are not very good with applying acrylic freestyle.  Just mix your acrylic onto the brush and pat it into the nail form, once that is done, turn the form over and press it onto your own nail and hold.  Scrap any access of from sides, wait approx. 3 mins. until acrylic hardens, then pull the form off.  You will have a beautiful smooth acrylic nail and all that is left to do is just file the sides to shape the way you want.  Love, Love this product.

rating 5.0. If you want to cut back on nail salon visits try the forms They work exactly as they say. I have used these forms over and over and the results are always the same. The forms pop off easy and leave a smooth glossy acrylic nail. Can be used over acrylic nail tips or create the whole nail with acrylic powder. Comes with a mini cd with instructional videos. Strong, lasting, I would recommend using a clear powder. Very simple to do and will save on salon visits.
**When using these forms make sure to clean the nail bed well so the acrylic will adhere. If you don't the nail will lift around the nail bed and can cause injury if something is caught/snagged between the nail and your nail.
**If you are using just the acrylic (no nail tip) I would recommend you take a sharpie and draw a line across the outside of the nail to mark the desired length of the nail.

rating 2.0. Seems to work, but quickly turned stale! I decided to purchase a scar remover treatment in order to lighten eczema-related scarring on my lower leg that has lingered since childhood.  After reading positive reviews regarding the Protege Flawless product, I thought I would give it a try.  The consistency is disgusting, the color is gross, and the "scent" is an odd fruity-type scent that isn't pleasing by any means.  Every time I open up the jar, there is a very unappealing product inside.  Nonetheless, I went ahead and began using it and after only a few weeks, I have noticed a small difference.  My scarring does look lighter, so that's a good thing.  However, I think my product has already turned stale!  I have closed it tight after each use, but it seems to have changed.  It looks the same, but the "scent" is now completely atrocious!  There's not a trace of that barely "fruity" scent anymore.  It has turned into a putrid smell, and I almost can't even bear to use it.  It seems as if almost overnight it turned from barely fruity to entirely unbearable.  I can't even put my finger on what it smells like now.  The best way to describe the smell is "chemical," which leads me to think this may not be as natural of a product as the company claims.  I've rated this two stars only because it seems to have done something for the better, but I am going to switch to another product.  This is much too expensive for it to turn stale so quickly.

rating 5.0. Rosacea destroyer! I thought i had rosacea on my nose, it would always get red and puffy all the time, I went to the dermatologist and he confirmed that it indeed was. I figured my dad and his brothers had it too. I thought it was pimples or zits so I would try to pop them only to find out I couldn't, leaving this really bad dark scars behind. I couldn't deal with it anymore it got so bad to the point I could not go out in public with out a band aid covering the big red shiny bumps it would create on my nose. I tried changing my diet and it worked but I could not go on longer than a week depriving myself from my favorite foods. As soon as I this certain food it came back. I looked up reviews online trying to find creams that would help reduce my rosacea and the dark scars it left me. This cream would pop up everywhere in every website I would go on. I saw it was also really cheap compared to this other creams that aren't any cheaper than $80. I bought this cream 2 weeks ago and been using it ever since. My nose has not turned red at all since, I have not gotten any of the big disgusting bumps I used to get and it has reduced my dark scars slowly. It has also helped my skin looked younger since it used to look really dry and wrinkly from upclose due to all the previous acidic creams and lotions my doctors would prescribe me. I recommend this cream to any person who has rosacea and has a bit of money to spare, I believe it is worth a try since I took a gamble buying it and it has paid off. I will update this review if anything changes.

rating 5.0. Bio Silk conditioner is a superior detangler. Bio Silk conditioner is a superior detangler. For those with long hair, you know how hard it is to find any detangler that works well and does not leave your hair weighted-down or dull. I use both the Bio Silk shampoo and conditioner and appreciate the fact that it actually restores the texture and appearance of my hair. Even if I use a different shampoo or don’t feel the need to condition, I prefer to finish with a pumpful of Bio Silk at the ends of my hair to ease my comb-out. It tames my damp-weather Pacific Northwest frizz and I imagine it would work as well on curly hair I find both the shampoo and conditioner to be surprisingly gentle on my scalp.
There is an issue with the fragrance: upon opening it does have a strong smell (for me, it’s a 1950’s salon smell) not exactly unpleasant, but distinct. Well, the good news is that the smell dissipates in a couple of weeks (oxygen-exchange?) and mellows into a citrus/woodsy scent (as opposed to a floral.)
For those who want to rejuvenate coarse, tangled, dull hair, I can recommend both the Bio Silk shampoo and conditioner. I was really pleased that it solved some of my more vital hair problems and was free of parabens and sulfates!

rating 3.0. Gave me dandruff I used this product for about 3 months and everything was ok. I didn’t love it but it worked. I am trying to avoid parabens and sulfates. It got my hair clean and even though I didn’t love the smell it worked.

Then I noticed dandruff. I conditioned more often but it just seemed like more and more dandruff was everywhere. I had to go back to normal shampo for awhile because my head was full of flakes and with dark hair it became noticeable.

I have since then switched to OGX tea tree shampoo which is sulfate free and the dandruff went away. After a month I went back to the Okay Black Jamaican Castor oil shampo and immediately the dandruff came back.

So I am on the look out for a better paraben free sulfate free shampo but wow there is some nasty stuff out there. OGX claimed they were paraben free but I’m not so sure based on the PEG ingredients. Herbal essences has a paraben free shampoo but per the reviews still causes dandruff (and has sulfates). Alba shampoo got ok reviewed but contains so much fragrance that it makes me gag.

At this rate I might just stop washing my hair altogether ha!

I am bias on my review because I purchased a couple of plastic bottles from local store and worked but after one full day, it's going to the garbage because essential oil even just a little bit mixed with distilled water will melt the plastic. For those interested, 4 oz. btl. mix 1 tsp oil and 1 tsp polysorbate 20 (1:1 ratio) shake and leave it in the bottle (I leave it overnight) then fill the rest with distilled water and shake. It will mix really well and no more oil floating on top of the bottle. Orange is my favorite but any essential oil works. A great gift.

rating 5.0. Yes To This One This mascara was a big surprise. It performs like a very expensive mascara at a drugstore price. No smudging, flaking or clumping. Washes off with pure water and a bit of rubbing. Add some cleanser and it's effortless to remove. I can fall asleep with it on and no black eyes in the morning, just a few flakes from sleeping. It offers full volume and lengthens well. If you use a curler, you can get a very dramatic effect. It's buildable for more false eyelash looks without being clumpy. The wand is not straight. It is like a smiley face curve. But with a twist of the end, it curves into a "u" shape to get different angles. I would love this even with a normal straight brush.
The only complaint is that it dries out faster than others I've used, but is about the same as tarte waterproof in this regard. My favorite mascara so far! I will be ordering extras in case it's discontinued.
